A few days ago, Bruno wrote to you about the disgusting comments that Lauren Boebert made against Congresswoman Ilhan Omar. We can’t put it better than the Congresswoman did this morning: _"This kind of hate cannot be condoned by the House of Reps, and we should punish and sanction Boebert by stripping her of her committees, by rebuking her language by doing everything that we can to send a clear and decisive message to the American public.”_ Kevin McCarthy is the leader of House Republicans. He has not taken any of the actions that Congresswoman Omar has detailed. We know that he’s betting on becoming Speaker next year — and we can’t let that happen. [**Together, we will defeat Kevin McCarthy and elect Bruno Amato — but that is only made possible by the support of folks like you, chipping in what you can, because you believe in better leadership in Congress and a better future for all of us. Can you split a donation right now between Ilhan Omar's reelection campaign and our campaign to defeat Kevin McCarthy and to elect Bruno?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zOLlj7RMWDWw1E55hp31-IGTykstFQJHhjZ5w7FtUiozX1xZsJ01kVjjFqlg2U6go5epZqKQAm76wLwruGd7HGgfPDjLgyFHovxyZGEOeL2I-0fa7koAZzzo7BPkBkn7Z9DCjQaRFy7uOfUwIWdVhFZ_0zKYApTFsTvOUWuzDdXFQXOkNAgy4hjzaCnX5jjmvoxt9V6fJXagxFvUfvlZd8mh1cSz-Ja65WsFJvhAcFWkWO8nKg7G-gfyYfKBbhNwDb64cW3EpUM5b1dJAwdjuZbq6d5wZCc0vrzYujCooZ3S8Z3fPwDWnNbGDIC6GpEYCXLumjE5p2HNIXm0s7Uxv9d4wCFWcbdUALG0ye2f0sSg/3hn/1fPoyBN0Qry9TqKMJUj8-A/h1/u_4hGNSkizISntD_R7suJVq-6P9PrsCk-jqlV57Ogqo) [Contribute »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zOLlj7RMWDWw1E55hp31-IGTykstFQJHhjZ5w7FtUiozX1xZsJ01kVjjFqlg2U6gq_OHaqnM_Ml50LhKZSyYU4umZZGNN7aNa5GITwataYiSeziEBuWTlsk9KJ5yciXEXiDXzHsp9-i82CwYT0Iz0ps7wJNcjjbBwvEMEduWshNeH0qQ_UZ5D8_OSdOYXgUqHkaupQE4jZCf7TRkAyKZoqiqt1_2tpH1EbybbePwbQInrkAAep_Pu7Vp-Y2by_vd2t4l-JdcrqZ3StkBi5zVDfjG7QHYLGnx2M4_oXrJozzgzRXhHkPwF6VLr2RvpsEwWk3Da6pZQcdyPOSZNrDFEcqYvuK0GAhbac-BvP7t5pRQ/3hn/1fPoyBN0Qry9TqKMJUj8-A/h2/OeQZOI5zd5R6Qupf-UM07QCq1UgrkXd0rqKGCaTVfiM) If you did not see the email from Bruno a few days ago, we included it below — and we hope you’ll read it to learn what's at stake in next year's election and why Bruno made the decision to run against the most powerful Republican in Congress. In solidarity, Team Bruno For Congress [Contribute »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zOLlj7RMWDWw1E55hp31-IGTykstFQJHhjZ5w7FtUiozX1xZsJ01kVjjFqlg2U6grMwm1GLb0vw-yPyrUDqstqkWS1dVVPKpgrda6-kYUEDcOO7moOk4i24rSLwuTrgoEmMYl9ivdqL1-liBJRIe_sFfY9SsoSK1qGeCM5lFbOrMmVt550T_smafRE3ZJVi65e9cPWcG3zl7qr38LMbOjK9f1zR7Wznk5EQfqYL5qkISw3yzhvx21y8QZVFkBYzdwb1_bZaQHZhg3z7p422tgkO_R1Psog2PLoAwRH0K4SM8bcpA0uSJsvpVpLC0ABQSPNhlSplFaskFpMrZNXuWhWt2fhJX2pZswM7HKVWXh-sg/3hn/1fPoyBN0Qry9TqKMJUj8-A/h3/MSru_EzGf_-53oYdET7L4ELFqwvZv-xfYHOdIKjvamk)

* * *

From: Bruno Amato
Date: December 3rd, 2021
Subject: Not on our watch
If someone at your job made vile, racist, Islamaphobic comments that directly endangered the life of another colleague, they would most likely get fired. **But in Congress, with Kevin McCarthy as GOP Leader, there seems to be a different set of rules.** A few days ago, Lauren Boebert — an extremist right-wing Congresswoman — unleashed a verbal attack on Congresswoman Ilhan Omar that directly contributed to even more violent threats made against Congresswoman Omar.
Kevin McCarthy has said nothing. **Instead of condemning the attacks, he’s helped prop up other people in Congress who share Lauren’s views and supported their dangerous statements.** If he becomes Speaker next year, that means people like Lauren will have even MORE power to make these kinds of dangerous statements without consequence. We can’t let that happen. **Not on our watch**. [**We need leaders who will fight for folks all across our district by fighting for economic, reproductive, and racial justice. clean_body: We can't say it better than Congresswoman Ilhan Omar | | | A few days ago, Bruno wrote to you about the disgusting comments that Lauren Boebert made against Congresswoman Ilhan Omar. We can’t put it better than the Congresswoman did this morning: "This kind of hate cannot be condoned by the House of Reps, and we should punish and sanction Boebert by stripping her of her committees, by rebuking her language by doing everything that we can to send a clear and decisive message to the American public.” Kevin McCarthy is the leader of House Republicans. He has not taken any of the actions that Congresswoman Omar has detailed. We know that he’s betting on becoming Speaker next year — and we can’t let that happen. If you did not see the email from Bruno a few days ago, we included it below — and we hope you’ll read it to learn what's at stake in next year's election and why Bruno made the decision to run against the most powerful Republican in Congress. In solidarity, Team Bruno For Congress From: Bruno Amato Date: December 3rd, 2021 Subject: Not on our watch If someone at your job made vile, racist, Islamaphobic comments that directly endangered the life of another colleague, they would most likely get fired. But in Congress, with Kevin McCarthy as GOP Leader, there seems to be a different set of rules. A few days ago, Lauren Boebert — an extremist right-wing Congresswoman — unleashed a verbal attack on Congresswoman Ilhan Omar that directly contributed to even more violent threats made against Congresswoman Omar. Kevin McCarthy has said nothing. Instead of condemning the attacks, he’s helped prop up other people in Congress who share Lauren’s views and supported their dangerous statements. If he becomes Speaker next year, that means people like Lauren will have even MORE power to make these kinds of dangerous statements without consequence. We can’t let that happen. Not on our watch**. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately. Kevin McCarthy would rather stay in the good graces of the most extreme wing of his party in order to stay in power than condemn such dangerous actions. But the good news is that folks like you from all over our district and across the country are ready for a change. You’ve been helping build a grassroots movement to defeat him and bring a different kind of leadership that listens and leads with the people in mind. I’m so grateful you’re in this fight. Let's go, Bruno | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

clean_body: | | | | | BREAKING: Cook Political Report just moved Steve’s race from “Lean Democrat” to “TOSS UP”! | | | Team -- we’re shocked. Cook Political Report just declared Steve’s race a TOSS UP and we couldn’t be more worried about what this means for the future of Nevada (and our country). Steve won the last election by just four points. This new rating makes this race closer than ever and puts everything we’ve worked for at risk. This is shaping up to be one of the closest governor’s races in the country. Steve’s seat is officially vulnerable and we know that his 6 Republican opponents are ready to unleash the GOP war chest to try and flip Nevada bright red. We’re sounding the alarms on this because we’re going to need all hands on deck to defend Steve and the progress we’ve fought for. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for reading this urgent message, Team Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. body:
| | | **Yesterday, we sent around our End of Year Survey to check in on the issues that matter to you as we close out the year. Will you take a moment to fill it out? It only takes a minute.** **Survey:**_[MckaylaWilkes.com/Survey](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnls1-fa6y_I3_sHa1h_5i5wKQCK2Knpo7lAZVw8DJ4DPCYdu8mlsST07_luMtfya75wcac5H8BQ9A7ybwV6u85Hr0geXr0QmNPJ4P4l7Hi_OUK1kh9SPNzw62B1NU-iDltxG23RPutBq_AZLRjzUI6p-1Ew78GwSUUjiZsXg3L04UX1Tpc8hSChnZkJx3J5UMAnVN-471ClSCvcxUsF6vVm33yhXDLR_BiBBOa8DEC_qEd0xMCZwa-vcbpEFCvMUGo/3hn/FCiBO0qlSSuNDdiRHNShuA/h0/OAQyzIQvXHwt48b2MLngawzHpscTAH1ZxpAx-4ecrZ8)_
* * *
Team, It’s been nearly a year since this campaign launched, and we’ve been overwhelmed by the support we’ve had. We say it often, but it really does mean the world to us. **We know Mckayla’s life experiences make hers a really important voice in our politics.** Over the years, we’ve seen nothing fundamentally change. We’ve seen how the system treats people like her — regular people — and we know change can’t wait. Steny Hoyer has been in office for 40 years. While he’s on the phone to big donors, Mckayla’s in our community, talking to regular folks. That’s thanks to the support of this community, enabling us to run a true people-powered campaign. _[But we want to take a moment as we close out the year to hear from you too. Will you take our campaign’s brief issues survey? It’ll only take a minute.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnls1-fa6y_I3_sHa1h_5i5wKQCK2Knpo7lAZVw8DJ4DPCYdu8mlsST07_luMtfya75wcac5H8BQ9A7ybwV6u85H3e5S4AbmDUa1sOLjqtvFMDvxKbzskmQC3HYqv3yJDRxox5AoAXemoKXFSXW4pIYYTJZ0Qu_2XYvXy9mftyUM6vB6lrWtrk05TR44k28OVIzH_s4xZqS3zXme0widKoT4xFJcc1FK0KEPtVsRmzeEqRjGunMUDcX5HJVgfngKUTc/3hn/FCiBO0qlSSuNDdiRHNShuA/h1/O1ebeCDE-XZhBaHTjHE-pHWAm-6aJ_2HwGIfT8wNe1M)_ | [ TAKE THE SURVEY
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnls1-fa6y_I3_sHa1h_5i5wKQCK2Knpo7lAZVw8DJ4DPCYdu8mlsST07_luMtfya75wcac5H8BQ9A7ybwV6u85Hx0Zue8MDRZG_IwrspgQiQ_427-lLwQO0VENJ4PodQ5JlJcS3kZwZc28J4mCE9wggFNJFPPU8mCZURSr8Z52cQ9oLT06RGXUV3tfO8Q4nz28sc__JBHic_RNHH4e_d8fLnLdSvvZ95g2IcwJy4x9NoPYEJCh5qDkrCNbaVeJV1Ws/3hn/FCiBO0qlSSuNDdiRHNShuA/h2/exYVE0XP9OoLydbclUyupKsvhI1y6F_kqoC3_VAgriY)

We have a representative right now who takes a lot of corporate money, and his stance on policy tends to reflect that. We need to be bold. Now isn’t the time for meekness and timidity. That means listening to people and hearing what they want.
Thank you for taking the time. We’re excited for the work we’re going to do together to win this race in the coming months.
In solidarity,
Team Mckayla

Thank you to everyone who has pledged money to fund the #debateforcharity Here are the terms of our collective offer: 1\. The Lt. Governor must accept the debate by 12/20 so that all donations can be collected before Christmas. 2\. The Lt. Governor must agree to participate in a 1 hour 30 minute debate before January 14th, 2022. 3\. Kevin Miller of [KIDO Talk Radio](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODM1MTMzNTI1OTM4OTM2NTQwJmM9bjZqMSZlPTAmYj04MjQyODQ0NzUmZD1hNmIyZDV0.EqEMtYchEwlS6vgdk8Y3S1xEkuanrReI9Qr2jJEEMAs) will moderate the debate. I'm open to adding one more moderator IF the moderator is mutually agreeable to both candidates. We need recommendations for GOOD charities (there are a lot of anti-American activist "charities" today). We would like to have no more than 5 that will benefit law enforcement, veterans, homeless, and pro-life. Each selected organization will receive an equal donation and my team will personally collect the checks to ensure the charities receive the donation before Christmas IF, and only IF, the Lt. Governor agrees to the #debateforcharity

## **We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets,_growth in the size of government_. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.**

It’s time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It’s time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. [Read Full Idaho 1st CCP Policy Summary here.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODM1MTMzNTI1OTM4OTM2NTQwJmM9bjZqMSZlPTAmYj04MjQyODQ0OTAmZD1uOGk4ZTZt.YUDMcPc-qXRjO-fq2PRCDOWPY7IRFzVtQbYa6N4tsSA)

---
Grangeville
I met with the Idaho County Commissioners and several others. Idaho’s 44 counties all have a different character and unique set of problems. But growth is the big one up here. As Governor I promised to VETO any bill that would mandate counties to provide services without realistically addressing how to pay for them.

| NOVEMBER 30
---
Hayden
There’s a movement underway in Idaho. Enough with the professional politicians, it’s our time NOW!

---
| |

| |
---
| DECEMBER 2
---
Lewiston
Did you know Idaho has a seaport? We have the furthest inland seaport on the west coast at the [Port of Lewiston](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODM1MTMzNTI1OTM4OTM2NTQwJmM9bjZqMSZlPTAmYj04MjQyODQ1MjAmZD1xN2Y5bjV6.EB2XrgbpUxYb4nBnEXZJBhw5uy6-zhUg-HZVGJGLN0U). This port is a major artery of our state economy. Idaho’s government needs to be much better in supporting it and create more great jobs.

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Our job as Beto’s team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Beto is counting on us today.
#
Beto’s on the road _right now_ — rallying supporters, helping folks get registered to vote, and sharing his vision for a stronger, united Texas. **As his team, it’s our job to raise the resources to keep Beto on the campaign trail up until Election Day.**
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50350?refcode=ema20211206-165801&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=165801%2E444211%2Eij9oEO)
**[Donate now »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50350?refcode=ema20211206-165801&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=165801%2E444211%2Eij9oEO)**
The resources we raise in these early weeks of the campaign (thanks to generous supporters like you) are laying the groundwork for everything we do. They will determine the size of our campaign staff, the reach of our organizing programs, and **ultimately, whether we’ll be powerful enough to win this election.**
[If you’re able to, will you make your first donation right now? Beto is counting on all of us, and we only have one chance to build this campaign the right way. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50350?refcode=ema20211206-165801&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=165801%2E444211%2Eij9oEO)
The stakes couldn’t be higher. Governor Greg Abbott has failed the people of this state. He’s pitted us against each other with fringe policies on abortions, guns, and mask mandates, when we need to be focused on a bigger vision for Texas — like better jobs, a world-class public education system, and expanded access to health care.

Together, we can restore a bigger, bolder vision for Texas, one with room for all of us. But it’s going to take everyone pitching in whenever we can, and this is an important milestone for our campaign.
[Please, a donation in the first weeks of our campaign will go the longest way. Will you pitch in any amount you can right away to help elect Beto?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50350?refcode=ema20211206-165801&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=165801%2E444211%2Eij9oEO)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50350?refcode=ema20211206-165801&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=165801%2E444211%2Eij9oEO)**
Thank you for being a part of this,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20211206-165801-footer&t=24&refcode2=165801_444211_ij9oEO&akid=165801%2E444211%2Eij9oEO)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=25&akid=165801%2E444211%2Eij9oEO)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=165801%2E444211%2Eij9oEO)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Brent Bozell
subject: How the Media Research Center took down Chris Cuomo
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58950495:6CmbusENx:m:1:3253819041:BD2493033268C03B04EC1A8234665B2F:r)
Peter,

Allow me to break down how the Media Research Center took down Chris Cuomo from CNN.

**The Art Of Taking Down a Leftwing Media Scumbag: A Step By Step Guide**

* **FIRST:** Chris Cuomo used his position as a host on CNN to cover up his brother, New York Governor Andrew Cuomo's, total failures during the pandemic... but that's not the worst part.

Chris Cuomo used his position at CNN to LIE about Gov. Andrew Cuomo's sexual harassment allegations in order to keep him in elected office and save his career.

* **NEXT:** The Media Research Center (MRC) quickly realized Chris Cuomo was abusing his position at CNN to cover up his brother's disgusting actions as governor and as a sexual predator. MRC recorded every hour of Cuomo's coverage and EXPOSED his lies on social media.

Over the past several months, MRC has tracked every move the Cuomo's have made in coordination with each other and mounted a public pressure campaign to hold these men accountable. We have DOZENS OF HOURS of his lies recorded on video, tracked his statements, and it's all documented on our websites.

* **FINALLY:** After MONTHS of demanding answers and pressuring the media to hold Chris Cuomo accountable for his biased and unethical coverage, the network finally FIRED Chris Cuomo from his role at CNN.

[**The Media Research Center is the ONLY conservative organization exposing the Leftwing media 's bias, holding them accountable, and WINNING the fight. Please invest in MRC's efforts by donating $20.22, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount today >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58950495:6CmbusENx:m:1:3253819041:BD2493033268C03B04EC1A8234665B2F:r)

While MRC has successfully shattered the trust the American people have in the media... the media have become more agenda-driven and even more influential.

Fake News machines such as the New York Times, CNN, MSNBC, and NBC are attempting to determine our elections, enact socialism, keep sexual predators in office (such as Andrew Cuomo), and pass legislation.

The Leftwing media has become one of our Republic's greatest threats.

As the Founder and President of the Media Research Center, I have committed my life's work to exposing leftwing bias in the media.

Americans must know the truth about these media outlets.

Cancel culture, Big Tech, and the Leftwing media must be stopped... and the Media Research Center can do it.

FIRSTNAME, my goal is to raise $10,000 to empower the MRC to expose more liars like Chris Cuomo and restore integrity in the media. Please help me reach this goal by using one of the donation links I've copied below:

[**Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58950495:6CmbusENx:m:1:3253819041:BD2493033268C03B04EC1A8234665B2F:r)

Removing Chris Cuomo from CNN is an amazing victory.

However, you and I must realize there are more 'Chris Cuomos' on major networks or serving as editors for online media.

What else are they covering up?

If CNN was willing to help keep Andrew Cuomo in office, a man who is responsible for killing elderly patients in nursing homes and sexually harassing women, what else are they capable of?

This is NOT the time to step off the gas pedal.

MRC is doubling down and determined to expose more liars like Chris Cuomo.

[**Please join us by helping us reach our goal of raising $10,000 before our big deadline. You can click here to donate any amount. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58950495:6CmbusENx:m:1:3253819041:BD2493033268C03B04EC1A8234665B2F:r)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder & President of MRC

**__Hello Peter!**
# **Pearl Harbor Day**
---
On National Pearl Harbor Remembrance Day, we solemnly reflect on the tragic events of December 7, 1941, and honor those who perished defending our Nation.
__
**Thank you, all veterans, for your service!**
My father dropped out of 8th grade to enlist in the Navy.
He taught me to value our military and I intend to continue to do so.
---
**Thank you!**
---
Sincerely,
---
|

|
---
**Dave Giles**
Candidate
United States Congress
Arizona's 9th District

body:
Hey there Patriot \--
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
__
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58950818:JQ5G2sEdN:m:1:3299561967:D02FECBFA52EBDFDBA822B05AFDF6532:r)**
**[No. I Don 't Support Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58950818:JQ5G2sEdN:m:1:3299561967:D02FECBFA52EBDFDBA822B05AFDF6532:r)**
President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58950818:JQ5G2sEdN:m:1:3299561967:D02FECBFA52EBDFDBA822B05AFDF6532:r)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah

name: American Update
subject: Dump Gold, Buy Bitcoin (And This?)
body:
A new class of cryptos is on the rise. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8145%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=h3h8eoZhBgdyjxDXR4xf0Q&sysid=1)
| **Dump Gold, Buy Bitcoin (And This?)** [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19099%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ji89tYOTWWJ60tXDiULCJQ&sysid=1) It’s a controversial call. But former Wall Street VP and hedge fund manager Teeka Tiwari says he “no longer expects gold to adequately protect your wealth against the money printing happening right now.” And for the first time in Palm Beach Research Group history, an editor is telling readers to sell gold... and buy Bitcoin. **[But this is about more than just one coin...](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19090%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GR%2fY1elCUW5HZXozVDAnaQ&sysid=1)** A new class of cryptos is on the rise, Teeka says. Coins he believes could do MUCH better than Bitcoin in the coming months. Even better... **[You can get the name of his next top crypto pick for free! Click here.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19091%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZXxC3QlQ3%2bh4IFhEHl65FQ&sysid=1)**

subject: China can’t be trusted.
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001egmpD2OXvAPcZRmlbWSI07iUYFWIjEfop_0JIKmfJ5FOs615Ohg_ZQ0Q-auexe9WcEPJxOuIH4604ILJSqc87IXur48F4E-E_FbmGAmgHtm2qg9EhCfUYBY18JFhOEioLTOT6jAe8WSV_G-EqNrXMA==&c=B4N-sb-mLn6lthGqCh5T13oztHnVbUaFKeLyfCR3dMI91Bt8RKC7pw==&ch=XPN-Otkdv_BIotBIH4AfoRHiHUsnZqF4eMIKD3w-o9_NzW-mlCTg2Q==)

| Peter,
Joe Biden's energy policies are so harmful to America and to Texas - but helpful to China.
Since Joe Biden has taken office, our domestic energy production has plummeted. From shutting down pipelines, major labor shortages, or making America more dependent on Communist China, China seems to keep on winning.

subject: Thankfulness. Forgiveness. Hope: A Pearl Harbor Remembrance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39416304/319749348/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQ1YWJmYi02NTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wicRPihKpDyBCOqcikKnD7briGxmwf1iQs-sCBSJSho=&emci=a1bffab2-de56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=2b45abfb-6557-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39416305/319749352/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQ1YWJmYi02NTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wicRPihKpDyBCOqcikKnD7briGxmwf1iQs-sCBSJSho=&emci=a1bffab2-de56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=2b45abfb-6557-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Today, Pearl Harbor Day, marks a memorable moment in American history.
For some, it became a call to military service. Others may note that it is when a member of their family began to work in another industry to support the war effort. For others it may mark a time of family turmoil—an internment camp, a move to another country, or the death of a family member.
In the Franken family, my dad joined the war effort as a sailor right after December 7, 1941. He immediately went to his first ship and that began a storied four years of unstated horror, a triumph to live, and ultimately, a marriage to a wonderful woman and a life back in rural northwest Iowa.
Situated between Thanksgiving and Christmas, December 7 was a part of the end-of-year trio in the Franken family—Thanksgiving, Pearl Harbor Day, and then the grand finale, the Christmas Holiday.
Our family routines for Thanksgiving and Christmas were conventional, I’d say. But Pearl Harbor Day was something less tangible. The calendar hanging on the kitchen’s cork board would have the day circled, dad’s scribble on his Word of the Day ‘rip-away calendar,’ and mom would tell a quick, thought-provoking story about what it was like when the nation turned to fight a world war.
In retrospect, the day was about forgiveness. My dad learned over the years to understand that his enemies in 1941 were sailors with families much like himself. And the terrible losses this nation and the world felt were softened with the passage of time.
I like to think that the end of year begins with the reminder of __thankfulness__ expressed at Thanksgiving. Then, a time to __forgive__ and remember those who sacrificed for our nation on Pearl Harbor Day. And we close the year with a Holiday Season of __hopefulness__ represented by Christmas, Hanukkah, and other religious holidays.
These have been a tough few years in America. We know that many issues divide us, both socially and politically. We may not ‘clear the air’ between competing viewpoints, but we ought to try, nonetheless.
Thankfulness, forgiveness, and hope... that’s how I am ending the year.
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

And the terrible losses this nation and the world felt were softened with the passage of time. I like to think that the end of year begins with the reminder of thankfulness expressed at Thanksgiving. Then, a time to forgive and remember those who sacrificed for our nation on Pearl Harbor Day. And we close the year with a Holiday Season of hopefulness represented by Christmas, Hanukkah, and other religious holidays. These have been a tough few years in America. We know that many issues divide us, both socially and politically. We may not ‘clear the air’ between competing viewpoints, but we ought to try, nonetheless. Thankfulness, forgiveness, and hope... that’s how I am ending the year. Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) = Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

Friend,

Our differences are extensive, so I'll separate this by posts we've published on social media this week:

**Engagement vs. Rhetoric**

I'm constantly disappointed in my opponent's divisive rhetoric. Northern Michigan and the U.P. need a unifying leader — not a cynical Tweeter. It's shameful he offers no real solutions.

Jack Bergman's method of governance and constituent engagement is remarkably unproductive. We can't afford another term.

While we work hard to meet with constituents and businesses, develop policy and engage communities, our current Representative is preoccupied with grandstanding on some of the most divisive partisan issues. My opponent is intent on sowing discord. It's time to unelect Jack Bergman and bring dignity and morality back to this office.

**Policy vs. Grandstanding**

Unfortunately, my opponent is one of the most significant obstacles we face in creating a better future for this district. His opposition to certain issues baffles me, like his fight against the Child Tax Credit. Cutting taxes for the country’s largest corporations, but opposing tax credits for working families? Unless Jack answers to someone else other than the great people of this district, it makes no sense. [bit.ly/CTCMI1](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39417215/319752439/1669738591?fbclid=IwAR16uIcJ3d7BWA7SCUi5nhP1A3EF-zpLAzH4m8aOP2I0k9khrt2DjblZhUo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGNlZDg3OS02NjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vuu4DVCufCWiO6TRhgLE0egTbBh7IrvsKk3w66l52ic=&emci=5b36e9f1-5e57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9dced879-6657-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427)

* "F" in [Human Rights](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39417222/319752446/1760218251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGNlZDg3OS02NjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vuu4DVCufCWiO6TRhgLE0egTbBh7IrvsKk3w66l52ic=&emci=5b36e9f1-5e57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9dced879-6657-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427)

This is not a good performance, folks. Here's what we're fighting for:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39417223/319752447/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGNlZDg3OS02NjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vuu4DVCufCWiO6TRhgLE0egTbBh7IrvsKk3w66l52ic=)

**Unity vs. Division**

Northern Michigan and the U.P. need independent, reasonable political solutions that best-fit everyone. Regardless of which side of the aisle solutions originate, partisan hackery will not reunify our communities or country.

I strive to be the district’s voice of reason, and will stay hyperfocused on advancing policies that reflect the best of who we are. For voters across the spectrum, I’m confident our vision is much more representational of our common values and priorities than my divisive opponent.

My opponent often forgets that Northern Michigan and the U.P. have a strong culture of civility among people of all different political backgrounds. Transplant or not, he needs to understand the days of wedging the great people of this district against each other are over.

The reality is — Republicans and Democrats here are friends. We go to church together. Our children play on the same sports teams. We shovel each other out of the snow. I play Euchre and pickleball with my Republican friends.

**Most importantly, there are common-sense political solutions that fit us all. Unfortunately, my opponent isn't interested in them and would rather push partisanship than productive policy.**

I’ve had enough with division and extremism in this country, and we don’t need the incumbent to continue exacerbating the divide. I intend to reunite us and serve with dignity.

**Democracy vs. Power**

It's shameful my opponent stood against honoring the will of the people and threatened our democracy on three separate occasions. Because of his allegiances, he still can't say the U.S. held a legitimate election.

This campaign prides itself on representing and engaging with Northern Michiganders and Yoopers of all political affiliations.

We have a vision for the future, and people oppose the divisive politicking of Jack Bergman. We see the world in dramatically different lights. I strive to be a statesman who celebrates the things we can achieve together. I will vote with any party when it is good for the District, State, or Nation. I won’t vote against a bill just to keep a party in the majority. That is plain wrong.

It's time for a change.
|
---
**If you agree with me, if you want to join us in our fight for universal healthcare, education, environmental conservation, and thriving economy, please make a contribution to my campaign so we can win back a better day for Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. I'm reviewing my opponent's voting report cards — "F" in "F" in "F" in "F" in "F" in "F" in "F" in This is not a good performance, folks. Here's what we're fighting for: = Unity vs. Division Northern Michigan and the U.P. need independent, reasonable political solutions that best-fit everyone. Regardless of which side of the aisle solutions originate, partisan hackery will not reunify our communities or country. I strive to be the district’s voice of reason, and will stay hyperfocused on advancing policies that reflect the best of who we are. For voters across the spectrum, I’m confident our vision is much more representational of our common values and priorities than my divisive opponent. My opponent often forgets that Northern Michigan and the U.P. have a strong culture of civility among people of all different political backgrounds. Transplant or not, he needs to understand the days of wedging the great people of this district against each other are over. The reality is — Republicans and Democrats here are friends. We go to church together. Our children play on the same sports teams. We shovel each other out of the snow. I play Euchre and pickleball with my Republican friends. Most importantly, there are common-sense political solutions that fit us all. Unfortunately, my opponent isn't interested in them and would rather push partisanship than productive policy. I’ve had enough with division and extremism in this country, and we don’t need the incumbent to continue exacerbating the divide. I intend to reunite us and serve with dignity. Democracy vs. Power It's shameful my opponent stood against honoring the will of the people and threatened our democracy on three separate occasions. Because of his allegiances, he still can't say the U.S. held a legitimate election. This campaign prides itself on representing and engaging with Northern Michiganders and Yoopers of all political affiliations. We have a vision for the future, and people oppose the divisive politicking of Jack Bergman. We see the world in dramatically different lights. I strive to be a statesman who celebrates the things we can achieve together. I will vote with any party when it is good for the District, State, or Nation. I won’t vote against a bill just to keep a party in the majority. That is plain wrong. It's time for a change. | If you agree with me, if you want to join us in our fight for universal healthcare, education, environmental conservation, and thriving economy, please make a contribution to my campaign so we can win back a better day for Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. We are in dire need of better representation. ** = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = If you believe you received this message in error, please . PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER FRIENDS OF DR. BOB POX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States

name: Gabby Seay
subject: Not even Trump is above the law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| |
---
Hi, Peter, I just wanted to follow up to make sure you saw the email Letitia sent yesterday.
I _really_ don't want you to miss seeing this incredible record of her historic achievements: Time and time again, Letitia has used her office to lift up the vulnerable and the voiceless against powerful and wealthy interests – because _nobody is above the law_. Not even Donald Trump (though he may believe otherwise).
Protecting working New Yorkers is exactly what she'll continue to do as our next governor – and that's why I am so excited to be her campaign manager.

Letitia is determined to keep protecting the rights of _all of us_ , and this fight is just getting started. **Unfortunately, we're still $981 short of tonight’s $10,000 goal, and it's crucial we make up that shortfall by midnight to continue our fight on behalf of New Yorkers everywhere. **
**Please, will you make a donation right now so that Letitia can create the change that New York truly needs?**

**Here's the best link to give: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/letitia-james-email-1](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39417528/319753383/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk233-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZmYTRhZS02NjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HEVBHEHdu29VnuUS6aeQwnqenq8npiCjWbTv4XWnhNw=)**

Thanks so much for being in this fight with us.
Gabby Seay
Campaign Manager
Team James
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia**
Date: Sat, Dec 4, 2021
Subject: I've sued Trump 76 times.
| | |
---
Peter,

No matter what, I will _always_ stand up to the powerful on behalf of the vulnerable. That's exactly what I did when I was elected the first Black female attorney general of New York. And that's what I'll do if elected governor of the great state of New York.
But I can't do it without your help.******We've set an ambitious but crucial $10,000 fundraising goal to keep up the fight in my campaign, but we're still falling drastically short of where we need to be by midnight tomorrow.**[**Please, can you spare $5, $10, anything you can right now to keep this fight going? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39417533/319753395/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk233-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZmYTRhZS02NjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HEVBHEHdu29VnuUS6aeQwnqenq8npiCjWbTv4XWnhNw=)

I firmly believe that _no one_ – no matter how wealthy or powerful – is above the law. Not social media monopolies, not Big Pharma, not the gun lobby, not Donald Trump. And I've fought to defend the rights of everyday Americans against these interests time and time again:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39417538/319753400/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk233-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZmYTRhZS02NjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HEVBHEHdu29VnuUS6aeQwnqenq8npiCjWbTv4XWnhNw=) (But who's counting?). I sued him every time he trampled on the rights of New Yorkers and Americans across the country. I fought against his malicious, bigoted administration to protect women, immigrants, people of color, members of the LGBTQ+ community, workers, and countless others from his attacks. I even brought cases against Trump personally, with an investigation of the Trump Organization which led to a criminal indictment. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39417542/319753404/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk233-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZmYTRhZS02NjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HEVBHEHdu29VnuUS6aeQwnqenq8npiCjWbTv4XWnhNw=) I found and revealed the devastating undercounting of COVID-19 deaths in New York nursing homes, and I fought to ensure the health and safety that every single New Yorker deserves. I called on the state to report the additional deaths, improve infection control, and boost staffing – because all New Yorkers deserve to live and work in safe environments. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39417546/319753409/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk233-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZmYTRhZS02NjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HEVBHEHdu29VnuUS6aeQwnqenq8npiCjWbTv4XWnhNw=) I didn’t let these prominent social media companies get away with crushing smaller rivals at the expense of everyday users. By taking action, I stood up for millions of consumers and small businesses who were hurt by these companies' illegal behavior. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39417550/319753413/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk233-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZmYTRhZS02NjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HEVBHEHdu29VnuUS6aeQwnqenq8npiCjWbTv4XWnhNw=) By filing the nation's most comprehensive lawsuit against opioid manufacturers and distributors, I was able to deliver up to $1.5 billion to New York communities that have been ravaged by this devastating opioid epidemic. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39417554/319753417/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk233-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZmYTRhZS02NjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HEVBHEHdu29VnuUS6aeQwnqenq8npiCjWbTv4XWnhNw=) I pushed for transparency and accountability in an organization that uses its donors as a breeding ground for personal gain – all while putting their profits over the lives of our children – and we emerged victorious over their fraudulent attempt to declare bankruptcy.
I don't just _believe_ that no one is above the law – I use my office to _act_ on it, and I have for years. And as governor, I will remain committed to holding those who abuse their authority accountable, no matter how powerful.

**But we have a long fight ahead of us, Peter, and I'm only just getting started. With you by my side, I know we can win this together.****[So please, before midnight tomorrow night, will you make a $5 donation to help us reach our $10,000 goal and move our state forward with real, transformative change for every last New Yorker? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39417557/319753421/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk233-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZmYTRhZS02NjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HEVBHEHdu29VnuUS6aeQwnqenq8npiCjWbTv4XWnhNw=)**

I can't thank you enough for your support.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39417560/319753424/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk233-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZmYTRhZS02NjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HEVBHEHdu29VnuUS6aeQwnqenq8npiCjWbTv4XWnhNw=)
Letitia James
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2ebd3d55-4854-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/87ffa4ae-6657-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZmYTRhZS02NjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HEVBHEHdu29VnuUS6aeQwnqenq8npiCjWbTv4XWnhNw=&id=128810098) James for NY

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Seeks to Depose Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot about Her Racist Interview Policy
body:
Judicial Watch announced that it filed a motion for court authorization to depose Mayor Lori Lightfoot in the currently pending civil rights lawsuit on behalf of Thomas Catenacci and the Daily Caller News Foundation regarding her policy of only granting interviews to “journalists of color.”

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 6, 2021
---|---|---

The new government figures show a scary trend among migrants entering the country through the famously porous southern border. In October alone, the first month of fiscal year 2022, the Border Patrol’s Del Rio Sector in Texas reported 28,111 illegal aliens from more than 50 countries. They include Syria, Lebanon, Eritrea, Uzbekistan, and Tajikistan, a central Asian nation that borders Afghanistan, which is controlled by the Taliban after the abrupt exit of U.S. troops earlier this year. | | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57319&L=26399&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtaW52ZXN0aWdhdGlvbi15ZXMtdmlyZ2luaWEtY3JpdGljYWwtcmFjZS10aGVvcnktaXMtaW4teW91ci1zY2hvb2xzLWFuZC1pbi1zY2hvb2xzLWFjcm9zcy1hbWVyaWNhLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) | **[Judicial Watch Investigation: Yes, Virginia, Critical Race Theory is in Your Schools—and in Schools Across America](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57319&L=26399&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanVkaWNpYWwtd2F0Y2gtaW52ZXN0aWdhdGlvbi15ZXMtdmlyZ2luaWEtY3JpdGljYWwtcmFjZS10aGVvcnktaXMtaW4teW91ci1zY2hvb2xzLWFuZC1pbi1zY2hvb2xzLWFjcm9zcy1hbWVyaWNhLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)** As parental concern mounted over racial indoctrination in local schools during the recent Virginia gubernatorial race, a mantra emerged from the Democrat camp and the media: Critical Race Theory had “never been taught” in Virginia schools. That’s from then-Democratic candidate Terry McAuliffe, who in case anyone missed the point, added that the concerns about CRT were nothing but a “racist dog whistle.” The media agreed. Critical Race Theory is “not part of classroom teaching in Virginia,” reported the New York Times. Axios managing editor Margaret Talev said on CNN’s “Inside Politics, “let’s just say for the record in case anyone doesn’t know, they don’t teach Critical Race Theory to kids in kids’ K-12 schools. That’s not a thing anywhere in the country, including Virginia.” The claim was repeated elsewhere on CNN. It was dogma over at MSNBC. clean_body: Judicial Watch announced that it filed a motion for court authorization to depose Mayor Lori Lightfoot in the currently pending civil rights lawsuit on behalf of Thomas Catenacci and the Daily Caller News Foundation regarding her policy of only granting interviews to “journalists of color.” | | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 6, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == “Testimony in this lawsuit confirms Mayor Lightfoot is responsible for her racist interview policy and is therefore a necessary witness in this civil rights lawsuit,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. == ---|--- | | | | = | = The crisis along the Mexican border continues full throttle in the new fiscal year with one Border Patrol sector encountering tens of thousands of illegal immigrants from dozens of countries—including Africa and the Middle East—in the first month. The new government figures show a scary trend among migrants entering the country through the famously porous southern border. In October alone, the first month of fiscal year 2022, the Border Patrol’s Del Rio Sector in Texas reported 28,111 illegal aliens from more than 50 countries. They include Syria, Lebanon, Eritrea, Uzbekistan, and Tajikistan, a central Asian nation that borders Afghanistan, which is controlled by the Taliban after the abrupt exit of U.S. troops earlier this year. = ---|--- | | | | = | = As parental concern mounted over racial indoctrination in local schools during the recent Virginia gubernatorial race, a mantra emerged from the Democrat camp and the media: Critical Race Theory had “never been taught” in Virginia schools. That’s from then-Democratic candidate Terry McAuliffe, who in case anyone missed the point, added that the concerns about CRT were nothing but a “racist dog whistle.” The media agreed. Critical Race Theory is “not part of classroom teaching in Virginia,” reported the New York Times. Axios managing editor Margaret Talev said on CNN’s “Inside Politics, “let’s just say for the record in case anyone doesn’t know, they don’t teach Critical Race Theory to kids in kids’ K-12 schools. That’s not a thing anywhere in the country, including Virginia.” The claim was repeated elsewhere on CNN. It was dogma over at MSNBC. = ---|--- | | | | == | == Judicial Watch announced that it filed an amicus curiae brief with the Supreme Court in favor of overturning Roe v. Wade. The brief was filed in the Dobbs case, being argued today before the Supreme Court. The Judicial Watch brief, filed in support of the constitutionality of Mississippi’s Gestational Age Act, argues that states have the right under the Constitution to regulate abortion and protect unborn life. == ---|--- | | | == National Review The trial commenced this week in Crest v. Padilla, a lawsuit filed by Judicial Watch to enjoin California from requiring that publicly held corporations headquartered in California include at least one director who “self-identifies” as a woman. Pursuant to California’s SB 826, by the end of 2021, up to three self-identified women will be required, depending on the size of the board. == The Daily Caller The Foundation is an influence-peddling scheme, and the Clintons’ influence has waned. Even Obama understood the scheme. When President Obama nominated Hillary Clinton in 2009 to serve as secretary of state, she agreed to a strict memorandum of understanding to wall off the Foundation from conflicts of interest with the State Department. As Judicial Watch uncovered, the Clinton team immediately violated this agreement by using the Clinton State Department to help Clinton Foundation donors. Fox News Judicial Watch, a conservative free speech activist group, filed a federal civil rights lawsuit Monday in U.S. District Court in Massachusetts on MacRae's behalf. It is seeking unspecified compensatory and punitive damages, as well as payment for legal fees, from Hanover High School Principal Matthew Mattos and Hanover Public Schools Superintendent Matthew A. Ferron. = = = = = = | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

name: Roger Misso
subject: BREAKING: Sheet Metal Workers, VoteVets, and With Honor join Taking the Hill on WEDNESDAY EVENING in DC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/8F0NswKJwUDC3TfjNflu0P6j1mF9SuQeLMuBT9ituwA=/tmw1GdhRLClJ3Dw4zCEURYy4o_ganWsYFkqTM2zSFUw=)

Peter,

We've got some exciting news to share: the Sheet Metal, Air, Rail, and Transportation Workers (SMART) union, VoteVets, With Honor, and Rep. Elaine Luria will be joining us for our big [_**pre-Army/Navy Game rally and fundraiser on Capitol Hill**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8F0NswKJwUDC3TfjNflu0P6j1mF9SuQeLMuBT9ituwA=/tmw1GdhRLClJ3Dw4zCEURYy4o_ganWsYFkqTM2zSFUw=) this Wednesday! That's on top of our already star-studded lineup of Senator Patty Murray, Reps. Tim Ryan, Jimmy Panetta, and Mike Thompson, and many more veteran leaders in Washington.

We are so proud to stand in solidarity with our labor and veteran brothers and sisters, and [_**we want you to share in the evening with us**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8F0NswKJwUDC3TfjNflu0P6j1mF9SuQeLMuBT9ituwA=/tmw1GdhRLClJ3Dw4zCEURYy4o_ganWsYFkqTM2zSFUw=). If you'll be in the DC area this Wednesday evening, [_**please join us by RSVPing for your ticket today at this link.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8F0NswKJwUDC3TfjNflu0P6j1mF9SuQeLMuBT9ituwA=/tmw1GdhRLClJ3Dw4zCEURYy4o_ganWsYFkqTM2zSFUw=)

Even if you can't be there, we want to show our partners the power of supporters like you willing to stand up for a Congress of courage and integrity. body:

---
Peter, For weeks now, the Democrats have been swearing up and down that their Build Back Broke spending plan will cost taxpayers zero dollars. _But the numbers are in, and the Congressional Budget Office found that this bill will add $367 billion to the deficit and bury future generations in debt._ But it gets even worse. Build Back Broke will also:
* Give billions of dollars to the IRS to hire new agents to target middle-income families with audits.
* End the Hyde Amendment which will open the door to taxpayer funding for abortions.
* Raise taxes on small businesses by $400 million.

There’s no other way to put it. This legislation is an ABOMINATION. And we must do everything in our power to stop it! [**That’s why I hope you’ll chip in $7, $10, $25, $50 or whatever you can to help me FIGHT BACK.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f7d5e7035fbd992a/878a163b63db6a5dc3d6b838967d376c/34143)

Fellow Conservative,

The Democrats are terrified.

19 House Democrats are not seeking re-election. Not just in swing states, even their Leadership members are retiring! **They. Are. Afraid.**

They know Biden has set this country on the wrong path. They know their socialist agenda is deeply unpopular. They know a Red Wave is coming.
[**TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30r5x-1o5rr-4qqlpo2/)
House Republicans are targeting 70 Democrat held seats.

We are going to take back the largest House Majority in a decade.

This is a pivotal moment in history Fellow Conservative. But we have a problem.

We need emergency funds to secure those 70 target seats! We need to build campaign infrastructure, hire field organizers, fund advertising efforts and build the machinery that will bring us victory in November 2022.

[**Without you, the Red Wave dies.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30r5x-1o5rs-4qqlpo3/)

That’s why we’re reaching out to my list of TOP GOP patriots. Can I count on you to rush $25 in the next 25 minutes and we Fire Pelosi and take back Trump’s Majority and Put our country back on the right track!

Onwards to Victory!
Kevin McCarthy,

**A Note from Kevin:**

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30r5x-1o5rv-4qqlpo6/)
As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. name: Diehl for Massachusetts
subject: Remembering Pearl Harbor
body:
December 7, 1941
| | | |
---
---
---
|
---
Eighty years ago on this day, 2,390 people lost their lives in the attack at Pearl Harbor. In propelling the United States into World War II, this day forever changed the course of human history.
I give my sincere thanks to all of the brave men and women who sacrificed so much, and through their service, defended freedom for themselves and for future generations. They are, and will always be, the Greatest Generation.
"Never in the field of human conflict was so much owed by so many to so few." ~Winston Churchill

---
---
|
---
|
---
### Geoff Diehl attends Pearl Harbor Remembrance Ceremony in his hometown of Whitman, MA.

Friend, When I was on the U.S. National Speed Skating team, we had a code of ethics. We were representing America on the international stage, and that came with high standards. We were expected to be honest and fair. We were not to discriminate or harass. I strive to run my campaign on those same values, and I believe that our elected officials should, too. **But my opponent, Rep. Elise Stefanik, runs a campaign based on lies and harassment.** Her lies are so egregious, that Harvard kicked her off their advisory board for spreading misinformation about the 2020 presidential election. Lately, she’s taken to childish taunts, name-calling, and harassing voters and elected officials online. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39426426/319784573/-1207607143?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211207duckresend_full_bf_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmYxZTIxYS03MzU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kvvv8RaWJUvKyRuX3kbfOnhOZ--8eWqxIJj8zJ3mbUM=)

The North Country deserves so much better. So here is my commitment to you: _I will be honest, and fair. I will not discriminate, nor harass. I will be firm in my beliefs and hold people accountable for their actions. And I will treat the office and the public with dignity and respect befitting a U.S. Representative._
Sincerely,
Bridie
[**P.S. If you can pitch in to my campaign to replace Elise Stefanik and restore dignity to our district, any amount helps!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39426427/319784575/-1207607143?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211207duckresend_full_bf_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmYxZTIxYS03MzU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kvvv8RaWJUvKyRuX3kbfOnhOZ--8eWqxIJj8zJ3mbUM=)

| | Dear Peter, Tomorrow is a very special event - our FIRST Zoom fundraiser of the entire campaign. The event will be on Zoom tomorrow, December 8th, from 6:00 to 7:30 PM CT. We will be joined by a special guest, former Congressional Candidate and CIA officer Valerie Plame. Valerie served for most of her career in the CIA and she knows how important it is to have people with strong national security backgrounds in Congress. We also have an extrodinary host committee. Mary Lang Sollinger, Jim Hill, Dave and Janet Jenkins, Dana Wachs, Caren and Michael Whalen, Judy Ziewacz, and Roger Ervin will all be part of the party. [**RSVP to join us on December 8th on Zoom from 6:00 to 7:30 PM.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39426441/319784634/-1266867128?refcode=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2YxZTIxYS03MzU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WYgN_hLu_34yJOVQBGPakQ4cIMpK4b56T_fSYPxwXZQ=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39426442/319784635/-1266867128?refcode=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2YxZTIxYS03MzU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WYgN_hLu_34yJOVQBGPakQ4cIMpK4b56T_fSYPxwXZQ=) Thank you so much for your support, and we hope to see you there! Team McGrath

clean_body: Please join Valerie Plame, Mary Lang Sollinger, and our host committee for this special event | | Dear Peter, Tomorrow is a very special event - our FIRST Zoom fundraiser of the entire campaign. The event will be on Zoom tomorrow, December 8th, from 6:00 to 7:30 PM CT. We will be joined by a special guest, former Congressional Candidate and CIA officer Valerie Plame. Valerie served for most of her career in the CIA and she knows how important it is to have people with strong national security backgrounds in Congress. We also have an extrodinary host committee. Mary Lang Sollinger, Jim Hill, Dave and Janet Jenkins, Dana Wachs, Caren and Michael Whalen, Judy Ziewacz, and Roger Ervin will all be part of the party. = = Thank you so much for your support, and we hope to see you there! subject: The “most vulnerable senator in America”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5125ee48a2f397d2/4a0b7bb9327ffd7bc3d6b838967d376c/37793)

# **Friend — Raphael Warnock calls himself “the most vulnerable senator in America,” and it’s easy to see why. **

---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5125ee48a2f397d2/f6f8739c9d957068c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
|
---
When you’re this out of touch, people want new leadership: ❌ Voted _against_ defunding Joe Biden’s unlawful vaccine mandates.

❌ Said not a word while Afghanistan collapsed.

❌ Refuses to call out Biden’s plan to give illegal immigrants $450,000 checks.

❌ Fully supports Biden’s regressive spending bill — which would give tax breaks to millionaires in California and New York, and let the IRS spy on your bank account.

❌ Cost Georgia the All-Star Game with his dishonesty about our election law. Warnock is the “most vulnerable senator in America” because he’s the most inactive, ineffective, and out of touch senator in America. [**Do you agree? Let me know here if you’re ready to FIRE Raphael Warnock and take back the U.S. Senate majority in 2022.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5125ee48a2f397d2/cf1c978c5e3ac995c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5125ee48a2f397d2/e1622fcb55f54133c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[ **DEFEAT WARNOCK: SIGN MY NAME »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/5125ee48a2f397d2/f755db40726c539bc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | _**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---

**Victoria Virasingh is a native Arlingtonian who grew up understanding the value of hard work and dedication. Like so many first-generation Americans, she learned this through the struggle and sacrifice of her parents. These same virtues helped her obtain a full-ride scholarship to Stanford and have a successful career in the tech industry.** **However, these accomplishments did not change the challenge faced by Victoria and shared by fellow Virginians: affordable rent, effective environmental policy, unaffordable healthcare, and no workforce protections.** **That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th -- to expand opportunities to the overlooked and underappreciated. We need new leadership for the new economy, we need a voice for real change now. Victoria is that voice for Virginia. She is a fearless progressive champion fighting to improve the lives of Virginians and Americans everywhere.** **[__Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >>__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39427720/319791510/267147644?refcode=211207_CLTV_woaday2-aapi-email_BIO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmU0YzEwNi03NzU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PAZ0FoqoQ5QcNdYCMIgCBjYu59AhQa0RHy1WItOeoPY=)** **______[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39427721/319791512/686715116?refcode=211207_CLTV_woaday2-aapi-email_BIO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmU0YzEwNi03NzU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PAZ0FoqoQ5QcNdYCMIgCBjYu59AhQa0RHy1WItOeoPY=)**

name: Team Turner
subject: Wish Nina Turner a happy birthday!🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
We’re incredibly proud of the work she does to advance the progressive movement.
#

**_Today is Nina Turner’s birthday!_**
We are incredibly proud of the work she leads on the ground to advance the progressive movement forward, and we’re honored to be in this righteous fight for justice with her.

Nina Turner has the courage to ask for more and she will never stop fighting for the poor, the working poor, the barely middle class and justice in all of its forms.

So let’s take a moment to thank Nina Turner for her tireless efforts and for inspiring so many of us to be engaged and committed to this movement.

body:
I need you to hear the most important details as this case rapidly evolves:
| | |
---
**LIVE POLL: AWAITING RESPONSE FROM dpwillis67@gmail.com**
**Do you believe that Donald Trump and his associates should be held accountable for their misdeeds?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39428290/319795019/2072693167?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1829-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDgyZDEyNC03ODU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LluxoCC-pFRgg3173U4Opm3MB31TpQ3p4uXCud0BHF0=&emci=6f5fdfaf-b153-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=dd82d124-7857-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=20244100)

---
|
---
Friend, the bipartisan investigation into the Jan. 6 riot is uncovering new evidence against Donald Trump every day, **and I need you to hear the most important details as this case rapidly evolves:**
In his final days in power, Donald Trump repeatedly tried to pressure the Department of Justice into overturning the Georgia election results, and he even asked his advisors about **sending the military to the states he lost** in an attempt to stay in power.
These plans didn't come to fruition. Instead, his son's girlfriend raised $3 MILLION for the Jan. 6 rally, where Trump told a group of agitated protesters that, **"If you don't fight like hell, you're not going to have a country anymore." **
We all know what happened next, friend. I'll never forget the moment that Trump supporters stormed the U.S. Capitol and fought their way through Capitol police officers. **I was in the House gallery, ducking for cover and fearing for my life.**
This is America, friend, and in this country, we abide by peaceful transitions of power – no matter who wins. No one is above the law, which is exactly what I said when I managed Trump's first impeachment trial. **But some far-right Republicans, including Marco Rubio, are trying to let Trump off the hook.**
**Trump loyalists like Rubio want you to forget that Trump nearly destroyed our democracy. They want you to forget that Trump bribed a foreign official, pressuring him to interfere in the 2020 election.** And, they want you to let Trump run for president all over again. **I won't let that happen, friend, but I can't overcome Trumpism alone, so I have to ask you:**
**Do you believe that Donald Trump and his associates should be held accountable for their misdeeds?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39428297/319795026/2072693167?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1829-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDgyZDEyNC03ODU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LluxoCC-pFRgg3173U4Opm3MB31TpQ3p4uXCud0BHF0=&emci=6f5fdfaf-b153-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=dd82d124-7857-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=20244100)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39428301/319795031/2072693167?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1829-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDgyZDEyNC03ODU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LluxoCC-pFRgg3173U4Opm3MB31TpQ3p4uXCud0BHF0=&emci=6f5fdfaf-b153-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=dd82d124-7857-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=20244100)
---
Thank you for helping me bring Trump to justice. Together, I know we have the power to protect our democracy.

Val Demings
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39428305/319795035/-144803992?code=jtk1829-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDgyZDEyNC03ODU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LluxoCC-pFRgg3173U4Opm3MB31TpQ3p4uXCud0BHF0=&emci=6f5fdfaf-b153-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=dd82d124-7857-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=20244100), or click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/6f5fdfaf-b153-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/dd82d124-7857-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDgyZDEyNC03ODU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LluxoCC-pFRgg3173U4Opm3MB31TpQ3p4uXCud0BHF0=&id=123159867). name: Jim Jordan
subject: Closing out the books on 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58955469:Jl7cHsElN:m:1:3298722022:F8DA7F2E621DDD740A5793D693BC565D:r)
---

Peter,

Before we ask you to **[make a contribution of $3 or more today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58955469:Jl7cHsElN:m:1:3298722022:F8DA7F2E621DDD740A5793D693BC565D:r)** , we want you to know just how incredibly thankful we are that you're a part of our team. You're invaluable.

Conservatives like you donate to campaigns like ours for many different reasons. Perhaps it's the candidates themselves you like. Or maybe you really dislike the member of Congress who represents you, so you give to their opponent. Whatever the reason, more than 194,000 conservatives have made a contribution to our campaign to take back the House this year.

**All I can say is that your support humbles me**. ** **

Having said that, we've not yet met our goal for the year. **With just one month left before we close out the books on 2021, we 're still in need of finding 6,000 additional donations to meet our yearly goal of 200,000 contributions!**

If you've donated this year already, thank you.**[Would you consider matching your previous donation](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58955469:Jl7cHsElN:m:1:3298722022:F8DA7F2E621DDD740A5793D693BC565D:r)** once more before the end of the month (**tonight at midnight**)?

Maybe you've read our emails without having ever made a contribution, so for those of you in that boat I want to share some quick donation statistics:

_**The average donation to our operation is $29.75**_**
_The average donor donates 3.55 times over the course of time_
_On average, the time between donations is 244 days!_**

If every single person who opened this email today were to make a contribution of**[even just $1](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58955469:Jl7cHsElN:m:1:3298722022:F8DA7F2E621DDD740A5793D693BC565D:r)** , we'd hit our yearly donor goal by this evening. On average, about 60,000 individuals read our emails, so you might see how that would add up quickly!

We're humbly asking for you to help us hit our 2021 goal of 200,000 contributions by making a gift today. Time is running short. **[Are you able to make your gift right now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58955469:Jl7cHsElN:m:1:3298722022:F8DA7F2E621DDD740A5793D693BC565D:r)**?

clean_body: | Peter, Before we ask you to , we want you to know just how incredibly thankful we are that you're a part of our team. You're invaluable. Conservatives like you donate to campaigns like ours for many different reasons. Perhaps it's the candidates themselves you like. Or maybe you really dislike the member of Congress who represents you, so you give to their opponent. Whatever the reason, more than 194,000 conservatives have made a contribution to our campaign to take back the House this year. All I can say is that your support humbles me. Having said that, we've not yet met our goal for the year. With just one month left before we close out the books on 2021, we 're still in need of finding 6,000 additional donations to meet our yearly goal of 200,000 contributions! If you've donated this year already, thank you. once more before the end of the month (tonight at midnight)? Maybe you've read our emails without having ever made a contribution, so for those of you in that boat I want to share some quick donation statistics: The average donation to our operation is $29.75 The average donor donates 3.55 times over the course of time On average, the time between donations is 244 days! If every single person who opened this email today were to make a contribution of , we'd hit our yearly donor goal by this evening. On average, about 60,000 individuals read our emails, so you might see how that would add up quickly! We're humbly asking for you to help us hit our 2021 goal of 200,000 contributions by making a gift today. Time is running short. ? Hey friends — One of the really unsexy things about running for Congress is ... *dun* *dun* *dunnn* ... **call time.** As you may know, all campaigns rely on a combination of grassroots support (that’s you!) and “call time,” which is where a candidate calls through a list of reliable Democratic donors and asks them to contribute. And those two things make up the bulk of our fundraising sources, since Eddie won’t accept a dime of the corporate PAC money that is the bread and butter of our corrupt opponent. | [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39429107/319798790/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211207freeeddie_EGweb_main_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWQ4MWZlZC03YTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ln0M3MMENft3gohJSW-DElAg0xKdGCGPge-u7Fi5J3k=)

Unfortunately, fundraising has been tough the last few weeks, and we’re hitting a wall financially. Which means we have to force poor Eddie to spend endless hours locked in a windowless room with only a landline, a list of phone numbers, and fundraising goals that he _must_ hit before we let him out.
**What Eddie wants, more than anything, is to spend more time with people out in the community (safely and with proper COVID-19 protocols!).** But we also absolutely have to raise cash to be able to take on Scott Franklin’s dark money machine and flip this seat for Democrats.
[**And that’s where you come in—will you chip in to help Eddie spend less time dialing for dollars and more time out in the community? We need to raise $2,000 from grassroots donations by the middle of the month to keep pace with our opponent, and any amount goes a long way!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39429108/319798791/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211207freeeddie_EGweb_main_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWQ4MWZlZC03YTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ln0M3MMENft3gohJSW-DElAg0xKdGCGPge-u7Fi5J3k=)

This is urgent, team. **Mike Pence is returning to New Hampshire TOMORROW** to raise money for far-right Republicans and rally the GOP's extreme base. The last time Pence was here, he said, **"we are on the verge of another great Republican comeback...and we are going to [win back the Senate] in 2022,"** and this time will be no different. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip ONE seat to take back the majority, and national Republicans, like Pence, are making it clear New Hampshire is their top priority. My last race was the closest in the country, so my team is laser-focused on keeping our fundraising numbers up. But right now, we’re falling short. **That's why we're setting an emergency goal to raise $25,000 before Mike Pence steps on stage.** **[Can I count on you to rush $5 before midnight tonight?
