Hey there,

I'm Zach -- I'm reaching out to introduce myself as Kara Hahn's Finance Director; during this pivotal time as we work to close out 2021. **With the Federal Election Commission's (FEC) final fundraising quarter of 2021 already 2/3rds of the way through, I don't want anything to be left unsaid.**

I'm sorry to hit the alarm button right off the bat, but it's my job to raise the campaign's budget, and I need to do everything I can to keep us on track to reach our goals. **Right now, we're _way_ behind, sitting firmly $25,202.24 away from our quarterly goal.**

That's not an easy gap to close, and I'd be lying if I said I wasn't worried. But Kara and Kelley have urged me to trust this team when things are tough -- because you always come through for us.

name: THANK YOU ERIC HOLDER (via DCCC)
subject: Eric Holder just put Republicans on notice:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **[Did you see this?! President Obama's attorney general, Eric Holder, is leading the fight to stop Republicans across the country from gerrymandering their way back into power and protect our democracy from their clutches. But the GOP needs to flip just FIVE seats to take back the House Majority to push their anti-democratic agenda on the American people, so we can't afford to have ANYONE sitting on the sidelines. Will you stand with pro-democracy Democrats like Attorney General Holder and rush in $3 before midnight to PROTECT our House Democrats and DEFEAT anti-voting rights House Republicans across the country? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

**We need to move NOW.**

**FIRST:**

As President Obama's attorney General, Eric Holder spent **YEARS** defending voting rights and our democracy from Republican attacks.

**THEN:**

He jumped into action to stop Republicans from gerrymandering their way back into power -- _and called out their**GUT-WRENCHING** attacks on our democracy:_

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)

**NOW:**

**[We're calling for an overwhelming wave of support from grassroots Democrats all across the country -- including 60 from your state \-- to join Attorney General Holder in the fight to defend our democracy. Can we count on you to protect our House Democrats and stop these Republican schemes from destroying our Majority?](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-w~)

---

**We need you to understand:** Republicans are DEAD SET on attacking our right to vote -- _all to AVENGE Donald Trump and rig the system in their favor._

And leaders like Attorney General Holder are fighting with everything they have to STOP Republicans from gerrymandering their way into power and PROTECT our democracy.

But our Democrats can't win this fight on their own. They need **INCREDIBLE** grassroots Democrats like you by their side every step of the way.

**[So we're asking you directly: Will you rush in $3 to defend our House Majority and defeat Trump's anti-democracy House Republicans?](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

This Socialist Spending Spree is ABSURD
&nbs; p;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?30uc4--fgxr-4qqlpo6&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

I spoke for 8 HOURS & 32 MIN to try and stop a 1.8 trillion dollar socialist spending bill.

I am doing EVERYTHING I can to stop Pelosi & Biden. My 8.5 hour speech is the longest speech ever given on the House floor.

But it wasn’t enough. Pelosi holds too much power.
[**FIRE PELOSI**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30uc4-1oa9n-4qqlpo6/)
If you’re frustrated with our current circumstances, believe me, Fellow Conservative, I am too. I’m livid.

The only way our situation gets better is to Fire Pelosi & take back the House! I will do whatever it takes to accomplish this goal. And %%First Name%%, I can’t do this without you.
[**FIRE PELOSI**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30uc4-1oa9o-4qqlpo7/)
So I am coming to you, hat in hand, and humbly asking, no I am PLEADING WITH YOU: [**will you chip in $8.32 and help me Fire Pelosi & take back the House?**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30uc4-1oa9p-4qqlpo8/) I will personally match every dollar you give. We CANNOT let them keep getting away with this.

Thank you for your support,
[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30uc4-1oa9q-4qqlpo9/)
Kevin McCarthy

**A Note from Kevin:**

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30uc4-1oa9r-4qqlpo0/)
As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I’m incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I’m doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left’s political games. If you’d like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- [**EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30uc4-1oa9s-4qqlpo1/)

The fight is far from over, and we’re only getting started.

Kevin McCarthy

Hey friend, Yesterday, I had the honor and privilege to spend a beautiful Sunday afternoon with friends, family, and community members at my campaign kick-off party. To say that I felt the immense support from everyone is an understatement. You have all shown me that if you come through for the community, your community comes through for you. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39436856/319840686/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211207postevent_MO_full_SLA_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDMxNjZhMS05ZjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7TQAePH3-p68iSrfzHev5QaawT8TQxgX90kVqDncK2g=)

name: Dick Durbin
subject: We can’t afford to lose Tammy Duckworth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Let me take a minute to tell you about why we need Tammy Duckworth in the Senate.
#
Peter:
**[I’m reaching out today to ask you to make a contribution, of any amount you can afford, to reelect Tammy Duckworth in 2022.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39436914/319840996/-877618105?refcode=dd_em_211207_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTU0NDAyNy1hMDU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NvtM7aamh3TK6Qg0mx6Tt4WvhCljFwNuDdHY3dk-sns=)**
Let me take a minute to tell you about why we need Tammy Duckworth in the Senate.
Tammy Duckworth comes from a working class family. Growing up, her family relied on government support.
Now, she speaks out on behalf of families like her own who need a little help to get by. She also speaks out against Republicans who want to slash critical safety net programs that families depend on.
**I know that Senator Duckworth is working hard to ensure that good decisions are being made in Washington, decisions that make life better and easier for working families.**
And I know that she will continue to advocate for American families. But in order to do that, we need your help to ensure she wins her reelection. So, Peter:
**[Can we count on you to make a contribution of $5, or whatever you can afford, to reelect a hardworking senator that cares about working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39436915/319840997/-877618105?refcode=dd_em_211207_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTU0NDAyNy1hMDU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NvtM7aamh3TK6Qg0mx6Tt4WvhCljFwNuDdHY3dk-sns=)**
Thank you,
Dick Durbin

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39436916/319840998/-877618105?refcode=dd_em_211207_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTU0NDAyNy1hMDU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NvtM7aamh3TK6Qg0mx6Tt4WvhCljFwNuDdHY3dk-sns=)****

| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
AZ-09 congressional candidate Tanya Wheeless continues to hit the campaign trail hard. From a Kiwanis Club meeting to having a merry time at the Arizona GOP's Christmas Party, Tanya has been at every event she can sharing her story and what she will do for the East Valley.

**In case you missed it...**

The National Republican Congressional Committee added AZ-09 to their list of Democrat-held offensive targets for 2020. Read more [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=03bd4f3e83&e=bd2b55b0e3).

Tanya was named as one of 11 "Women to Watch" by House Republican Caucus Chair Elise Stefanik and EPAC. Read more [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=deb61a29ad&e=bd2b55b0e3).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Remembering Pearl Harbor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Americans will always remember Pearl Harbor Read more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470974?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=266a65ac79&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican,

It’s been 80 years since the Japanese surprise attack on Pearl Harbor that killed over 2,000 Americans. The bombing caused massive damage to the U.S. Pacific Fleet and led to America’s entrance in World War II.

It was a day of tragedy, but something extraordinary happened in the aftermath.

America united. People came together to fight back. And in the following years, our servicemen and women fought valiantly to liberate millions from the tyranny of Imperial Japan and Nazi Germany.

Today, we honor all those who lost their lives that fateful day 80 years ago, and we reflect on what unites us as Americans.

In remembrance,

Indiana Republican Party

He lives in Saratoga County and is running to represent the people of NY’s 21st Congressional District. | ** Paid for by Castelli for Congress Castelli for Congress PO Box 2341 Wilton, NY 12831 United States **

name: Doug Gansler
subject: Prioritizing Maryland's mental health 🧠
body:
We have the opportunity to make real change for millions of Marylanders with an unprecedented investment in mental health care, but to make that possible, I need your support. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0kfurjTxCm_nDReJMyGB3KNaC8FVRD50iaEUlbtnBX6JUY9ZTDf5RRxu1nTUR55yhvgpDFGeYxmymY6sgAPdK12CsiiQpsRRZvREbNRFmN5JFKPOQEFuPWRFKACIQ_H340Rl0ig506_Li9moTgKUHsjfdg38wI5GDhy2mfEyNkocMsxBAmFCkxkpkEL92gIn51aZuZ7kdRwCw2CzQfM0cFull4MFdqjtvQvCwTOXKCwc6HKQvA0jlvmaCFAMwDMPOA/3hn/Rp5FQJudQmOR2mLQj9nWmA/h0/8YVqx3u5mDoI108g_sO_Fb0cmi4lVup2Dds6yo2DeBE)
---
Hi friends, As anyone who has attempted to navigate the mental health care system can tell you, Maryland is failing to provide the level of care patients desperately need. Lives are at stake and we need relief and resources to tackle this crisis as soon as possible. That's why as Governor, **I will make mental health a defining priority of my Administration,** starting with a generational investment in mental health treatment services as part of my plan: [_**Mental Health Matters**_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0kfurjTxCm_nDReJMyGB3KNaC8FVRD50iaEUlbtnBX6JUY9ZTDf5RRxu1nTUR55yhu4eASS4g7GDtquwQXLXup7xohtZZGMfKO9NwJYiiWsqVDYXokjfJZkJPqYKkbkS1VpwnvkANKpHWmudxNKq0inuQ2zDWZEjD1v5orrxcF7qLgl8mS0RochltfrvQIyUzHOntbm8ei6agdAtfxhPgkgc_qrk9HPZl6qr6UjVWyxH6b5ewjj_MWQAzFeCKuQ7kg/3hn/Rp5FQJudQmOR2mLQj9nWmA/h1/_HIBuYb4FDwyeqfA0H6rw6J2kiYuyYIjp1KLu9bwSLc).
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0kfurjTxCm_nDReJMyGB3KNaC8FVRD50iaEUlbtnBX6JUY9ZTDf5RRxu1nTUR55yhvkTxzaIlROijIrRJPLAs6MwEiW0YbXZsqj6rJzOxadcVVCtd4r1KRcJLiwzkyiTgwrlZh5SbHbc12wv3I1RjLRO7LJktgKnhHu7nky2A2vr9-dtmBgziutIWFz2qGCcb5hH25Gui4DWjTQFwkNuCIAOl7zrGZAnbWac_uRp6bel02Fd-l3S5lOWVrF1Z7Wbaw/3hn/Rp5FQJudQmOR2mLQj9nWmA/h2/o2pjAqC8HN9IfWJtPnQLFQWSwpY7fcvwVo3rJWPUoeE)
---
My comprehensive plan includes measures to:
---
* **Build and operate 10 new regional behavioral centers across the state of Maryland

**
* **Ensure all public schools have one certified mental health care professional**on staff** per 250 students

**
* **Ensure all police departments have access to mental health professionals to assist with conflict resolution, substance addiction, and PTSD

**
* **Provide cost-free higher education to psychiatrists, therapists, or social workers who pledge to practice in Maryland for 10 years

**
* **Establish a Cabinet-level, Interagency Department of Suicide Prevention

**
* **And SO MUCH MORE**

---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0kfurjTxCm_nDReJMyGB3KNaC8FVRD50iaEUlbtnBX6JUY9ZTDf5RRxu1nTUR55yhp2Yg1pvavNht4112rMyk_pYNr1DRDCOFmuJftCz_hV-Uyiz71QK-m4MHOAEZ-ITZRL71htE3xHrCD6TfwohKOrPEYQ39q1bw6FeGuLnWJQ4hY-sDi1EfmAyFjzB3D1N52dO3yF5oMqvLunqfM-lc25TOyF8aWGtSMrFhtsx7gDZXf8Jre2yTR7-S0wVzt5TMQ/3hn/Rp5FQJudQmOR2mLQj9nWmA/h3/-f5laNgJdhl3-eNMIzQpeagjNi9O8H93va2CjyBPKXs)We have the opportunity to make real change for millions of Marylanders with an unprecedented investment in mental health care, but to make that possible, I need your support. **[To help me expand access, quality, and continuity of mental health services in our state, read the entire plan on my website today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0kfurjTxCm_nDReJMyGB3KNaC8FVRD50iaEUlbtnBX6JUY9ZTDf5RRxu1nTUR55yhhQOYNuMywbqO9izFCy0c72bcYX5-O4WAGApsJvUuTqwsHtyOFWj0atQ-Y7JNbf93Tcvui5bdnjMPfaYY_K_vBQ1vMFjBvw1kSC2496QMCRWYN4tkn-0uT6zkDCb4A-xZuE80c8eYIF4EU4bEOUQbf810a1rTEqSnbBH8jPiluwbH0Nj-SYEdIV71Mp5wo53OQ/3hn/Rp5FQJudQmOR2mLQj9nWmA/h4/k2maSz9KY85XXS2JW08XSM8PBkvKM-aE-J2Hz3TDCKI)** Thank you, Doug
---

name: DEMOCRATIC MAJORITY (Via When Democrats Turn Out)
subject: The Hill: “Democrats are sleepwalking towards electoral disaster in 2022”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Dear Peter, Remember Tuesday, November 4, 2008? Remember what it felt like the night Barack Obama was elected President of the United States of America? Barack Obama was inaugurated on Sunday, January 20, 2009. Just nine days later, he signed the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act into law. **Will you help the Democrats win the 2022 Midterms?** | **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39437627/319844217/323446034?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkMzJjZDUwLWEyNTctZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w8nVOmAV7rAsr383yfusYiGOWkQkjxGHDV0saP56FLc=&emci=6d778f5d-9f57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cd32cd50-a257-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5546903)** | | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39437628/319844218/323446034?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkMzJjZDUwLWEyNTctZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w8nVOmAV7rAsr383yfusYiGOWkQkjxGHDV0saP56FLc=&emci=6d778f5d-9f57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cd32cd50-a257-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5546903)**
---|---|---

Back in 2009, the country was in an economic crisis, so the Democratic House and Democratic Senate passed the American Recovery and Reinvestment Act of 2009, which President Obama signed into law on February 17, 2009. On May 26, he nominated Justice Sonia Sotomayor to the Supreme Court. And on March 20, 2010, Barack Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law.

Then on Tuesday, November 2, 2010, Democrats lost 6 seats in the Senate and a massive 63 seats in the House. The Tea Party controlled the Republican Party.

In 2012, Barack Obama won again, defeating Mitt Romney.

**Will you help the Democrats win the 2022 Midterms?**

**[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39437629/319844219/323446034?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkMzJjZDUwLWEyNTctZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w8nVOmAV7rAsr383yfusYiGOWkQkjxGHDV0saP56FLc=&emci=6d778f5d-9f57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cd32cd50-a257-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5546903)** | | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39437630/319844220/323446034?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkMzJjZDUwLWEyNTctZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w8nVOmAV7rAsr383yfusYiGOWkQkjxGHDV0saP56FLc=&emci=6d778f5d-9f57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cd32cd50-a257-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5546903)**
---|---|---

But on Tuesday, November 4, 2014, Democrats lost another 13 seats in the House and a devastating 9 seats in the Senate.

And on Tuesday, June 16, 2015, Donald J. Trump descended an escalator, called immigrants rapists (and very fine people), and then went on to defeat 16 other Republicans in the primary.

Donald J. Trump then went on to defeat Hillary Clinton in the 2016 Election.

It was one of the worst nights of our political lives.

But then, you spoke out.

You marched.

You knocked on doors.

You donated.

And Democrats voted even though 2018 was an off-year.

And Democrats won.

Democrats took back the House in 2018 because we all stepped up together.

And then Democrats voted again in 2020, even though there was a global pandemic.

And Democrats won.

**Will you help the Democrats win the 2022 Midterms?**

**[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39437631/319844221/323446034?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkMzJjZDUwLWEyNTctZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w8nVOmAV7rAsr383yfusYiGOWkQkjxGHDV0saP56FLc=&emci=6d778f5d-9f57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cd32cd50-a257-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5546903)** | | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39437632/319844222/323446034?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkMzJjZDUwLWEyNTctZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w8nVOmAV7rAsr383yfusYiGOWkQkjxGHDV0saP56FLc=&emci=6d778f5d-9f57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cd32cd50-a257-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5546903)**
---|---|---

Democrats defeated Donald Trump and took back the Senate with the election of Senator Warnock and Senator Ossoff, both from Georgia. Because we all stepped up together.

Because When Democrats Turn Out, Democrats Win Elections.

But now, many are _already_ writing off Democrats' chances in 2022:

_New York Times_ : "Reeling from surprise losses, Democrats sound the alarm for 2022. Party officials say the White House and Congress must do more to address the electorate's deep malaise or risk watching voters lurch back toward the G.O.P. by default."

_Bloomberg News_ : "Democrats confront wall of worries heading toward 2022 Elections. Biden's unpopularity, GOP districts and other problems await. Messaging from White House not capturing positive signs."

_Washington Post_ : "Democrats are on course to lose in 2022 and 2024. If they do, we may lose our democracy."

Fellow Democrats: Conventional wisdom says Democrats will lose in 2022. The prognosticators and pundits (who have gotten it wrong _so_ many times before) say Democrats will lose big time in 2022.

**Will you help the Democrats win the 2022 Midterms?**

**[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39437633/319844223/323446034?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkMzJjZDUwLWEyNTctZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w8nVOmAV7rAsr383yfusYiGOWkQkjxGHDV0saP56FLc=&emci=6d778f5d-9f57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cd32cd50-a257-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5546903)** | | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39437634/319844224/323446034?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkMzJjZDUwLWEyNTctZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w8nVOmAV7rAsr383yfusYiGOWkQkjxGHDV0saP56FLc=&emci=6d778f5d-9f57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cd32cd50-a257-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5546903)**
---|---|---

We say: Let's win.

We say: Let's win big.

We say: The 2022 Midterms are a year away, a lot can change in a year's time. Let's change it.

We say: Let's shape the future. Because the future of America depends on what we do together in the next 11 months.

The choice is between giving up, throwing in the towel, and letting an emboldened Mitch McConnell and Donald J. Trump take back control of America or stepping up as Democrats big time, defying history, and _expanding_ Democrats' House and Senate Majorities in 2022.

Some people say who we elect doesn't matter. Some people say America is already a fake democracy and we can't do anything about it. We say that's all BS. And we're willing to work 60, even 80 hours a week from today until Tuesday, November 8, 2022 if we have to.

We believe that the 2022 Midterm Elections are the most important elections of our lifetimes.

But we can't do it alone. Are you in?

**Will you help the Democrats win the 2022 Midterms?**

**[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39437635/319844225/323446034?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkMzJjZDUwLWEyNTctZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w8nVOmAV7rAsr383yfusYiGOWkQkjxGHDV0saP56FLc=&emci=6d778f5d-9f57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cd32cd50-a257-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5546903)** | | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39437636/319844226/323446034?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkMzJjZDUwLWEyNTctZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w8nVOmAV7rAsr383yfusYiGOWkQkjxGHDV0saP56FLc=&emci=6d778f5d-9f57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cd32cd50-a257-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5546903)**
---|---|---

We cannot thank you enough for all you've done and for all you'll do to shape the course of history in 2022.

Because When Democrats Turn Out, Democrats Win Elections.

\- When Democrats Turn Out

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, Remember Tuesday, November 4, 2008? Remember what it felt like the night Barack Obama was elected President of the United States of America? Barack Obama was inaugurated on Sunday, January 20, 2009. Just nine days later, he signed the Lilly Ledbetter Fair Pay Act into law. Will you help the Democrats win the 2022 Midterms? | | | ---|---|--- Back in 2009, the country was in an economic crisis, so the Democratic House and Democratic Senate passed the American Recovery and Reinvestment Act of 2009, which President Obama signed into law on February 17, 2009. On May 26, he nominated Justice Sonia Sotomayor to the Supreme Court. And on March 20, 2010, Barack Obama signed the Affordable Care Act into law. Then on Tuesday, November 2, 2010, Democrats lost 6 seats in the Senate and a massive 63 seats in the House. The Tea Party controlled the Republican Party. In 2012, Barack Obama won again, defeating Mitt Romney. Will you help the Democrats win the 2022 Midterms? | | ---|---|--- But on Tuesday, November 4, 2014, Democrats lost another 13 seats in the House and a devastating 9 seats in the Senate. And on Tuesday, June 16, 2015, Donald J. Trump descended an escalator, called immigrants rapists (and very fine people), and then went on to defeat 16 other Republicans in the primary. Donald J. Trump then went on to defeat Hillary Clinton in the 2016 Election. It was one of the worst nights of our political lives. But then, you spoke out. You marched. You knocked on doors. You donated. And Democrats voted even though 2018 was an off-year. And Democrats won. Democrats took back the House in 2018 because we all stepped up together. And then Democrats voted again in 2020, even though there was a global pandemic. And Democrats won. Will you help the Democrats win the 2022 Midterms? | | ---|---|--- Democrats defeated Donald Trump and took back the Senate with the election of Senator Warnock and Senator Ossoff, both from Georgia. Because we all stepped up together. Because When Democrats Turn Out, Democrats Win Elections. But now, many are already writing off Democrats' chances in 2022: New York Times : "Reeling from surprise losses, Democrats sound the alarm for 2022. Party officials say the White House and Congress must do more to address the electorate's deep malaise or risk watching voters lurch back toward the G.O.P. by default." Bloomberg News : "Democrats confront wall of worries heading toward 2022 Elections. Biden's unpopularity, GOP districts and other problems await. Messaging from White House not capturing positive signs." Washington Post : "Democrats are on course to lose in 2022 and 2024. If they do, we may lose our democracy." Fellow Democrats: Conventional wisdom says Democrats will lose in 2022. The prognosticators and pundits (who have gotten it wrong so many times before) say Democrats will lose big time in 2022. Will you help the Democrats win the 2022 Midterms? | | ---|---|--- We say: Let's win. We say: Let's win big. We say: The 2022 Midterms are a year away, a lot can change in a year's time. Let's change it. We say: Let's shape the future. Because the future of America depends on what we do together in the next 11 months. The choice is between giving up, throwing in the towel, and letting an emboldened Mitch McConnell and Donald J. Trump take back control of America or stepping up as Democrats big time, defying history, and expanding Democrats' House and Senate Majorities in 2022. Some people say who we elect doesn't matter. Some people say America is already a fake democracy and we can't do anything about it. We say that's all BS. And we're willing to work 60, even 80 hours a week from today until Tuesday, November 8, 2022 if we have to. We believe that the 2022 Midterm Elections are the most important elections of our lifetimes. But we can't do it alone. Are you in? Will you help the Democrats win the 2022 Midterms? | | ---|---|--- We cannot thank you enough for all you've done and for all you'll do to shape the course of history in 2022. Because When Democrats Turn Out, Democrats Win Elections. \- When Democrats Turn Out = | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. All contributions are made to support When Democrats Turn Out PAC's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity. This is _not_ the time to come up short. All the indicators point to my success, to my ability to flip Florida blue and defend the Senate: recent polling showing me within the margin of error and The Cook Political Report increasing my chances of winning. **I'm gaining ground in my race, friend, but if I don't have the resources to seize this momentum, I risk losing this critical pickup opportunity and the Senate. **
Florida's last Senate race was decided by 0.12 points (just 10,033 votes). Winning such a tight race means I cannot afford to be massively outspent by Marco Rubio and his allies, which** ** means I cannot afford to miss tonight's midnight goal.**I urgently need your help to compete in this race that will decide Senate control. name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: Thank you, dpwillis67@gmail.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39437793/319844939/-2081290588?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmQxMzg3MC1hMzU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q73YLu7ONRPAltc4U1Y3s2etsdafMM8TDLL_T8pnGcg=&emci=12f8412f-a157-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=2fd13870-a357-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24265352)
---
Peter,

I'm so touched by the outpouring of support that I've received since I announced my reelection campaign, and I'm especially grateful for your generosity over the past few weeks.
**Last month, I told you I needed help to reach my fundraising goal before a three-month fundraising blackout – and you stepped up to show your support.** Because of dedicated grassroots supporters like you, we're heading into the fundraising blackout with enough resources to stretch into 2022.
It wasn't easy, Peter – but we hit our ambitious goal because thousands of grassroots supporters believe in our movement and gave whatever they could spare to keep our state blue. **I couldn't be prouder of the strength of our grassroots movement today. **
I'm excited to keep working toward a brighter future for New Mexico. If we keep working together, I know we can defend our state from the GOP, elect Democrats down the ballot, and enact our bold agenda.
**To keep up with our campaign during our fundraising blackout, please follow us at [@Michelle4NM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39437794/319844940/734040361?ref_src=twsrc%5Egoogle%7Ctwcamp%5Eserp%7Ctwgr%5Eauthor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmQxMzg3MC1hMzU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q73YLu7ONRPAltc4U1Y3s2etsdafMM8TDLL_T8pnGcg=&emci=12f8412f-a157-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=2fd13870-a357-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24265352) on Twitter, [@michellelujangrisham](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39437795/319844941/1312126551?hl=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmQxMzg3MC1hMzU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q73YLu7ONRPAltc4U1Y3s2etsdafMM8TDLL_T8pnGcg=&emci=12f8412f-a157-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=2fd13870-a357-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24265352) on Instagram, or [Michelle Lujan Grisham](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39437796/319844942/-1190876960?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmQxMzg3MC1hMzU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q73YLu7ONRPAltc4U1Y3s2etsdafMM8TDLL_T8pnGcg=&emci=12f8412f-a157-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=2fd13870-a357-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24265352) on Facebook.**
Thank you for being part of this grassroots movement.

clean_body: | | | Peter, I'm so touched by the outpouring of support that I've received since I announced my reelection campaign, and I'm especially grateful for your generosity over the past few weeks. Last month, I told you I needed help to reach my fundraising goal before a three-month fundraising blackout – and you stepped up to show your support. Because of dedicated grassroots supporters like you, we're heading into the fundraising blackout with enough resources to stretch into 2022. It wasn't easy, Peter – but we hit our ambitious goal because thousands of grassroots supporters believe in our movement and gave whatever they could spare to keep our state blue. I couldn't be prouder of the strength of our grassroots movement today. I'm excited to keep working toward a brighter future for New Mexico. If we keep working together, I know we can defend our state from the GOP, elect Democrats down the ballot, and enact our bold agenda. To keep up with our campaign during our fundraising blackout, please follow us at on Twitter, on Instagram, or on Facebook. Thank you for being part of this grassroots movement. \- Michelle Lujan Grisham | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. New Mexicans for Michelle P.O. Box 25422 Albuquerque, NM 87125 United States | | Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer

name: Team Mondaire
subject: Mondaire gets the job done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Team, have you seen what Mondaire’s been up to in Congress?
Earlier this year, Axios rated Mondaire the most active freshman member of Congress. From sponsoring almost 500 bills to getting universal child care in the _Build Back Better Act_ and leading the fight to pass voting rights legislation and expand the Supreme Court —**Mondaire has kept his foot on the gas to meet this moment with urgency.**
Some highlights from Mondaire’s busy year include:
✅ Holding the line to get the bipartisan infrastructure bill passed alongside the _Build Back Better Act_ and deliver on President Biden’s popular agenda
✅ Co-authoring provisions in the _John Lewis Voting Rights Act_ and the _Freedom to Vote Act_
✅ Leading the successful effort to get universal child care in the final _Build Back Better Act_
✅ Becoming the first member of Congress to call on President Biden to support filibuster changes to pass voting rights and democracy reform legislation
✅ Introducing legislation to expand the Supreme Court and moving public opinion in support of adding seats
✅ Working with Democrats to pass the American Rescue Plan to deliver much-needed relief from challenges brought on by the pandemic
✅ Being elected as the youngest member of House Democratic leadership.
**[Team, right now there’s a lot at stake and we need to keep committed legislators like Mondaire in Congress. Can you send in a contribution to power our efforts to get Mondaire re-elected in 2022? From sponsoring almost 500 bills to getting universal child care in the Build Back Better Act and leading the fight to pass voting rights legislation and expand the Supreme Court —Mondaire has kept his foot on the gas to meet this moment with urgency. Some highlights from Mondaire’s busy year include: ✅ Holding the line to get the bipartisan infrastructure bill passed alongside the Build Back Better Act and deliver on President Biden’s popular agenda ✅ Co-authoring provisions in the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and the Freedom to Vote Act ✅ Leading the successful effort to get universal child care in the final Build Back Better Act ✅ Becoming the first member of Congress to call on President Biden to support filibuster changes to pass voting rights and democracy reform legislation ✅ Introducing legislation to expand the Supreme Court and moving public opinion in support of adding seats ✅ Working with Democrats to pass the American Rescue Plan to deliver much-needed relief from challenges brought on by the pandemic ✅ Being elected as the youngest member of House Democratic leadership. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = Thanks to Mondaire’s important work, trillions of dollars will be used to improve our deteriorating infrastructure, implement critical programs like universal child care, invest in climate action, create millions of good-paying jobs, and help small businesses stay afloat. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Meuser for U
body:
I had to share it with you because I've not seen a single corporate media outlet cover it. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=256a8eeb03b64fdbb7b2dfbf9569fbd3&_e=km4j3n26Pl9cNPfhyhJqxsLpVsYRWbtgfn-GNYlRQjGgsVOuyz-8xPcbyWCmUhm-G9yL_QEF8fVjyt6lNFMEBcJ5nAqshxe078onailE0tzxOCEG_vzp6w8z5vrrDWKBloPcv89bQW1EK6thzadpW37QExunk9CVhtKPDs0Xg7r0nw_apsYxRdZDQ1gpmkf1ofQihaOQE8YXSNIYn8nU7avaU7aE5NFCykHaHkuEf0ZoIohGBqdfYCoQ0OAPYbMtP78KQ5ae56kE1097CJwrgpb14ORHOGiJw1t-2XQH2-8OAsi6DNwx-yr0QcIWVOnn1Y7th3W4hAitXKZcKH6NzA%3D%3D)

Peter -

Here's why I'm continuing to fight against the vaccine mandates being pushed by Joe Biden and the left.

Last night I came across a Freedom of Information Act report that shocked me. **I had to share it with you because I've not seen a single corporate media outlet cover it.**

**The FDA just released a report created by Pfizer in February 2021, showing that their Pfizer vaccine had killed 1,223 individuals. This report also shows that 270 women had _"spontaneous abortions"_ due to the vaccine.**

Additionally, it shows that over 10,000 people had a serious nervous system reaction to the vaccine.

I am sure we will be finding out more about this shocking Pfizer report over the next couple of days.

But, Peter, why is no one talking about this, and why haven't they taken these dangerous vaccines off the market?!

[** help mark stop vax mandates**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=256a8eeb03b64fdbb7b2dfbf9569fbd3&_e=km4j3n26Pl9cNPfhyhJqxsLpVsYRWbtgfn-GNYlRQjGgsVOuyz-8xPcbyWCmUhm-G9yL_QEF8fVjyt6lNFMEBcJ5nAqshxe078onailE0tzxOCEG_vzp6w8z5vrrDWKBctc0YZwuqa3t7wwYLvKeB9yOYDBN8xO8yXjG_5oxriRtiAKzR1szSGCNIlbt09Jt17Bpo251-Z8jP33EBBtr-Pgn9WHZLwgmwv-oZcg55u83QllYMbvfAaRZ6Wk0UgCbKKzdDeEyS1tsSD7QyGisvXSSsuo6_F4cTyGG9JqjOyKq9VKbFhHOBmL_uOz4RKA_Y3imEO-n4PJ9djswmGGZjw%3D%3D)
The fight against vaccine mandates is no longer just about medical freedom. **Now it's about protecting your health from a dangerous gene therapy disguised as a vaccine.**

I'm still fighting in the courts to make sure a mandate never becomes permanent, but we need to take back the Senate majority and block these before they even have a chance to get started.

[**I need your help to take back the Senate. Republicans only need one seat to return to power.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=256a8eeb03b64fdbb7b2dfbf9569fbd3&_e=km4j3n26Pl9cNPfhyhJqxsLpVsYRWbtgfn-GNYlRQjGgsVOuyz-8xPcbyWCmUhm-G9yL_QEF8fVjyt6lNFMEBcJ5nAqshxe078onailE0tzxOCEG_vzp6w8z5vrrDWKBSiC0vtZNrsQ3rrvolaOOS0ctnqXXveMxFo1EF6oIX7MurRRTypi10l7Fue_pid77BhywV1lBb6d-GT7HkZNV8s__IMnjV10xssmG6DQZWSzPwNuO_FZEKNGX8B9MahuGTc7T2mBpTAEdraNJSX1-f-UI4WV7biXkkyUnUjER6GAiNROwKFl3RS8iy22V_imXRrrnmy1-_rrs_KJgW8Lxng%3D%3D) Because I am running for the seat that was vacated by Kamala Harris, the Supreme Court has ruled that the day I win the election, I immediately become a United States Senator and end the 50/50 Senate. The fastest way to end the 50/50 Senate is through California.

[**Can you chip in $15 today to my campaign for Senate and my mission to block vaccine mandates?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=256a8eeb03b64fdbb7b2dfbf9569fbd3&_e=km4j3n26Pl9cNPfhyhJqxsLpVsYRWbtgfn-GNYlRQjGgsVOuyz-8xPcbyWCmUhm-G9yL_QEF8fVjyt6lNFMEBcJ5nAqshxe078onailE0tzxOCEG_vzp6w8z5vrrDWKBwobrRLSzfCqcxf23OdwIRhRhRhVaJKDCMPnWzCPzgiiGqBeYb5ar9HmRJJ_rjCRXpF2GCYwKDZD2Py4VobUvNWTH1JUVL73pT8gxnU8lH3Gko7NT2ceBpMeM7Gj5ZB70k_3gTEa8dOZHsfJpdTquHgz6WfBqwdsLnTGYZ0wYnnA3oe8qCWuaNcm3KBsk0yv1u7fQS_POMjuALPNFSkEbhw%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Mark Meuser
Republican for U.S. Senate, California

[**P.S. If you're as worried about this as I am, click here to download the report and read it for yourself.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=256a8eeb03b64fdbb7b2dfbf9569fbd3&_e=km4j3n26Pl9cNPfhyhJqxkHStuipWRij60TtUL299PjXtr-IV3Ytbfw_WNTcRT_7qrcr9biP-NRFWMY9EwDhSlItL-K9PWVX1qq4aS5sRkr7FkiEfb1Ye_yfjdgteZZrvvw6lvjW5fVMYm8Pzni6GRw7YhYDrYvrSCJxRqpMBaPalkzwmIxh_tO9qMAvDcr9XAJ3gwJoKLnLjDv6J-FMjOpnmpagbwh_5zaCKgFJEPa9Lzd1P_BIZlFlSdpdvi-lSuG_UzrPKs9zTAtJyXZFjZAlulYGl70G_tacy80OqSs%3D)

[** HELP MARK WIN THIS RACE**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=256a8eeb03b64fdbb7b2dfbf9569fbd3&_e=km4j3n26Pl9cNPfhyhJqxsLpVsYRWbtgfn-GNYlRQjGgsVOuyz-8xPcbyWCmUhm-G9yL_QEF8fVjyt6lNFMEBcJ5nAqshxe078onailE0tzxOCEG_vzp6w8z5vrrDWKBOl0QhXbMg-QqR0I4JRlK4Ez9IVryzgM9uSe6NaKylXpneUDQW1aUWfH9aquqMK5AQe7SVnDDDat38_OmWPHTrrZcKfuJEB2G-1RvVs1Jbn_r4zDt0nyOiQdzJQGX6yajn3c8MzEQuy5XkIjoRMNhwOs65Ae0hSqwtQmM7sX-aCmu4lNE1pUymcBKrKj-aDiAwxRTNvG7Bp4qx7tAQx916w%3D%3D)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Some serious danger
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If we’re going to have the necessary funds to compete with the top Democrat fundraiser in the country, then we cannot miss our fundraising goals. If we're going to have the necessary funds to compete with the top Democrat fundraiser in the country, then we cannot miss our fundraising goals. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=993f6b54925a44d78f0413f44541adc4&_e=4jMQzrbFBPXclM_4f2d12gYpRBeEkEabnll1kH3FpMNyO28AMIWgn7rcCH6gBwwYCreCErdYoT8YoABqMhUhPzbzlmU8PucBAhi04FMXuFg33V8WZTgwT8nlbt1ytOMvEfaXeVEgHH72lC8LD4p79Fx4OYy0Q4NRgKSEm-xqhXT7M3H8LoZ-OZUiXXmE7W5cmx4JMWedv_zkoYxAe32WlsfRrJ_72sndZ5-b9I-OE_cTrcagTkP3LWvkRKpHBr57aicT4I-Dm3KtV-rhqJVqJDHHYeg2_Rio_jwAoyRwvPbKbQ42FYows30Bk-nZu_wyM2EvheEiylvrpldAdtWqGV_SwGfdui06EOYtzcAuaiTXJFUFwJKf6Lldb9TcR-BAaiYctVrs6CHcPaitLkgiOvPkZVY3UVNc9x5t22l6hXiYW_qsr4gbs980H3Y-09Gp)

---
Fellow American - Democrats know it. And we know it, too.

The Senate race in Georgia will go down to the wire. Democrats are going to spend whatever it takes to keep their politician in the Senate. Take a look at the panicked email they recently sent:

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=993f6b54925a44d78f0413f44541adc4&_e=4jMQzrbFBPXclM_4f2d12gYpRBeEkEabnll1kH3FpMNyO28AMIWgn7rcCH6gBwwYCreCErdYoT8YoABqMhUhPzbzlmU8PucBAhi04FMXuFg33V8WZTgwT8nlbt1ytOMvEfaXeVEgHH72lC8LD4p79Fx4OYy0Q4NRgKSEm-xqhXT7M3H8LoZ-OZUiXXmE7W5cmx4JMWedv_zkoYxAe32WlsfRrJ_72sndZ5-b9I-OE_dIYlG8uD11iWix7Qoo2JtklDXMCwOnyflQkJGiA9TvSDnup0KVJ-2-sbC-YD7k8UIJ1KemhSXqDkuusUmOlIXdgkz9UdaKhHOrEkZ7TEKLS3Luv8ybPBM5_UJG4AtY2lP8I2ZWfUBjFuA_ZBP1XbTOl7XvS392IeF4UP286Ehwy50zlWkEsaO1orPrYXyK4anPjVFSZCIsyamNxYYcoNqV)
The Democrats are on a roll with their fundraising. Their supporters understand what's at stake - control of the U.S. Senate and the fate of the Biden-Schumer-Pelosi agenda. In Georgia, we're running against the #1 fundraising senator in the country who already has $17 million in his campaign war chest.

Our campaign is being aggressive in our fundraising, but we're behind our December goal - by a significant amount. We hate writing emails like this nearly a year from Election Day, **but we must hit every fundraising goal along the way if we're going to have the necessary funds to win next November.**

**[In an effort to get back on course, we're asking 1,500 conservatives to make a donation of $10 or more before midnight tonight.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=993f6b54925a44d78f0413f44541adc4&_e=4jMQzrbFBPXclM_4f2d12gYpRBeEkEabnll1kH3FpMNyO28AMIWgn7rcCH6gBwwYCreCErdYoT8YoABqMhUhPzbzlmU8PucBAhi04FMXuFg33V8WZTgwT8nlbt1ytOMvEfaXeVEgHH72lC8LD4p79Fx4OYy0Q4NRgKSEm-xqhXT7M3H8LoZ-OZUiXXmE7W5cmx4JMWedv_zkoYxAe32WlsfRrJ_72sndZ5-b9I-OE_fvpvHLRw5-R9nJCafa_2BnntHyW-JsZ19VL_hIoYAig35bCEIQ7VllRPpV7LHdI49EbM_TRcqTt07Fn5SS6yhRPLBfOu_WqRreV2OSQBazvo8SQ5q_UXRVHXA2j6drgskgIuZx1xD3EchQHUek67okZmQ69O_Z5N33vQCSHYu-6kAQq5lz8MxnkxN0iwUBITQnybSc49NYkha9DXQY1lqD)**

_The last thing that we want is for complacency to set in. While some conservatives believe we have the wind at our back after Republicans swept the top races in Virginia, that doesn't translate into automatic victory next year. Far from it._

clean_body: If we’re going to have the necessary funds to compete with the top Democrat fundraiser in the country, then we cannot miss our fundraising goals. If we're going to have the necessary funds to compete with the top Democrat fundraiser in the country, then we cannot miss our fundraising goals. | Fellow American - Democrats know it. And we know it, too. The Senate race in Georgia will go down to the wire. Democrats are going to spend whatever it takes to keep their politician in the Senate. Take a look at the panicked email they recently sent: The Democrats are on a roll with their fundraising. Their supporters understand what's at stake - control of the U.S. Senate and the fate of the Biden-Schumer-Pelosi agenda. In Georgia, we're running against the #1 fundraising senator in the country who already has $17 million in his campaign war chest. Our campaign is being aggressive in our fundraising, but we're behind our December goal - by a significant amount. We hate writing emails like this nearly a year from Election Day, but we must hit every fundraising goal along the way if we're going to have the necessary funds to win next November. The last thing that we want is for complacency to set in. While some conservatives believe we have the wind at our back after Republicans swept the top races in Virginia, that doesn't translate into automatic victory next year. Far from it. We must block, tackle, and excel at the basics of campaigning - like raising money, organizing volunteers, and registering voters - to win. We know the holiday season is upon us. Soon, Election Day will be here too. The future of the country is on the line, so we are humbly asking for you to help us get back on track today. Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’d be lost without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
You are a fine Patriot [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8143%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=pLiG9ES4rTdw2Pn6IAvZsw&sysid=1)
You are a fine Patriot

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19043%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qXcdUTyxhlRbmTG53pbPvQ&sysid=1)
---

Folks,

I wanted to take a second from fighting back against the Radical Left to tell you how much I appreciate your unwavering support this year.

This year, I announced I would be seeking re-election in 2022 for Senate. I’ve been blown away by the support I’ve received from back home in Louisiana and all across the country.
| [Contribute Here](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19044%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RrXTbukNqSAwP2d%2f2Fq5Lg&sysid=1)
---

There is still a lot of work to be done between now and the 2022 elections, but with patriots like yourself, the work will be easier.

If you are still feeling generous please contribute whatever you can, I promise it will go a long way in protecting your conservative values and defending the American Dream. Thank You!
[Contribute Here](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19155%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DqXi3yX0esDsPOiAyGBdVA&sysid=1)
---

God Bless,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19043%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qXcdUTyxhlRbmTG53pbPvQ&sysid=1)

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Tomorrow night, first General Officer to come out after Don't Ask Don't Tell repeal joins Taking the Hill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/jFA-yDrV1pcbxqBU8qtlk1xdISc1jZslzDdUZZfpHRg=/TnmP-pw2i9ybVWu3czn6Hf8TBQNpF0Y-JfJ3qANzGe8=)

Peter,

[_**Our event tomorrow night**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/jFA-yDrV1pcbxqBU8qtlk1xdISc1jZslzDdUZZfpHRg=/TnmP-pw2i9ybVWu3czn6Hf8TBQNpF0Y-JfJ3qANzGe8=) keeps getting better and better. I just heard that two of my good friends - and personal heroes - GEN Tammy Smith and Tracey Hepner will be in attendance. Both women have dedicated their lives to serving our military and veterans communities, and GEN Smith, as you might know, was the first openly gay General Officer to come out while serving after we repealed Don't Ask, Don't Tell.

We really hope you can join us! If you're on the fence, [_**get your ticket now.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/jFA-yDrV1pcbxqBU8qtlk1xdISc1jZslzDdUZZfpHRg=/TnmP-pw2i9ybVWu3czn6Hf8TBQNpF0Y-JfJ3qANzGe8=) This is about so much more than a football game - it's about getting our friends together on Capitol Hill to show that veterans can lead with honor and integrity in Congress. [_**We need your support to help make that happen**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/jFA-yDrV1pcbxqBU8qtlk1xdISc1jZslzDdUZZfpHRg=/TnmP-pw2i9ybVWu3czn6Hf8TBQNpF0Y-JfJ3qANzGe8=) \- and while you're with us, you can be inspired by some of my heroes, too.

[_**RSVP for your ticket by clicking here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/jFA-yDrV1pcbxqBU8qtlk1xdISc1jZslzDdUZZfpHRg=/TnmP-pw2i9ybVWu3czn6Hf8TBQNpF0Y-JfJ3qANzGe8=) Even if you can't make it, [_we 'd love to have your support with a contribution today._](https://act.myngp.com/el/jFA-yDrV1pcbxqBU8qtlk1xdISc1jZslzDdUZZfpHRg=/TnmP-pw2i9ybVWu3czn6Hf8TBQNpF0Y-JfJ3qANzGe8=)

See you soon,
Patrick

_Hon. Patrick J. Murphy_
_32nd Under Secretary of the Army_
_Former Congressman (PA-01)_
[_@PatrickMurphyPA_](https://act.myngp.com/el/jFA-yDrV1pcbxqBU8qtlk1xdISc1jZslzDdUZZfpHRg=/WjOMDGkONniCea3yTL7myzaC9c9UJ3SbmEt9Rjk9VbA=)

name: Giffords.org
subject: [SURVEY] Universal background checks
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your feedback matters as we urge the Senate to pass universal background checks.
#

Friends,
One of our top priorities here at Giffords is getting universal background checks signed into law. To pass background checks through the Senate, we need to demonstrate how important this policy is to the American people.
[**That’s why we are asking all our supporters to take our short survey about background checks. Will you share your thoughts here? This is important and will help us put pressure on Congress to pass background checks.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/background_check_survey?source=em211207-1-15&t=1&akid=1282%2E3935704%2ENA5Vze)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/background_check_survey?source=em211207-1-15&t=2&akid=1282%2E3935704%2ENA5Vze)**
Your opinions about universal background checks are crucial. When you speak up, and so do thousands of others, we can use our collective voices to urge the Senate to act quickly.
We are doing everything we can to make sure that firearms stay out of the hands of the wrong people. Your feedback matters as we urge the Senate to pass universal background checks.
All our best,
The team at Giffords
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/background_check_survey?source=em211207-1-15&t=3&akid=1282%2E3935704%2ENA5Vze)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1282%2E3935704%2ENA5Vze) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: Contribute to our End of the Year fund!
body:
We are coming to the end of Biden’s first year as President. Needless to say, he has been a complete and total disaster for America.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013cx0Eg9PXXiQG2KWbbBhuL00PPwFlsdAFvMggKfil6ELBfd08dPKBATF9pPkQQPsyZ0ZLG1HeldNyta7cPc3HLJ8Z5BnlC_SSLB3-eWTl475d0cnOngjbhRsFVGlFE47LdoevPfpR4t2otebFVrzOnzrZzmusF86sWuJ3pJMOPoX8ZVL90OF9_INr9xV91URsarIK6Ir1cYEtn7_D3Ue2Q==&c=mc7rb-Nn3QA7VU_wniq3C9pL-pMAVBLPM8x-O-lNJfQPGEIaonjJsw==&ch=O5n9etJ2mGsxeLKPDyfAno-zIvid_fx-tWem4u-lBAxwS0mUCNrjLQ==)
---
| Friend,

We are coming to the end of Biden's first year as President. Needless to say, he has been a complete and total disaster for America.
His socialist spending spree has resulted in one of the worst economic crises in history. Prices on everyday goods are skyrocketing, your taxes have been raised, and the Left is trying to shut down American industry.
Not that Biden cares, he will just keep taking from the American people until there's nothing left to give. The Liberals have turned our Congress into a socialist circus, but we can and will fight back to save our country.
---
| | | [END THE YEAR STRONG](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013cx0Eg9PXXiQG2KWbbBhuL00PPwFlsdAFvMggKfil6ELBfd08dPKBATF9pPkQQPsyZ0ZLG1HeldNyta7cPc3HLJ8Z5BnlC_SSLB3-eWTl475d0cnOngjbhRsFVGlFE47LdoevPfpR4t2otebFVrzOnzrZzmusF86sWuJ3pJMOPoX8ZVL90OF9_INr9xV91URsarIK6Ir1cYEtn7_D3Ue2Q==&c=mc7rb-Nn3QA7VU_wniq3C9pL-pMAVBLPM8x-O-lNJfQPGEIaonjJsw==&ch=O5n9etJ2mGsxeLKPDyfAno-zIvid_fx-tWem4u-lBAxwS0mUCNrjLQ==)

| The America First movement is not a temporary fluke. It is the agenda that must be in the House to stop the liberal elite tyranny over America. Luckily for Americans, we know we can count on true patriots, like you, who aren't afraid to speak out against the socialist elites.
We will take back the House and bring back the America First Agenda to Washington D.C. However, we need your support in this fight.
With your support, Kat can help retake the House and fight for your constitutional rights as an American citizen. She refuses to let big government socialists continue to steal your hard-earned money for their anti-American schemes.

name: Chris
subject: A limited-time Christmas offer!
body:
My team and I are more excited for this holiday season than ever before!
_Sponsored message_
Fellow conservative, My team and I are more excited for this holiday season than ever before!

After over a year of Democrat lockdowns and mandates, we’re ready to celebrate with our friends, family, and patriots like you.

We want to bring a little extra MAGA cheer this year, so we’re releasing **limited-edition** Trump ornaments for our top supporters’ trees this Christmas. [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zms96jjiikobo178nlc2p06osvl9gaed3tbkan5o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sji62p33c9h2bs) These ornaments make a great addition to your home’s decor, or a great stocking stuffer for the MAGA patriot in your life!

**Get your limited-edition President Trump Ornament TODAY and have a merry MAGA Christmas!** [**GET YOUR ORNAMENT NOW**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zetrnn24b6si95l2mb3ri4omvlfhvtm28okqud98_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sji62p33c9h2bs) Thank you, Chris, Team Scott [**GET YOUR ORNAMENT NOW**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zc4rdsbgiq32kn2537jeahu4k8n8tc9m4o5a3nqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sji62p33c9h2bs) Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Team Holly
subject: HUGE redistricting news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter,
I’m writing today to share my deepest appreciation for all of our nation’s veterans. Growing up on army bases and in a family full of veterans, I learned discipline very early on and that service is meant to be selfless.
Today, we want to honor members of the Armed Forces that have defended our nation’s freedom and protected our country's future.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88943/images/Image%20from%20iOS%20%2851%29.jpg]Today also reminds us that we must do more to protect our veterans when they re-enter civilian life. After returning home many veterans are not given adequate support. GA-14 has a considerable veteran population yet we only have one VA hospital in the district and no veterans’ cemeteries . We must do better. We will do better. That's why I'm running to change the way that we treat our veterans when they return home.
We owe a debt to those who’ve placed their lives on the line to protect our freedom as Americans, and we have to do better to provide for their care and to honor their sacrifices.
Sincerely,
Holly McCormack.

name: Lauren Micek Vargas
subject: My husband
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I told him I'd be the one to ask this time.

|
---

| | I know it’s usually my husband Tony asking you for money.

But today, I told Tony I’d be the one to ask, and explain what this campaign means to us. [**_So, yes -- I’m about to ask for $10 before midnight. Let me explain why. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39439185/319851165/1129282168?refcode=20211207_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWUyM2JiOC1hOTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5luwQZrDTV6ZZ-hQLC61z5M5f_NRrBoKqtfkYXRRxXE=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39439186/319851166/1129282168?refcode=20211207_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWUyM2JiOC1hOTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5luwQZrDTV6ZZ-hQLC61z5M5f_NRrBoKqtfkYXRRxXE=) I know Tony can flip this seat for Democrats:

**[One of the things I admire most about Tony is that when he believes in something, he doesn’t stop until he gets the job done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39439187/319851168/1129282168?refcode=20211207_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWUyM2JiOC1hOTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5luwQZrDTV6ZZ-hQLC61z5M5f_NRrBoKqtfkYXRRxXE=)**

When he ran for the state Legislature, Tony fought for his principles against all odds.

When local businesses were struggling due to the pandemic, Tony secured relief funding.

When Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19, Tony demanded safer working conditions for essential workers like my father-in-law.

And when Republican Congressman Don Bacon favored tax cuts for billionaires and voted against COVID relief:

[**Tony stepped up to unseat him.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39439189/319851169/1129282168?refcode=20211207_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWUyM2JiOC1hOTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5luwQZrDTV6ZZ-hQLC61z5M5f_NRrBoKqtfkYXRRxXE=) [**_Everyday folks deserve a fighting chance, but my husband’s opponent doesn’t have the interests of our community at heart. Tony is determined to win this race, but it won’t be easy -- or cheap. Don Bacon already has a $260,000 fundraising lead. That’s why Tony needs to raise another $10,775 before midnight, and why I said I’d ask you today on his behalf. Will you chip in $10 to help him close this gap? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39439190/319851170/1129282168?refcode=20211207_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWUyM2JiOC1hOTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5luwQZrDTV6ZZ-hQLC61z5M5f_NRrBoKqtfkYXRRxXE=) Now you know a bit about Tony’s amazing track record.

But I want to be clear: running for Congress isn’t just about politics for him.

It’s personal.

It’s rooted in his experience growing up in poverty and fighting to defy the odds.

It’s rooted in the lessons he learned as a public school teacher, working with kids like him.

And it’s rooted in his desire to leave the world a better place for our kids, Ava and Luca.

[**I know you work hard for your money, and I wish I didn’t have to ask.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39439191/319851171/1129282168?refcode=20211207_em_fr_b1_lmv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWUyM2JiOC1hOTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5luwQZrDTV6ZZ-hQLC61z5M5f_NRrBoKqtfkYXRRxXE=)

But if Tony misses his $10,775 goal, he’ll have to make serious budget cuts to his campaign.

And it will be that much harder for him to flip this important seat for Democrats. But today, I told Tony I’d be the one to ask, and explain what this campaign means to us. = = I know Tony can flip this seat for Democrats: = When he ran for the state Legislature, Tony fought for his principles against all odds. When local businesses were struggling due to the pandemic, Tony secured relief funding. When Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19, Tony demanded safer working conditions for essential workers like my father-in-law. And when Republican Congressman Don Bacon favored tax cuts for billionaires and voted against COVID relief: = = Now you know a bit about Tony’s amazing track record. But I want to be clear: running for Congress isn’t just about politics for him. It’s personal. It’s rooted in his experience growing up in poverty and fighting to defy the odds. It’s rooted in the lessons he learned as a public school teacher, working with kids like him. And it’s rooted in his desire to leave the world a better place for our kids, Ava and Luca. = But if Tony misses his $10,775 goal, he’ll have to make serious budget cuts to his campaign. As we head into our upcoming election year, we need all hands on deck to help share Ben’s message and grow our grassroots movement of folks from across the state. From caucus organizing to signature collecting to phone banking, we're building a big, broad, and determined coalition of supporters ready for urgency from state leadership — starting with our Governor. [**To ensure we’re prepared for 2022, we're signing up volunteers from every corner of the Commonwealth and we want you to join us, friend. Sign up here >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39439345/319851826/-1670944156?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20211207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDZjOTVjMy1hYTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cdy7Db4rhoPTp072Bwd6da7CDWsvRpKkgJckHDz2jeQ=&emci=ae3ef6bc-aa57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=906c95c3-aa57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=23957496) | [VOLUNTEER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39439346/319851827/-1670944156?refcode=AU_BBD_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20211207_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDZjOTVjMy1hYTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cdy7Db4rhoPTp072Bwd6da7CDWsvRpKkgJckHDz2jeQ=&emci=ae3ef6bc-aa57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=906c95c3-aa57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=23957496)

name: Rand Paul
subject: re: is the Omicron variant here to scare you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
DEFEND LIBERTY: REJECT COVID HYSTERIA
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcjk2mpsgpnosk117d55l50j68labln2tmchvjpo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr7ectksmob8o9jmdq31cjkchgr9ctksljj6opkmpi79c73esqjaodjcmoratpgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3im1j75d5jcoo74cb666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933cpge9p36cli6aoh5u)
_**DEFEND LIBERTY: REJECT COVID HYSTERIA**_ **[CHIP IN NOW >>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zntid8q5ddknkg1fiv5eq43ar7anvdskp6ngc17o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sji6cpb4clh2bs)** [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo58tu3bgaomn9bhr0cqpopq2vfdo1bbbprjn8i8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sji6cpb4clh2bs) | |
---
Friend, the COVID hysteria has already gone on too long...

And these power-hungry bureaucrats don’t want to let go!

That’s probably why we’re hearing a lot about this new _spooky_ “omicron variant.”

But let’s be clear \- the omicron variant in South Africa, and now, California, is reported as an illness with MILD symptoms and no one has been hospitalized for it at this point.

**_But of course, Dr. Fauci and Joe Biden are using this as an excuse to take your freedoms before we even know the facts._**

We must stand strong on the side of science and refuse to allow another lockdown, more regulation, or more useless rules._If you ask me, enough is enough! If you agree, please chip in today to join my fight. _
**_By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution_**
__
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $100 **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8mja08ic3nr7lk6r859gd09p8egtel9k8jlvi8g_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $75 **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrkgis57vi1517anga4fcqodpi4o5p5ieailqj5g_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $50 **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl8p7jd6esk9460qn5q17sag8mhks1k0egovehmg_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $25 **](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrn9i6nav00bsdtn7hk8bbla5cguccrsv4lbsr7o_)
**_If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically._**
__
Friend, if we allow this nonsense of the "safety at all costs" narrative to continue, we're never going to be a free country again.

There's no vaccine, no law, and no regulation that will satisfy power-hungry leaders like Biden and Fauci. EVER.

No matter what “variant” they’re trying to scare us with, freedom must prevail.

That's why I'm putting my foot down. I will not believe the hype. I refuse to allow this chaos to become permanent, friend.

I have real power as a U.S. Senator to expose these bureaucrats and their endless theatrics, but I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength against the bureaucracy. [**Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf1brmbbtuqbqo3428v7fe6217fk50r6k6dhajdo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sji6cpb4clh2bs)

Together, I know you and I can stop them. And we can't give up until we do.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul
__

Folks,

I wanted to take a second from fighting back against the Radical Left to tell you how much I appreciate your unwavering support this year.

This year, I announced I would be seeking re-election in 2022 for Senate. I’ve been blown away by the support I’ve received from back home in Louisiana and all across the country.
| [Contribute Here](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrto7upim37uekf4eet6muprn9pdeul9jknsbesg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sji64pr0c3h2bs)
---

There is still a lot of work to be done between now and the 2022 elections, but with patriots like yourself, the work will be easier.

If you are still feeling generous please contribute whatever you can, I promise it will go a long way in protecting your conservative values and defending the American Dream. Thank You!

In less than a year, people across this district will cast their vote in the midterms. Because of your consistent support and commitment to our mission, I'm confident today, as always, that we will win re-election in one of the most competitive seats in the country.

The strength of our campaign is a direct result of your support, and I couldn't be more grateful for it.

So as we charge forward towards next year's midterms, [_**will you contribute to our campaign and power us towards re-election?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/5qxf6Wg6DbYLqqwPNnp5E0LwwDuBXybMF2wIAEA0dCk=/4YZkfKjPR7TehtEXMjm_x8nhaNszFXzmHe29LxvXFBo=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211207-1-EM&amount=25)

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen Action
subject: Clean energy is cheap energy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
If our senators want to deal with rising fossil fuel energy costs...
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call_sen_clean_cheap_energy/?utm_source=ema_2021-12-06_call_clean_energy_is_cheap_energy_&source=ema_2021-12-06_call_clean_energy_is_cheap_energy_&t=3&akid=12921%2E53494%2E6o22tX) Friend, Skyrocketing fossil fuel prices are putting a squeeze on all of our bank accounts. Meanwhile, renewable energy sources have become the world's cheapest source of energy. Can you see where we're going with this? As fossil fuel prices grow more volatile and more expensive, solar and wind power are only getting cheaper. It's never been clearer:**Clean energy is cheap energy.** In fact, the Build Back Better Act can help unlock an average energy cost savings of $500 per year for American households. If our senators want to deal with the rising fossil fuel energy costs weighing on Americans, the best thing they can do is pass the Build Back Better Act NOW. [**_As they prepare to take up this monumental legislation, will you give your senators a call? They need to hear it loud and clear: Clean energy is cheap energy! (It's quick, easy, and impactful—and we have a call tool and a script ready for you!)_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call_sen_clean_cheap_energy/?utm_source=ema_2021-12-06_call_clean_energy_is_cheap_energy_&source=ema_2021-12-06_call_clean_energy_is_cheap_energy_&t=4&akid=12921%2E53494%2E6o22tX) | [MAKE THE CALL](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call_sen_clean_cheap_energy/?utm_source=ema_2021-12-06_call_clean_energy_is_cheap_energy_&source=ema_2021-12-06_call_clean_energy_is_cheap_energy_&t=5&akid=12921%2E53494%2E6o22tX)
---
Despite the incredible scientific breakthroughs that have made solar energy the cheapest electricity in history, Big Polluters and their Republican accomplices continue to spread disinformation about clean energy.
Here's the truth: The clean energy investments in the Build Back Better Act will save utility companies and customers across the country $9 billion each year by 2030.
We're going to do everything we can to get the truth out and fight back against the disinformation campaigns threatening our clean energy future. Right now, that starts with calling your senators and making sure they understand that clean energy is cheap energy—and that their constituents want more of it!
[**_Give your senators a quick call and let them know that you're counting on them to lower energy costs by passing the Build Back Better Act with its full suite of clean energy investments. It'll take just a minute, and it really makes a difference!_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call_sen_clean_cheap_energy/?utm_source=ema_2021-12-06_call_clean_energy_is_cheap_energy_&source=ema_2021-12-06_call_clean_energy_is_cheap_energy_&t=6&akid=12921%2E53494%2E6o22tX)
Thanks for making a call (and a difference),
Lena Moffitt
Campaigns Director, Evergreen Action
[CALL NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call_sen_clean_cheap_energy/?utm_source=ema_2021-12-06_call_clean_energy_is_cheap_energy_&source=ema_2021-12-06_call_clean_energy_is_cheap_energy_&t=7&akid=12921%2E53494%2E6o22tX)

body:

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Donald Trump's potential 2024 run
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend,

It's beyond clear that the GOP is now a political party centered exclusively on serving the interests of Donald Trump. Those Republican members who have demonstrated moral courage and intellectual honesty to defy Trump have been fleeing toward the exits. Since his election in 2016, 14 Republican Senators and 124 Republican House members have abandoned their posts defending our democracy.

Now, news reports say many of the top brass of the Republican Party are auditioning to be Trump's running mate for his increasingly likely 2024 campaign for President.

That's right, Friend: After a tumultuous administration that left our country's institutions damaged, democracy in peril, and people reeling – Donald Trump is likely running for president in 2024. And reporting from POLITICO revealed Republicans are descending on Mar-a-Lago and – in Trump's own words – "begging" him to be his vice presidential running mate.

But each and every day Trump hurtles toward announcing another bid for the White House, we learn more and more information about just how dangerous his one term in the Oval Office was: New reporting from the CIA revealed that Trump was "fact free" and went off "on tangents" in private meetings, according to former Director of National Intelligence James Clapper. The report added that briefing Trump was one of the most difficult challenges the intelligence community has ever faced, because he genuinely didn't care about the facts or the briefings. He was only interested in promoting and enriching himself.

Donald Trump is a threat to our national and domestic security, and he's a threat for democracy that's unfit for office. That's why, in the face of his potential run for President again, I need 800 grassroots Democrats to speak out and hold the disgraced former President accountable. Tell me:

Would you vote for Donald Trump in 2024?

Yes
https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-2024-poll?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1107-su-nd

No
https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-2024-poll?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1107-su-nd

Thanks for speaking out,

Dick

Contribute - https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1107-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500

--

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: FWD: We can’t believe this needs to be said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
Over the weekend, Marjorie Taylor Greene posted one of the most ignorant comments we’ve ever seen (even for Twitter). Here it is:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39439976/319854357/-825069922?refcode=20211017_tf_biglie&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjUwMTRhNi1hZDU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OtmqyS7EPv14eIIb0DCEHHnK2hXFbcF9bs0c9fuJknw=) Hi, it’s Marcus Flowers. I’m never surprised by Marjorie Taylor Greene, but I’m always deeply disturbed. **That’s exactly how I felt when I saw what she posted on Twitter over the weekend 👇👇 ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39439977/319854358/-1217423743?refcode=2021207_mf_tweet2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjUwMTRhNi1hZDU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OtmqyS7EPv14eIIb0DCEHHnK2hXFbcF9bs0c9fuJknw=) **Georgians deserve better than this kind of ignorance. That’s why I’m running against Marjorie Taylor Greene -- to offer an alternative who is committed to solving problems and producing results for my constituents. ** [**But to do this, I need your help. So I’m asking: Can you chip in $20 or more right now and help me defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene next November?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39439978/319854359/-1217423743?refcode=2021207_mf_tweet2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjUwMTRhNi1hZDU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OtmqyS7EPv14eIIb0DCEHHnK2hXFbcF9bs0c9fuJknw=) **\-----Begin forwarded message-----**
From: Defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: FWD: We can’t believe this needs to be said

Friend, the COVID hysteria has already gone on too long...

And these power-hungry bureaucrats don’t want to let go!

That’s probably why we’re hearing a lot about this new _spooky_ “omicron variant.”

But let’s be clear \- the omicron variant in South Africa, and now, California, is reported as an illness with MILD symptoms and no one has been hospitalized for it at this point.

**_But of course, Dr. Fauci and Joe Biden are using this as an excuse to take your freedoms before we even know the facts._**

We must stand strong on the side of science and refuse to allow another lockdown, more regulation, or more useless rules._If you ask me, enough is enough! If you agree, please chip in today to join my fight. _
**_By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution_**
__
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $100 **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0t9pn0mev5imtl8tk1arfqff4pcs8tmim8o9afg_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $75 **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf4ehi3frptq3aimgfo3ci0vtiv3ui3ts7e1n5u8_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $50 **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd055v26p9kp5gf9smdib04gheudc5fmva5g1tg8_)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $25 **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcrcq3oi02l71rjorl01m7bhva2bfv219au5ulqo_)
**_If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically._**
__
Friend, if we allow this nonsense of the "safety at all costs" narrative to continue, we're never going to be a free country again.

There's no vaccine, no law, and no regulation that will satisfy power-hungry leaders like Biden and Fauci. EVER.

No matter what “variant” they’re trying to scare us with, freedom must prevail.

That's why I'm putting my foot down. I will not believe the hype. I refuse to allow this chaos to become permanent, friend.

I have real power as a U.S. Senator to expose these bureaucrats and their endless theatrics, but I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength against the bureaucracy. [**Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za7jrgveu8g6cgeaf2l49c9lucc4stgn54hbkt5o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sji66oj6c1h2bs)

Together, I know you and I can stop them. And we can't give up until we do.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

body:
Hi, this is Eva and Julia Russell.
We wanted to send you a quick email to let you know about our dad and see if you can help us out.
He's the best dad in the whole wide world. He's helped so many other kids enjoy the parks in South Florida by making sure that they are clean.
Our dad also takes us to the beach ALL the time. We love the beach. Sometimes he even gets us ice cream. He's also helped make sure our water and beaches stay clean.
That's why we think he would be the best person for the job and why we are helping on his campaign. Being a Senator seems hard, but our daddy will be the best Senator for our state!
You can help him win by donating today! So that all of the kids can play in clean parks and continue to enjoy our beaches! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr?refcode=211206-email]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr?refcode=211206-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2112-q4-kr?refcode=211206-email]
Okay, bye bye!
--The Russell Girls
