name: Team Chelsea
subject: Roe v. Wade needs us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202
body:
We need your help to defend our rights
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39440318/319855844/738274465?refcode=EM_PET_211207rvw_N_TC_TC_6_NG_testb_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTM3N2VlOS1hZjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wBQ4Bjj1dE-9wFUjm8IjMBlfMSHHlFvlzOxTxqNVRIM=)
---
Team, Last week the Supreme Court heard arguments in _Dobbs v. Jackson_ — the case in which the state of Mississippi has directly challenged _Roe v. Wade_. From what we’re hearing today, it doesn’t sound good for our future. All people deserve to have the right to a choice. Decisions on when to start a family should only belong to the partners making those choices. It should never come down to the Supreme Court, or any member of our government, to tell us what we can and cannot do with our bodies. Unfortunately, Ohioans are very familiar with this reality. At all levels of our state government, people have decided to turn family planning into a political act. Especially for the most marginalized in our society: low-income women of color. But we will not be regulated to the margins of society. We have to make sure our voices are heard when we say that no matter what happens at the Supreme Court, we will always fight for Ohioans to have the right to a choice. But we need all of our supporters to make a huge splash. [**If you’re ready to keep up the fight and reject the attacks on abortion access, add your name to our campaign’s petition today. clean_body: We need your help to defend our rights | = Team, Last week the Supreme Court heard arguments in Dobbs v. Jackson — the case in which the state of Mississippi has directly challenged Roe v. Wade. From what we’re hearing today, it doesn’t sound good for our future. All people deserve to have the right to a choice. Decisions on when to start a family should only belong to the partners making those choices. It should never come down to the Supreme Court, or any member of our government, to tell us what we can and cannot do with our bodies. Unfortunately, Ohioans are very familiar with this reality. At all levels of our state government, people have decided to turn family planning into a political act. Especially for the most marginalized in our society: low-income women of color. But we will not be regulated to the margins of society. We have to make sure our voices are heard when we say that no matter what happens at the Supreme Court, we will always fight for Ohioans to have the right to a choice. But we need all of our supporters to make a huge splash. Thank you, Team Chelsea | | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure. = Paid for by Chelsea Clark For Ohio 30 Garfield Place, Suite 900, Cincinnati, OH 45202 www.chelseaforohio.com to receive fewer emails. Click here to . |

Our volunteers and supporters know we can’t just wish for change, we have to work for it. That’s why Team D’Arrigo was out hitting the streets this weekend at our holiday rally and canvass kickoff! With the help of volunteers and activists like you, we will keep this seat blue and elect a progressive who will center the needs of our families. Hey Peter, we’ll be blunt.
Omicron—the newest and most concerning COVID-19 variant yet—arrived in the US last week. It’s only a matter of time before it reaches Tennessee (if it hasn’t already), and **Bill Lee has _already_ abdicated his responsibility to protect Tennesseans.**
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39440423/319856283/1701703762?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211207omicron_TM_openers_SLA_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTk5MTE4OS1iMDU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w2XIhbKXGwabN1K4kykVX-KppBGyG7-ocYFGLgFtQ8I=)
---
Gov. Lee’s actions even in just the last month have left Tennesseeans vulnerable and unprepared to combat a new variant. Just a few weeks ago he:
* Outlawed mask mandates state-wide

* Banned local governments and businesses (including health workers) from mandating vaccines

* Announced that __our tax dollars__ would be used to cover relocation expenses for law enforcement officers fleeing strict COVID-19 vaccine mandates (basically saying, “If you’re a police officer who got fired because you refused to get the COVID-19 vaccine, come work in Tennessee!”)

You know who’s going to be on the front lines dealing with Bill Lee’s incompetence and fighting the next surge of COVID-19 cases, driven by this new Omicron variant, colder weather, and the holidays?
**Dr. Jason Martin.**
And we can guarantee that Dr. Martin will take his experience working in the ICU with him to the governorship, as a reminder of what can happen when government refuses to step up and do the right thing to protect people.
[**We cannot afford another 4 years of Lee’s recklessness and callous disregard for the lives of Tennesseans — make a donation of any amount now to help us ensure that he’s a one-term governor.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39440424/319856284/1701703762?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211207omicron_TM_openers_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTk5MTE4OS1iMDU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w2XIhbKXGwabN1K4kykVX-KppBGyG7-ocYFGLgFtQ8I=)

body:
We're back with another edition of our weekly recap email. Here's what Sully and the team have been up to! | |
---
Team,

We've got a lot of great things to share with you this week!

**🤝 PERSONNEL UPDATE**

Remember Glenn Youngkin’s epic victory in Virginia? The same people who ran Youngkin’s campaign are joining our team!

Kristin Davison, one of the masterminds behind the victory in Virginia, sees Illinois as the next big governor’s race Americans should have on their radar. We’re happy to have her aboard Team Sully!
**❗❗ CAUGHT ON TAPE**

Yikes - Governor J.B. Pritzker was caught by _Politico_ getting laughs by referring to himself as the “Governor of Chicago!”

It just goes to show that J.B. Pritzker is perfectly content to rule for the wealthy few. Growing up in Central Illinois, Sully knows what it feels like when our politicians ignore the folks outside of Chicago. Sully will be the governor for all Illinoisans.

clean_body: We're back with another edition of our weekly recap email. Here's what Sully and the team have been up to! | | Team, We've got a lot of great things to share with you this week! 🤝 PERSONNEL UPDATE Remember Glenn Youngkin’s epic victory in Virginia? The same people who ran Youngkin’s campaign are joining our team! Kristin Davison, one of the masterminds behind the victory in Virginia, sees Illinois as the next big governor’s race Americans should have on their radar. We’re happy to have her aboard Team Sully! ❗❗ CAUGHT ON TAPE Yikes - Governor J.B. Pritzker was caught by Politico getting laughs by referring to himself as the “Governor of Chicago!” It just goes to show that J.B. Pritzker is perfectly content to rule for the wealthy few. Growing up in Central Illinois, Sully knows what it feels like when our politicians ignore the folks outside of Chicago. Sully will be the governor for all Illinoisans. 📺 SULLY TV ICYMI: Sully was on Fox News to talk about Chicago’s surging crime rates. Watch the video to see what he had to say about this public safety emergency - and what we need to change in order to get Chicago back on track. 📲 SULLY ON SOCIAL Our first-ever Sully’s Shark Tank was a great success! We had some amazing Illinois entrepreneurs attend and we’re proud to . Click the video below to meet Paul & Kelly from Under Dog Sports, a small business in Springfield that specializes in selling refurbished and used sporting equipment. 📊 ILLINOIS FACT OF THE WEEK The report card is in for Illinois schools - and it’s clear that last year was a disaster. Mathematics performance dropped 18%, English performance dropped 17%, and one in five students statewide was reported as chronically absent during the school year. body:
With every conversation, I learn so much about what our community needs and how our government can be serving us better.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39441079/319859327/1720206612?refcode=BLU-PUT-20211207-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTY5NGI2YS1iMTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nfCugyLARZeEJyz2trTZ_uKleaa64H0hzsizad4wLzw=)

| One of the best parts of campaigning for Congress is connecting with people from the North Country and hearing their stories. With every conversation, I learn so much about what our community needs and how our government can be serving us better.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39441081/319859345/1720206612?refcode=BLU-PUT-20211207-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTY5NGI2YS1iMTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nfCugyLARZeEJyz2trTZ_uKleaa64H0hzsizad4wLzw=)
I have deep roots here dating back to my great-grandmother who immigrated to the U.S. and eventually opened a grocery store my parents still operate today. I owe this community so much and I’m eager to represent it in Congress, [_**but I need your support to get there.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39441083/319859347/1720206612?refcode=BLU-PUT-20211207-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTY5NGI2YS1iMTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nfCugyLARZeEJyz2trTZ_uKleaa64H0hzsizad4wLzw=)

I’m running against Elise Stefanik – a pro-Trump Republican whose campaign account most recently reached $2.6 million. But while Stefanik relies on the support of the MAGA mob and corporate donors, I rely on something far more meaningful and representative of Upstate New York: our community.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Donald=20Trump=2C=20Jr.?=
subject: I need a favor Re: Joe Kent
body:
Dear Patriot,

If you’ve opened this email from me instead of tweeting about how much it triggered you, you’re probably one of the millions of Americans who Made America Great Again by helping my father win TWO presidential elections.

For that, I thank you. I love this country and I love what we were able to do during that first term: record low unemployment, record income growth, low inflation, and a foreign policy that put America first.

Despite this, the Democrats did everything they could to block his agenda.

And this came as no surprise to us, of course. Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, AOC, and the other lunatics on the left hated my father so much and what he was trying to do for this country they did everything they could to burn it down – figuratively and literally – regardless of how much it hurt regular Americans.

But here’s the kicker: many so-called “Republicans” joined with the Democrats to slow down the MAGA agenda.

One of the ringleaders of these RINOs is Jaime Herrera Beutler from Washington’s 3rd Congressional District. She voted to block construction of the southern border wall. She voted against repealing Obamacare. She voted against withdrawing our troops from Syria, but also voted against allowing my father to deploy national guard troops to end the ANTIFA and BLM rioting in her own district.

And if that wasn’t bad enough, Jaime Herrera Beutler was one of the ten Republicans to vote to impeach my father.

But there’s good news: a real America First Republican named Joe Kent has stepped forward to run against her, and I’m so proud to join my father in giving him my full endorsement.

Will you help him today with a contribution of $50, $100, $500, $1000, $2900 or $5800? Please donate now at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/give.

Joe Kent represents everything that makes this country great. He signed up to serve in our military at a young age and earned a place in the Green Berets. He did eleven combat missions over twenty years in the Middle East before serving as a foreign policy advisor to my father.

Joe’s wife, Shannon Kent, a Navy Chief Petty officer, also served in our nation’s military until she was killed in Syria just two months after fake Republicans like Jaime Herrera Beutler blocked President Trump’s attempt to withdraw our troops from that pointless war.

I will always be grateful to Joe for the sacrifice he and his family have made for our nation. He understands that the America First foreign policy my father fought for is necessary to prevent the stupid, needless loss of lives in conflicts our country has no reason to be involved in, and that’s the wisdom he will bring to Congress.

Another serious priority for Joe is election integrity. He has pledged to lead an effort in Congress to adjudicate the 2020 General Election and fight for reforms that will prevent the abuse of our elections by corrupt government officials so we can again trust that only legitimate votes are county.

And on issue after issue, from securing the border to opposing vaccine mandates to holding hearings on the botched withdrawal in Afghanistan, Joe will be an America First leader.

Please help send this patriot to Congress with an immediate donation at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/give.

Let’s say, just hypothetically, that my father decides to run again and wins for a THIRD time and takes office. Would you rather he have to fight not just the Democrats but also RINOs like Jaime Herrera Beutler...

Or do you want him to have patriots like Joe by his side who will stand shoulder to shoulder as we push forward our renewed MAGA agenda?

Joe Kent MUST win this election. Please make the biggest donation you can afford at https://joekentforcongress.com/give.

Thank you and God Bless,

Donald Trump, Jr.

PS – Joe Kent needs your help. Please, do me a favor and give whatever you can: $50, $100, $500, $1000, $2900 or $5800 today at https://joekentforcongress.com/give.

==============================================

clean_body: Texas’ 37th district is our BEST SHOT to make progress for working families in this state. | = This is urgent, friend. I just announced my campaign for Congress in Texas' brand-new 37th Congressional District because it's critical that we win big in this Democratic-leaning Austin district if we have any hope of flipping Texas blue. = | = Texas is at a crossroads, friend. On the one hand, it’s home to right-wing GOP Governor Greg Abbott who has restricted voting rights, banned reproductive healthcare, and refuses to take accountability for the devastating power grid failure. On the other hand, Texas is also home to the fastest growing and most diverse populations in the entire country. It’s a place where single-payer health care, debt-free education, and wage increases are extremely popular and much-needed. This is our chance to shape the future of our state, and Texas’ 37th district is our BEST SHOT to make progress for working families in this state. This is how we flip Texas blue. body:
| Team: Joe Manchin continues to ROADBLOCK _essential_ legislation.
| **BREAKING NEWS UPDATE:** **Manchin tells senators he's skeptical Build Back Better can pass this year**
---
**Paid family leave, climate legislation, and Joe Biden’s ENTIRE agenda hang in the balance.**

Luckily, we have a plan: to elect more bold Democrats to weigh down his vote!

[We’re exhausted, and we’re asking for you to DEMAND Joe Manchin do what’s right and pass the Build Back Better Act »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4155?t=6&akid=994%2E878179%2EOAJsKQ)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4155?t=7&akid=994%2E878179%2EOAJsKQ)
---
TO: SENATOR JOE MANCHIN
FROM: YOU
DATE: DECEMBER 7, 2021

**Dear Senator Manchin,
** Listen up.

With the Senate majority so slim, passing Joe Biden’s agenda is going to take all Democrats standing up and working together.

President Biden’s Build Back Better bill is sitting in the Senate, waiting for your vote.

**But instead of working with your fellow Democrats, you are standing in the way of progress!**

[I’m enraged, Senator, so right now, I’m giving $2 to VPP to expand the Senate Majority -- because I REFUSE to let you stonewall all the work we need to get done »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4155?t=8&akid=994%2E878179%2EOAJsKQ) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4155?t=9&akid=994%2E878179%2EOAJsKQ)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
Enough is enough, Senator — MAGA Mitch McConnell is laughing in our faces!

**If you refuse to stand up for Democratic priorities, our only choice is to expand the Senate majority and drown out your vote.**

The people of your state _(and the whole country)_ deserve more. That’s why I’m imploring you to do the right thing and PASS the Build Back Better act.

[So right now, I’m giving $2 to VPP to do just that! It’s time to elect more Democrats who will vote to protect the American people »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4155?t=10&akid=994%2E878179%2EOAJsKQ)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4155?t=11&akid=994%2E878179%2EOAJsKQ)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
Sincerely,

**_x. A CONCERNED DEMOCRAT_**
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4155?t=12&akid=994%2E878179%2EOAJsKQ)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=994%2E878179%2EOAJsKQ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=994%2E878179%2EOAJsKQ).**

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: what Build Back Better means for families with kids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
I want to tell you more about what it does specifically for children and families with children.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39441776/319862235/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211207-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDBlNWQ3OS1iNDU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1cGm3Us2WGjJuL1p0Q0aV5aCa7jGyQJF8Ib7-rziMaE=)

| I was so proud to vote with my Democratic colleagues in the House last month to pass the historic Build Back Better Act.

This legislation lowers costs for the American people on child care, elder care, prescription drugs and health care; invests in housing that is affordable; fights child poverty; and combats climate change. Today, I want to tell you more about what it does specifically for children and families with children. Built Back Better will:
* Cut child care costs in half for millions of Americans.
* Deliver two years of free pre-school for every three- and four-year-old in America.
* Provide 35 million families with a major tax cut by expanding the Child Tax Credit.

I am so honored to have fought for these measures, which will transform our broken child care system and be monumental for families in California and across the country. As we look ahead to the 2022 midterm elections, I hope I can count on you to stand with me so I can stay in office and continue this vital work. Hello,
As a retired three-star Admiral with decades of service in the U.S. Navy, I know what a weapon of war is capable of.
It’s infuriating that we still have elected officials like my Republican opponent Chuck Grassley who block gun legislation without seemingly any care for how many people will die as a result.
The bottom line is the NRA’s campaign donations stand in the way. And it is blood money, pure and simple.
I’ll never take money from the NRA. They should just assign me an “F” right now. I will wear it proudly because I am running a campaign funded by grassroots donations – not corporate PACs or special interests. **But if I’m going to be successful in defeating Chuck Grassley next November, I need your help today.**
We’re facing our first fundraising deadline of the month and the biggest of my campaign, and right now we’re still short of our $25,000 goal. **Can I count on you to give to my campaign today so we can finally do _something_ to address the gun violence epidemic in this country?**

name: An open letter -- Distributed by TurnoutPAC | via Left Action
subject: TO: Senator Joe Manchin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Progressive Turnout Project and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | **[UNBELIEVABLE: Democrat Joe Manchin continues to stonewall President Biden’s Build Back Better Bill. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2fce0586-e360-4df8-903e-50c4ffb7daab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **
---
[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b8f7f15-0949-42d5-987e-33a0b4528ebb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
We’re so mad we’re shaking... so we’re going to slam his office with a massive open letter to demand he vote ‘YES’ on this historic bill!

[**_We’re sending this letter to his office at 8:00 AM TOMORROW, so make your voice heard and sign NOW →_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4c338686-8ede-4f09-b275-ba66b07185b3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) | | [SIGN THE LETTER NOW →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T430d29dc-6be1-4d62-a00e-a7fb5f897bad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
[**_Dear Senator Manchin,_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T869efac3-e14f-4072-9e27-4fc1f1ec92d6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

The American people have spoken: They want you to do your job and pass President Biden’s historic ‘Build Back Better’ plan!

Your vote will make or break this bill in the Senate.

So I’m begging you to vote ‘YES’ to...
* **FIGHTING** climate change,
* **EXPANDING** affordable health care,
* **BUILDING** more affordable housing,
* **PROVIDING** in-home health care through Medicaid, and
* **EXTENDING** the child tax credit and reducing child poverty.

[_I refuse to stand by while you give Mitch McConnell unlimited veto power over President Biden’s agenda._](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c90772f-dab6-4755-9069-be14b1921d44/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
[That’s why I’m signing this letter and telling you in the clearest way possible:
**You MUST support the ‘Build Back Better’ plan!** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T318702dd-0b60-4a39-b8f1-b1301755d965/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) | | [SIGN THE LETTER NOW →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8c8c0e8b-9d8c-42c4-a6bc-611c05be9f30/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

Don’t be on the wrong side of history, Senator Manchin.

[**_X _**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ba83152-32d6-4301-ab1e-5a0371849ba9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
[**** Negotiations are happening NOW, so please sign TODAY. ****](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7cc5bcc9-9d2f-4867-8754-b8edff50bb51/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for stepping up.

_[\- Progressive Turnout Project](https://default.salsalabs.org/T54e32fbf-383c-41ab-8b24-d3f971c2cd61/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_
---
Paid for by Progressive Turnout Project and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: help promote our Saddam video
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=saddam_video&n=1&v=41)
---
Friend -- "Once you've dealt with Saddam Hussein, the 'Ace of Spades,' you're not going to be intimidated by anything in Illinois politics." My role in the trial of Saddam Hussein distinguishes me from the other Governor candidates. As the lead American attorney-advisor to the Iraqi prosecutors, I have international experience and perspective that my opponents simply cannot match. But that experience is meaningless unless the voters know about it. That's why I am asking you to watch our latest video about my role in the Saddam Trial and then help us promote it. You can watch the video [here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRb3DdgLeWj8Lm7ojvcYD2F8&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=saddam_video&n=2&v=41). We will be boosting this video on social media starting on Thursday of this week. For every $50 we spend, we can reach an additional 5,000 people. As you know, I don't have the personal wealth to self-fund my campaign. I rely on donors like you to help spread our message. Please consider chipping in $10, $50, or $100 to help this video reach 1,000, 5,000, or 10,000 extra Illinois voters! You can donate [here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/donate?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=saddam_video&n=3&v=41). As always, thank you for reading and I hope you have a great week! Semper Fidelis, Paul Paul Schimpf
[http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=saddam_video&n=4&v=41)
Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to Paul.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=saddam_video&n=5&v=41).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=saddam_video&n=6&v=41) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=saddam_video&n=7&v=41).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=saddam_video&n=8&v=41), software for leaders.

subject: one question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1633%2E3611125%2ELHV_vQ ][IMG]

Folks, we only have one question:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6240?t=1007&akid=1633%2E3611125%2ELHV_vQ ]Will you rush $25 or more to help Tim reach his critical end-of-year
FEC fundraising goal?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6241?t=1014&amount=25&akid=1633%2E3611125%2ELHV_vQ ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6241?t=1015&amount=50&akid=1633%2E3611125%2ELHV_vQ ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6241?t=1016&amount=100&akid=1633%2E3611125%2ELHV_vQ ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6241?t=1017&amount=200&akid=1633%2E3611125%2ELHV_vQ ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6241?t=1018&amount=250&akid=1633%2E3611125%2ELHV_vQ ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6241?t=1019&amount=25&akid=1633%2E3611125%2ELHV_vQ ]Other Amount

If we want to expand the Democratic Senate majority and actually start
getting stuff done, we need to win here in Ohio. It’s that simple.

Ever since the Wall Street Journal called us Democrats’ most important
race and polls showed Tim neck-and-neck with his opponents, Mitch
McConnell has been laser focused on Ohio.

McConnell knows we’re standing in his way of retaking power and enacting
his dangerous agenda that rolls back the clock for women’s health, civil
rights, and worker protections.

Ohio’s open Senate seat is one of the most likely seats to flip blue but
all of that falls apart if we don’t have a strong grassroots team helping
us fight off the GOP’s attacks and spread Tim’s message to every corner of
Ohio.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6240?t=1008&akid=1633%2E3611125%2ELHV_vQ ]Will you donate $25 or more to help us reach our biggest, most
important fundraising goal of the year and post a strong FEC report? We’re
falling behind and we can’t let everything we’ve worked so hard for these

[ ]Donate $25 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $200 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other Amount If we want to expand the Democratic Senate majority and actually start getting stuff done, we need to win here in Ohio. It’s that simple. Ever since the Wall Street Journal called us Democrats’ most important race and polls showed Tim neck-and-neck with his opponents, Mitch McConnell has been laser focused on Ohio. McConnell knows we’re standing in his way of retaking power and enacting his dangerous agenda that rolls back the clock for women’s health, civil rights, and worker protections. Ohio’s open Senate seat is one of the most likely seats to flip blue but all of that falls apart if we don’t have a strong grassroots team helping us fight off the GOP’s attacks and spread Tim’s message to every corner of Ohio. [ ]Will you donate $25 or more to help us reach our biggest, most important fundraising goal of the year and post a strong FEC report? body:

Did you see my message, friend? Mike Pence is coming back to New Hampshire for the SECOND time tomorrow. New Hampshire will be one of THE MOST competitive Senate seats in the country, and Republicans are already spending BIG to win -- over $6 million so far. **With the Senate majority hinging on this seat, it's critical that we're prepared for whatever Mike Pence throws our way tomorrow.** Unlike Republicans, we don't rely on dark money super PACs and megadonors to fund our campaign. But we do depend on people like you, team, giving $5 or $10 when you can. **[So please, can you chip in $5 today to defend this vulnerable Senate seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39442229/319864200/-913685435?refcode=e20211207_pence-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjIyZjFiNC1iNzU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xDBh_KZ8Aegr7MnuQG1xb_Z8B3tFXTZ9HnijhUVVrHg=)** Here's the best link to give at: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mwh-em-dec21](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39442230/319864201/-913685435?refcode=e20211207_pence-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjIyZjFiNC1iNzU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xDBh_KZ8Aegr7MnuQG1xb_Z8B3tFXTZ9HnijhUVVrHg=)** But please hurry, because our deadline expires soon! Thank you in advance. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: **Maggie Hassan**
Date: Tue., Dec. 07, 2021
Subject: Mike Pence is returning This is urgent, team. **Mike Pence is returning to New Hampshire TOMORROW** to raise money for far-right Republicans and rally the GOP's extreme base. The last time Pence was here, he said, **"we are on the verge of another great Republican comeback...and we are going to [win back the Senate] in 2022,"** and this time will be no different. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip ONE seat to take back the majority, and national Republicans, like Pence, are making it clear New Hampshire is their top priority. My last race was the closest in the country, so my team is laser-focused on keeping our fundraising numbers up. But right now, we’re falling short. **That's why we're setting an emergency goal to raise $25,000 before Mike Pence steps on stage.** **[Can I count on you to rush $5 before midnight tonight? What you donate will help us build the resources necessary to defend this seat and protect our fragile Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39442231/319864202/-913685435?refcode=e20211207_pence-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjIyZjFiNC1iNzU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xDBh_KZ8Aegr7MnuQG1xb_Z8B3tFXTZ9HnijhUVVrHg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39442232/319864203/-913685435?refcode=e20211207_pence-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjIyZjFiNC1iNzU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xDBh_KZ8Aegr7MnuQG1xb_Z8B3tFXTZ9HnijhUVVrHg=)

[Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39442235/319864206/-913685435?refcode=e20211207_pence-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjIyZjFiNC1iNzU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xDBh_KZ8Aegr7MnuQG1xb_Z8B3tFXTZ9HnijhUVVrHg=)
Mitch McConnell, Mike Pence, and Donald Trump have a plan to flip the Senate. And, after losing this seat to me by just 1,017 votes in 2016, they’re pulling out all of the stops this time. So far, they've spent over $6 million against me.
We don’t need megadonors like Republicans to win, but we do need people like you to give $10 — or what you can right now — to show our strength.
**[Your support is critical in a race this competitive, and I’m counting on your help. So please, chip in $5 right now to protect our Democratic Senate majority? Please hurry, we don't have much time.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39442236/319864207/-913685435?refcode=e20211207_pence-kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjIyZjFiNC1iNzU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xDBh_KZ8Aegr7MnuQG1xb_Z8B3tFXTZ9HnijhUVVrHg=)**

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

body:
From the Panhandle to the Keys...

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39442265/319864428/380302539?refcode=leadershipblue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjEyY2Y4OS1iODU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qrXNaHs19W92aRxKw3FRBiWma0xcq8UC28sTLiXySq0=) Peter, This weekend, Nikki spoke at Leadership Blue, an annual conference where Florida Democrats from all over Florida meet, strategize, and organize for progress. And as the _only_ statewide elected Democrat in Florida, Nikki took the opportunity to lay out her vision for the future of our state — her vision for something new. As our next Governor, Nikki will break the rigged system that doesn’t give a damn about everyday Floridians, because that’s what she’s always done. She gets things done. She’s committed to work with local governments, collaborate with our unions, help make our state more affordable, and fight for us on everything from wages to civil rights. **But we can’t bring something new to Florida until we defeat Ron DeSantis. And there’s only one candidate who has what it takes:** **** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39442266/319864429/380302539?refcode=leadershipblue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjEyY2Y4OS1iODU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qrXNaHs19W92aRxKw3FRBiWma0xcq8UC28sTLiXySq0=) [**Nikki is ready to beat DeSantis, break our rigged system, and bring something new to Florida. clean_body: From the Panhandle to the Keys... = Peter, This weekend, Nikki spoke at Leadership Blue, an annual conference where Florida Democrats from all over Florida meet, strategize, and organize for progress. And as the only statewide elected Democrat in Florida, Nikki took the opportunity to lay out her vision for the future of our state — her vision for something new. As our next Governor, Nikki will break the rigged system that doesn’t give a damn about everyday Floridians, because that’s what she’s always done. She gets things done. She’s committed to work with local governments, collaborate with our unions, help make our state more affordable, and fight for us on everything from wages to civil rights. But we can’t bring something new to Florida until we defeat Ron DeSantis. And there’s only one candidate who has what it takes: ** = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for your support. — Team Nikki ** Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor Nikki Fried for Governor 6619 S Dixie Hwy No. 148 Miami, FL 33143 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

The Senate race in Georgia will go down to the wire. Democrats are going to spend whatever it takes to keep their politician in the Senate. Take a look at the panicked email they recently sent:

Our campaign is being aggressive in our fundraising, but we're behind our December goal - by a significant amount. We hate writing emails like this nearly a year from Election Day, **but we must hit every fundraising goal along the way if we're going to have the necessary funds to win next November.**

**[In an effort to get back on course, we're asking 1,500 conservatives to make a donation of $10 or more before midnight tonight.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=94a01f3506bc4412aa167cb927fb4d9a&_e=oFzrydT9_vqo8Mk7ER9oUl5aF4JELIVoW72tWHaymeg6cs-3Un21QJG8bV2c0U7-5AUTidsmNj1BqjGmcDKLcOD2eqTxD-o3PlBiKWsfAVRDfSEDv_yH4aLzw4bp6hfyyRJA28GB4jzgONdEVvJFD_rxgQMv3CmmFoLDRc34gH6VHcC4bqVLoYywhhvnack_f3WtZ8FD6sqffC4avekV_kbCTJfHp3qvU5BMuCSOBCs_4R90HTf7c9YYbSsizk7cok5amuBs18xl8bdyVQowQ5vvBdZTpmxhnqHP1lZ-gNF2Sv5f2qPfJ4Pd6eNSWuJsNFthyuEwPPK4vMpHDrFehJbcZaCIql901vIg4K9Vsj6erVeDjRKBBxzFKE34MacESaUxrr-Vriz5WsI8KT3lLgKpeeT71oGz9n2oVWNv8Xyl0mMa3QXEe929mdfY7Di_rH7wGuXsuOco3SywxGMyYQ%3D%3D)**

_The last thing that we want is for complacency to set in. While some conservatives believe we have the wind at our back after Republicans swept the top races in Virginia, that doesn't translate into automatic victory next year. Far from it._

**We must block, tackle, and excel at the basics of campaigning - like raising money, organizing volunteers, and registering voters - to win. **

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: Remembering Pearl Harbor, Honoring Our Heroes, and Protecting Innocent Life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
Today, December 7th, 2021, marks the 80th anniversary of the Japanese attack on the American naval base at Pearl Harbor in Honolulu. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/campaign-update-12-07-21?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=0340bb891f&e=823fa8e224)
---
| Dear Friends,
---
| | Today, December 7th, 2021, marks the 80th anniversary of the Japanese attack on the American naval base at Pearl Harbor in Honolulu. When President Roosevelt addressed a joint session of congress and the American people the following day, he said, "Hostilities exist. There is no blinking at the fact that our people, our territory, and our interests are in grave danger." Eighty years later, America is allied with Japan, but there remain grave dangers facing our people, our territory, and our interests. These dangers come from many sources including the Communist Regime that holds power in China, religious fundamentalists in Iran, and radical leftists and their RINO allies here at home. Yesterday brought us the news that outgoing New York City mayor Bill de Blasio has mandated all private sector employees in the city receive the covid vaccine. He has also decreed that 5-11-year-old children must be vaccinated in order to participate in activities such as sports, band, orchestra, and dance. Right here in Idaho, we have already lost many talented healthcare workers, first responders, scientists, and technicians to vaccine mandates that are forcing Idahoans out of their careers, and this problem continues to escalate. The last two years are a period of American history that will live in infamy due to the sustained attack against our rights and liberties perpetrated by members of both major political parties. While we may be inclined to blame the left, we must not forget the many Republican politicians, like Brad Little, who ordered lockdowns and those who continue to support — or at least enable — vaccine mandates in most states. President Roosevelt concluded his address with an appeal to the Almighty, saying, "With the unbounding determination of our people we will gain the inevitable triumph so help us God." I too believe in the spirit and determination of the American people and in our ability to take this country back and to restore the rights and liberties that we have lost. We can't do it alone, though. We must put our faith in God and call on him to aid our righteous cause. At the Constitutional Convention, Benjamin Franklin said, "The longer I live, the more convincing proofs I see of this truth: that God governs in the affairs of man." I know this is true, and I thank God every day for his guidance and protection.
---
|
## Remembering Our Heroes
---
| For three years, Idaho's Gold Star Moms have shared their hearts by displaying the Tribute to Fallen Soldiers Christmas Tree at the Capitol. These mothers work tirelessly to keep these heroes' memories alive. Please take some time to stop by and see the beautiful memorial to remind us that Freedom and Liberty are ALWAYS worth the fight! To our Gold Star Mothers, I thank you for your service and sacrifice. God bless your hearts. We love you!
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
## Protecting Innocent Life
---
| As you may know, the U.S. Supreme Court is considering an important case related to states' ability to protect life. The case is _Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization_ , and it involves a Mississippi state law, which would ban the intentional killing of preborn babies after fifteenth weeks of pregnancy in most cases. Whatever the outcome of this case, abortion will still be legal in every state in this country for several months at least. Arizona State Sen. Wendy Rogers put it well in a recent [tweet](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=1e7fd85034&e=823fa8e224) where she said, "Abortion is the moral national stain of our time, for which we should repent and cry out to God." She pointed out that "Our country has embraced a godless, self-centered, me-first culture that sacrifices innocent babies on the altar of convenience." I am proud to stand in support of Mississippi's law and in support of conservative efforts across the country to defend innocent life. Idaho should be taking the lead on this issue rather than hanging back and waiting for other states to fight the battle, and under a McGeachin administration, Idaho WILL take meaningful action to protect the lives of preborn babies. _**Idaho needs a Governor who stands for conservative values ALL of the time, not just when it's convenient.**_ Please donate [**$25**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=af390d2a1c&e=823fa8e224), [**$50**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=2b082d2c37&e=823fa8e224), or [**$100**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=65a4d9f558&e=823fa8e224) today to help Make Idaho Free Again and to replace a career politician with a proven conservative leader.
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=5ff5c8bbb4&e=823fa8e224 "DONATE NOW!")
---
| Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=23fb0a852b&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=6e85a0c55f&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=ebe3f7f5a2&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=cd61196497&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=fc4261302a&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.
---
| Sincerely,
Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---

body:
Our opponent has already raised over $1,000,000 so we really need to start making progress to close that gap.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39442366/319865895/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2021.12.07_b2_bday2_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDZjNWRjZC1iOTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9NEZyvbkSz6CrW3INA8-pVqFxOQnXt-pABY5h53LGAQ=)

Friends --

Today is my birthday, and I’m so grateful to have received so much love and support from supporters like you. I wish I could call each and every one of you to say thank you.

My team let me in on the secret that they asked you all to help us hit our goal of $5,400 for my 54th birthday. I’m blown away!

Look -- this is about a lot more than my birthday. The reality is, at the end of the month all of our numbers will be made public. And everyone will use that number to judge the strength of our campaign.

Our opponent has already raised over $1,000,000 so we really need to start making progress to close that gap.

**[So as my birthday wish, I would be eternally grateful if you chipped in $5 to my campaign today. Can I count on you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39442367/319865897/-1995343361?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2021.12.07_b2_bday2_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2021.12.07_b2_bday2_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDZjNWRjZC1iOTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9NEZyvbkSz6CrW3INA8-pVqFxOQnXt-pABY5h53LGAQ=)** | [GIVE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39442368/319865900/-1995343361?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2021.12.07_b2_bday2_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2021.12.07_b2_bday2_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDZjNWRjZC1iOTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9NEZyvbkSz6CrW3INA8-pVqFxOQnXt-pABY5h53LGAQ=)

clean_body: Our opponent has already raised over $1,000,000 so we really need to start making progress to close that gap. | = Friends -- Today is my birthday, and I’m so grateful to have received so much love and support from supporters like you. I wish I could call each and every one of you to say thank you. My team let me in on the secret that they asked you all to help us hit our goal of $5,400 for my 54th birthday. I’m blown away! Look -- this is about a lot more than my birthday. The reality is, at the end of the month all of our numbers will be made public. And everyone will use that number to judge the strength of our campaign. Our opponent has already raised over $1,000,000 so we really need to start making progress to close that gap. = | = = = = = = Thanks for everything! clean_body: We can win this race and win back the Senate majority, but we need your help. We can win this race and win back the Senate majority, but we need your help. | Fellow American - my Democrat opponent is on Twitter asking his followers for campaign donations. My opponent doesn't understand that his voting record doesn't match the values of Georgians, so I called him out for it! THAT'S why he has been called "the most vulnerable Senate Democrat." Fellow American, we can win this race and win back the Senate majority, but we need your immediate help. We need more folks to stand with us and help change the future of our country, so please join our team today. Herschel | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. [1] Donald Trump appointed his crony, Louis DeJoy to DEMOLISH the Post Office and END Vote by Mail. [2] Mitch McConnell is BLOCKING efforts to SAVE the USPS -- he’s IGNORING Biden’s nominations and SLASHING funding for this American institution. [3] We need 25 more local Democrats to step up and pitch in to help us save the Post Office before midnight. | | We thought the Post Office would recover after President Biden announced his plans to remove Louis DeJoy... Louis DeJoy has already WREAKED HAVOC on the USPS this holiday season >> It’s crystal clear that Louis DeJoy is going to run the Post Office to the ground before he leaves. | | | | | | Democracy is at stake. Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . I flipped THIS New Mexico seat last cycle; they think my win was just a flook and that they can defeat me this time around. They FAILED, but they proved just how far they are willing to go to defeat conservatives across the nation.There is no telling what they will do to defeat me... name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Tell Pres. Biden: Cancel Student Loan Debt
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

More than 45 million people owing more than $1.8 trillion: That’s the
student loan debt crisis in America. With one swipe of the pen, President
Biden could cancel that debt and free a generation of people from the
crushing burden of student loan debt.

Unless Biden cancels student debt now, loan payments will begin again on
February 1st.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86189?t=1002&akid=20864%2E1203867%2EhTIpXd ]Can you add your name to our call for President Biden to take action
and end student debt before 2/1/22? The White House can’t wait any longer
to help the people. It’s just a swipe of the pen for so much debt relief.

Add your name

At Justice Democrats, we firmly believe in an Economy for All — an
important part of this position is canceling student loan debt. Tens of
millions of people in America are held back by mountains of student debt.
The $1.8 trillion of student loan debt deepens the racial and class divide
in this country, and deepens the struggle felt by so many households.

President Biden and his entire administration has a chance to change all
of that. Biden has the power to do it. And we need him to use that power
now.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86189?t=1003&akid=20864%2E1203867%2EhTIpXd ]Peter, can you
sign on to our action urging President Biden to cancel student loan debt
immediately. Millions will have to start repaying their burdensome student
loans on 2/1/22 if he does nothing.

Add your name

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1004&akid=20864%2E1203867%2EhTIpXd ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1005&akid=20864%2E1203867%2EhTIpXd ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211207-20864-footer&t=1006&refcode2=20864_1203867_hTIpXd&akid=20864%2E1203867%2EhTIpXd

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=20864%2E1203867%2EhTIpXd

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Dudley Brown
subject: Breaking: Schumer-McConnell Deal to Nuke Filibuster could lead to Gun Control
body:
There's very little time to explain. Details are emerging about a new "deal" in Washington D.C., that could carve a path for ra
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrdisls07olejuil5roq133tpco70ab5c7o3jn00_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjh68or2clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onl69pn0oj76lineclhcgom6orkmqoecc32c9pn2tj769obcs5gephr5cb4c4qm0puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc3n6kqefclhcooj1cr46uobapbi4no)

Fellow Patriot,

There's very little time to explain.

Details are emerging about a new "deal" in Washington D.C., that could carve a path for radical gun control to make its way to Joe Biden's desk.

Right now, Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell are allegedly floating a proposal to nuke the Senate Filibuster by side-stepping Senate Rules altogether.

If the deal is made, it could be the end to Senate rules as we know them and enable Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer to fast-track every radical proposal - especially gun control - to President Biden's desk.

**That 's why I need you to call your U.S. Senators right now at (202) 224-3121 and tell them to "vote NO on the Schumer-McConnell Deal to weaken the filibuster and change Senate Rules**."
***** When you're done, call Mitch McConnell at (202) 224-2541 and urge him to abandon his Filibuster deal immediately**.
The only reason universal gun registration didn't become law in 2013 was because of the U.S. Senate's Filibuster - which requires 60 votes to end debate on any controversial measure.

Thanks to the efforts of pro-gun Senators like Rand Paul and Mike Lee and National Association for Gun Rights members like you, we've beaten back every major federal gun control effort since then.

_But if this current so-called Schumer-McConnell deal goes through, it would be a blueprint to enable EVERY gun control attempt under the sun to follow the same path_.

Reports are the House and Senate will stick a provision into the National Defense Appropriation Act (NDAA) to enable a so-called "one-time-only" rule change by law in the Senate lowering the number of votes necessary to raise the debt ceiling.

Mark my words, if they can do it for the debt ceiling, they WILL do it on gun control too.

It's just a matter of time.

After all, we've seen this "it's just one-time-only" excuse before.

In 2013 Harry Reid nuked the filibuster as a "one-time-only" excuse to enable President Obama's anti-gun lower-level judges to get confirmed.

It has been expanded TWICE since.

Now, with all pressure on to find some excuse to nuke the filibuster for debt ceiling legislation, lawmakers are squirming for a way to sneak it in code without having to accept responsibility for the long-term consequences to freedom.

That's why the Schumer-McConnell deal is so dangerous.

If they establish this process now, tomorrow they could stick in a provision to the NDAA or any other bill declaring by law that _H.R. 8 Universal Gun Registration_ , or _S.506 Dianne Feinstein 's "Red Flag" Gun Confiscation bill_ can pass the Senate with Vice President Kamala Harris as the tie-breaker.

**That 's why I need you to call your U.S. Senators right now at (202) 224-3121 and tell them to "vote NO on the Schumer-McConnell Deal to weaken the filibuster and change Senate Rules**."
***** When you're done, call Mitch McConnell at (202) 224-2541 and urge him to abandon his Filibuster deal immediately.**
_What happens in the next few days could chart the course of history in the U.S. Senate, and with it your Second Amendment rights and every other freedom you value_.

The fact is all of our cherished constitutionally-protected rights hang by a thread in the Senate.

Sadly, they probably do have 51 votes to take them away.

But, at least for now, they do NOT have 60 votes.

And the moment Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans sign off on a deal to chip away at the 60-vote filibuster or side-step it by creating a new process is the moment our gun rights hang in the balance.

**_So please, do not wait_**.

**_Call your lawmakers at the numbers above or contact the capitol switchboard at (202) 224-3121 -- and ask to be connected to your Senators and to oppose the Schumer-McConnell Deal_**.

Don't wait. Please act now.

**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
President
National Association for Gun Rights**

P.S. Right now, Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell are allegedly floating a proposal that could be used to fast-track gun control to President Biden's desk.

**Call your U.S. Senators right now at (202) 224-3121 and tell them to "vote NO on the Schumer-McConnell Deal to weaken the filibuster and change Senate Rules**."
***** When you're done, call Mitch McConnell at (202) 224-2541 and urge him to abandon his Filibuster deal immediately.**
**[And if you can, please help us get the word out to more liberty-loving gun owners by chipping in $50 or $35 to the National Association for Gun Rights](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z49i90b68qe9bp6krrt0o32or0fjasandbbcnri8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjh68or2clh2bs)**.

If you still need to, **[please renew your membership for 2022 by clicking here](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhuehjg4r7r95ck2h99dlh9ddrqtj4720lf7neto_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjh68or2clh2bs)**.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0v8660ssn8rto9ooq7qp0876heeb1lru2r12pi8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjh68or2clh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3ac1e4p856n5sutiuh2vlseepa31l0ev0lsqrso_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjh68or2clh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8u3l8eu0h6jep76nbre209vca5volucucgkv7m0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjh68or2clh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7vlgudpc6khhg9kjd561cedgvcsklle386ht2dg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjh68or2clh2bs)
---

Box 1776, Loveland, Colorado 80539. They can be contacted toll-free at 1-877-405-4570. Its web address is [www.NationalGunRights.org](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhgp25g4k8vb5tfio87rb40mk83g8007gs6ltaj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0sjh68or2clh2bs)

Call your lawmakers at the numbers above or contact the capitol switchboard at (202) 224-3121 -- and ask to be connected to your Senators and to oppose the Schumer-McConnell Deal. Don't wait. Please act now. For Freedom, Dudley Brown President National Association for Gun Rights P.S. Right now, Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell are allegedly floating a proposal that could be used to fast-track gun control to President Biden's desk. Call your U.S. Senators right now at (202) 224-3121 and tell them to "vote NO on the Schumer-McConnell Deal to weaken the filibuster and change Senate Rules." *** When you're done, call Mitch McConnell at (202) 224-2541 and urge him to abandon his Filibuster deal immediately. . | | Folks, My team and I just found out that Cook Political Report just rated our race a “Toss Up." I won’t sugar coat it: **this isn’t something we want to hear less than a year out from the election.** Right now, we’ve got 6 Republican opponents on our tails and we’re fighting to protect our legislative wins in 2022 and beyond. **Nevada’s future will be determined by what we do next. We need to out-organize and out-mobilize the National Republicans who are counting on this movement losing steam.** **[If we can continue building on our grassroots coalition, we can defy the odds and Keep Nevada Blue. I’m humbly asking for your support. When we made history in 2018 and elected Nevada’s first Democratic governor in nearly two decades, **_we knew that the battle was far from over._**
This new rating shows that the GOP isn’t backing down -- and they’re ready to open the war chest and spend unlimited resources to keep pushing the needle in their favor.
**While** **my opponents are relying on dark money Super PACs to power their campaigns --****_my campaign remains powered by grassroots donations from supporters like you._**__
Your contributions make it possible for us to go toe to toe with all 6 of my opponents, and stay in the fight for battleground Nevada.

clean_body: | | | | | Folks, My team and I just found out that Cook Political Report just rated our race a “Toss Up." I won’t sugar coat it: this isn’t something we want to hear less than a year out from the election. Right now, we’ve got 6 Republican opponents on our tails and we’re fighting to protect our legislative wins in 2022 and beyond. Nevada’s future will be determined by what we do next. We need to out-organize and out-mobilize the National Republicans who are counting on this movement losing steam. | | | | | | | | | | | | | When we made history in 2018 and elected Nevada’s first Democratic governor in nearly two decades, we knew that the battle was far from over. This new rating shows that the GOP isn’t backing down -- and they’re ready to open the war chest and spend unlimited resources to keep pushing the needle in their favor. While my opponents are relying on dark money Super PACs to power their campaigns --my campaign remains powered by grassroots donations from supporters like you. Your contributions make it possible for us to go toe to toe with all 6 of my opponents, and stay in the fight for battleground Nevada. | | | | | | | | | | | | Glad to have you in this fight, Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. Box 850 Las Vegas, NV 89125 mailto:info@stevesisolak.com | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Sisolak for Nevada, please .

| Dear Friend, **Your voice matters. Your reach is powerful. And Becky needs your help!** As we end this year and this final fundraising quarter, we need strong financial support heading into campaign crunch time. Beating Lee won’t happen without each of us coming together in our own way to answer a need. **One of the best ways you can support is to help others do so too! ** _We’re asking you to share with friends and family why you have donated to Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate (and if you haven’t contributed yet, you can donate[here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=3d0bc220b4&e=10c1db3257))._ Donors like you from across the state have shared reasons for contributing:
* You know Becky has a 10-year legislative track record of effective leadership
* You know she listens to her constituents
* You understand campaigns require a lot of money to be successful
* You know Becky does the hard work to find common ground
* You are ready for someone better than Mike Lee

**Regardless of your reason, can you take time today to let others know you are #TeamBecky?** Use the image below to email your holiday card list or post on social media and write, _I donated to Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate because_ ... and finish the statement using any of the above reasons or any of your personal reasons. Tag @beckyforutah #teambecky and encourage your friends and family to do the same!

Bringing Better Leadership to the U.S Senate starts with each one of us and Becky couldn’t do it without you!

name: Cora Neumann
subject: Union workers in Montana need our help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39442979/319877237/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzM5M2QwZS1iZTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ua4jOXtEsq9oqd5Yf8o5bXord2iOF4lRBUfMpl7xW4M=) Friend,

I want to shed light on an important issue facing Montana workers.

**Right now, Governor Greg Gianforte is proposing a rule that would result in one journeyman -- a fully trained union worker -- being responsible for the training and safety of up to five apprentices.**

Put simply, labor unions are at risk of being weakened under this policy.

While it may seem innocuous, this rule could create dangerous and unsustainable working conditions for union workers. Not to mention it opens doors for companies to exploit workers by hiring less-trained apprentices to do the work of more experienced journeymen.

**A public hearing is scheduled tomorrow about this new rule, and we need you to help amplify the voices of union workers and their families against it.**

**[Montana apprentices and journey workers need your help to protect their wages and the quality of their training. Please sign our petition OPPOSING Gianforte’s rule change.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39442980/319877238/-814708377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzM5M2QwZS1iZTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ua4jOXtEsq9oqd5Yf8o5bXord2iOF4lRBUfMpl7xW4M=&emci=eab82a08-be57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=e7393d0e-be57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=37373330)** | **[Sign Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39442981/319877239/-814708377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzM5M2QwZS1iZTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ua4jOXtEsq9oqd5Yf8o5bXord2iOF4lRBUfMpl7xW4M=&emci=eab82a08-be57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=e7393d0e-be57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=37373330)**
---
This is an issue close to my heart. My own father was badly injured and eventually passed away because of unsafe labor conditions at the lumber mill he worked at.

That was decades ago, and we can’t risk allowing what happened to my family to continue happening to others.

**[Thanks for making your voice heard. Sign on the petition today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39442982/319877240/-814708377?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzM5M2QwZS1iZTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ua4jOXtEsq9oqd5Yf8o5bXord2iOF4lRBUfMpl7xW4M=&emci=eab82a08-be57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=e7393d0e-be57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=37373330)**

Thanks friend,

Cora
**[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39442984/319877242/102973118?refcode=em-12.7.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzM5M2QwZS1iZTU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ua4jOXtEsq9oqd5Yf8o5bXord2iOF4lRBUfMpl7xW4M=)**
---
Paid for by Cora for Montana

clean_body: | = Friend, I want to shed light on an important issue facing Montana workers. Right now, Governor Greg Gianforte is proposing a rule that would result in one journeyman -- a fully trained union worker -- being responsible for the training and safety of up to five apprentices. Put simply, labor unions are at risk of being weakened under this policy. While it may seem innocuous, this rule could create dangerous and unsustainable working conditions for union workers. Not to mention it opens doors for companies to exploit workers by hiring less-trained apprentices to do the work of more experienced journeymen. A public hearing is scheduled tomorrow about this new rule, and we need you to help amplify the voices of union workers and their families against it. | This is an issue close to my heart. My own father was badly injured and eventually passed away because of unsafe labor conditions at the lumber mill he worked at. That was decades ago, and we can’t risk allowing what happened to my family to continue happening to others. Thanks friend, Cora = Paid for by Cora for Montana Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. To learn more about Cora, visit her website Consider supporting Cora's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Cora for Montana PO Box 428 Bozeman, MT 59771 United States

name: Team Engel
subject: Pima GOP: "DO NOT talk about competitiveness"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39443132/319880432/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2RiMmQ1Zi1iZjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LhinpUocOJF10h0VbvwonHjm0XPPZJpl3mmGh-RFyyI=&emci=875677d4-ab57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=43db2d5f-bf57-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12898431)
---
Dear friend,
Arizona's Independent Redistricting Commission draws new congressional and legislative lines every ten years. This is an important process designed to remove partisan politics from the important job of creating new districts every decade. **We believe strongly that the people should choose their elected representatives, not the other way around.**
So when we read the latest email from the Pima GOP, our jaws dropped. **They're asking people to support gerrymandered maps that favor their partisan agenda.** But that's not the surprising part.
The **Pima GOP even told supporters to avoid using the word "competitiveness" **when lobbying the commission, claiming that competitiveness is the least important criteria to consider when drawing maps.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39443133/319880433/558373307?refcode=X_120721_Competitiveness&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2RiMmQ1Zi1iZjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LhinpUocOJF10h0VbvwonHjm0XPPZJpl3mmGh-RFyyI=)
---
First of all, that is factually incorrect. **The law states that all criteria must be considered, including competitiveness, **and none may be given more or less weight than the others. So competitiveness, compactness, population, geography, communities of interest, and Voting Rights Act compliance should all be considered by the commission.
Competitive districts are good. The law says so, and we agree. This should be a fair and transparent process.
[**If you agree, we hope you will support our campaign by rushing a contribution today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39443134/319880434/558373307?refcode=X_120721_Competitiveness&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2RiMmQ1Zi1iZjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LhinpUocOJF10h0VbvwonHjm0XPPZJpl3mmGh-RFyyI=)These are the tactics we're up against and we need your help.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39443135/319880435/41694283?refcode=X_120721_Competitiveness&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2RiMmQ1Zi1iZjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LhinpUocOJF10h0VbvwonHjm0XPPZJpl3mmGh-RFyyI=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39443136/319880436/41694283?refcode=X_120721_Competitiveness&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2RiMmQ1Zi1iZjU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LhinpUocOJF10h0VbvwonHjm0XPPZJpl3mmGh-RFyyI=)

If you're able to, sign up to volunteer during a time slot below, and come together with a huge push during a critical time for our mission. If we get enough volunteers during this big weekend, Joe will be well on his way to being the next Governor of Nevada!

Friend — we wanted to warn you.

Democrats like Joe Biden and J.B. Pritzker are preemptively whipping the public into a panic, and apparently, nothing is off the table, _**including more failed anti-freedom lockdowns!**_

We’ve spent the last year watching how unsuccessful lockdowns were for public health, but they were successful in:

** ❌ Shutting Down Small Businesses**
** ❌ Stagnating the American Economy**
** ❌ Disrupting our Children’s Education**

The Pritzker Administration has declared open season on individual freedom and the rights of small businesses, and that’s exactly what these lockdowns are forー[ _**Join Darin in Telling Pritzker: ‘No New Lockdowns’ >>**_](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=d418fc0518504728b8c5eff62a148eb8&_e=U4IzRrBc-0Uv-1Mhrph5_Go9_i41wyPxow1r6hp73UP6ShrJQNLMCm8rzpL8vB52U-Swqkt-7QQ0IgQaUOloDuu911Gc6BaNcK2POwfkylCF-YYkvqupX4r4PTG31pbDQ1xLZWWwzI79xCyCfLhGjaPZ4z7afneaScQNEId16-IMVcjRI6_6iYsPtLIQQVZEpRB-uF6bWSZK00rI35cbtQZE3-FgHNhoIA6udjPpAf-HZoD88Rjk-w5CS9x2W-gZrTKVeWv-ImkDG7xvGo1b-rw7xo75zX6hBlECPuC6yHbn-77tXInLyve0FlCS7vlV_Kr9DCnBmy20AbB35p-C9zFUPsBxaypxnIQMoKwl2rgjptn_dErNKoNBjAv5OftlDMy3R0RuRaLskFVsP4TVFxW1D5_afCKopwKp3Orr6dJGEaTFt2Z3aXO_ZN5I5q6g9XTn4xgPIZsH7Vy762uxPoLiTLKftxsBV7Ff6B8D2O2RJTzcMK11U3r4mAdCbkiu)
