name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Help me fight back against the Washington Post
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
The ComPost attacks |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4e1c8bc3d1&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I am writing you today with grave news. Right as the meat of the 2022 election campaign for Secretary of State candidates is heating up nation wide, the media is going on a full-blown assault against Election Integrity Patriots. [_And I need your help to fight back!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=59ce904b2a&e=44b8c466b0)

**And of these races, no state is more important than what happens in the Arizona Secretary of State race, the epicenter of 2020 election fraud. [_This is why I, Mark Finchem, am doing everything I can to win this seat for Election Integrity Conservatives in 2022._](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2e2561540b&e=44b8c466b0)**

I have been leading the vanguard not only in America’s audit in Maricopa, which highlighted and revealed unprecedented election fraud which lead to President Trump’s illegal loss in his campaign for re-election, but I have also been developing foolproof safeguard measures such as watermarking ballots to secure our elections for good.

**And the mainstream media has been attacking me for a year because of this.**

**_And now they are doubling down._**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4a64845ad5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| The _Washington Post_ just released this hit piece on me and many campaigns such as mine for election integrity.

About me, the _Washington Post_ writes:

_Bolick’s primary challenger, Mark Finchem, is a leading driver of a conspiracy theory that the election was stolen in Arizona’s second-largest county, Pima County. He is a state House lawmaker and introduced a bill to let Republican lawmakers get hold of voter data there. “I expect to see criminal prosecution out of it,” he said, without citing any evidence._

**Conspiracy theory? There is ample proof that there was fraud. The only conspiracy is to pretend there wasn’t.**

**_And of course I expect to see criminal prosecution of it! I demand PERP WALKS! _**

But this is revealing...

Logically, given that I have been one of the loudest and most active in the nation in terms of constantly providing new evidence, they say I have provided none.
This means there are only two options.
1. They have neither read nor watched literally anything that I have put out.
2. They KNOW I have provided the evidence but they are trying to brainwash into believing that it doesn’t exist.

**Now, logic would tell me that they know what I’ve said, given the main stream media’s countless hit pieces against me this year.**

_Which means this is a targeted propaganda campaign by the left._

Fortunately for us, they make their aim very clear.

_The ultimate win for them would be to put in place secretaries of state, who oversee how elections are conducted in most states and sign off on the results. More than any other category of elected official, secretaries of state could be instrumental in overturning the popular vote in their state — an unprecedented move in American history — or take other actions that throw results into question._

_Ahead of the 2022 elections, there are a number of viable Republican candidates in states that could decide the next presidential election who question whether Trump actually lost in 2020. And they are proposing big changes to how elections are run._

This is what they don’t want to have happen.

**This is their agenda:**
* Don’t let Election Integrity Conservatives oversee how elections are conducted, or sign off on them.
* They don’t want us to overthrow fraudulent elections that have been falsely and illegally declared.
* They don’t want Conservatives to decide the next Presidential Elections.
* They don’t want Conservatives to look into 2020 fraud.
* And definitely don’t want changes to the system that allowed fraud in the first place!

_They make all of this abundantly clear in the above two paragraphs._

**So right now, the question is clear. Will we let the Washington Post and Liberal-Propaganda Fake News Media dictate this election? [Or will we make sure that can never happen?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cb911663bb&e=44b8c466b0)**

**_And this takes money. [This is why we have a crucial end of quarter deadline coming up. We need to raise $50,000 to put us in a good position for 2022. Can you help with a generous donation today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8ec03be9ee&e=44b8c466b0)_**

clean_body: The ComPost attacks | | | | | Dear , I am writing you today with grave news. Right as the meat of the 2022 election campaign for Secretary of State candidates is heating up nation wide, the media is going on a full-blown assault against Election Integrity Patriots. And of these races, no state is more important than what happens in the Arizona Secretary of State race, the epicenter of 2020 election fraud. I have been leading the vanguard not only in America’s audit in Maricopa, which highlighted and revealed unprecedented election fraud which lead to President Trump’s illegal loss in his campaign for re-election, but I have also been developing foolproof safeguard measures such as watermarking ballots to secure our elections for good. And the mainstream media has been attacking me for a year because of this. And now they are doubling down. | | The Washington Post just released this hit piece on me and many campaigns such as mine for election integrity. About me, the Washington Post writes: Bolick’s primary challenger, Mark Finchem, is a leading driver of a conspiracy theory that the election was stolen in Arizona’s second-largest county, Pima County. He is a state House lawmaker and introduced a bill to let Republican lawmakers get hold of voter data there. “I expect to see criminal prosecution out of it,” he said, without citing any evidence. Conspiracy theory? There is ample proof that there was fraud. The only conspiracy is to pretend there wasn’t. And of course I expect to see criminal prosecution of it! I demand PERP WALKS! But this is revealing... Logically, given that I have been one of the loudest and most active in the nation in terms of constantly providing new evidence, they say I have provided none. This means there are only two options. 1. They have neither read nor watched literally anything that I have put out. 2. They KNOW I have provided the evidence but they are trying to brainwash into believing that it doesn’t exist. Now, logic would tell me that they know what I’ve said, given the main stream media’s countless hit pieces against me this year. Which means this is a targeted propaganda campaign by the left. Fortunately for us, they make their aim very clear. The ultimate win for them would be to put in place secretaries of state, who oversee how elections are conducted in most states and sign off on the results. More than any other category of elected official, secretaries of state could be instrumental in overturning the popular vote in their state — an unprecedented move in American history — or take other actions that throw results into question. Ahead of the 2022 elections, there are a number of viable Republican candidates in states that could decide the next presidential election who question whether Trump actually lost in 2020. And they are proposing big changes to how elections are run. This is what they don’t want to have happen. This is their agenda: Don’t let Election Integrity Conservatives oversee how elections are conducted, or sign off on them. They don’t want us to overthrow fraudulent elections that have been falsely and illegally declared. They don’t want Conservatives to decide the next Presidential Elections. They don’t want Conservatives to look into 2020 fraud. And definitely don’t want changes to the system that allowed fraud in the first place! They make all of this abundantly clear in the above two paragraphs. So right now, the question is clear. Will we let the Washington Post and Liberal-Propaganda Fake News Media dictate this election? That is exactly what I am trying to accomplish here in Arizona. And this takes money. | | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. subject: I'm going to FIRE Nancy Pelosi

Elise Stefanik and I know the path to a Republican House majority runs through this race in Nevada’s 3rd Congressional District. Peter,

Last week, Rep. Elise Stefanik selected me from a pool of more than 200 Republican women who have filed to run for election in 2022 as an E-PAC endorsed candidate. **She introduced me as a _“Rising Star”_ who will play a critical role in the GOP’s fight to take back the House** - _what an absolute honor!_

In 2020, Republicans elected a RECORD number of women and we are well on our way to electing more GOP women leaders in 2022. Republican women may be outnumbered 89 to 31 in the House right now, but [**we are here and ready to take back the majority and FIRE Nancy Pelosi in 2022.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f229e01798304939ab40feef121c2ee9&_e=hoQ8SO5Qzz7yLHAQHaxEdNvxqYSfKZWTac57HVLdkfsDWdyIfUR7InHchtEAZR7HOUS-U2jh-_0bXVOitccSuMwLb7-curm5lYFqfnNb23VDFneNXSkdXWnvR750uv-7GrVc4hlhA0i0wJswkjVLv7NAXW82V90IelvvwZZqxQCKLnDgDjh9I4_uNZR1ADOPH9XJI56-Dwr1tId1hcdpa9-6PTPR5Wpn0mrBfS5rsYo3XTywOPaLEup9TsN-qJ-hMmE8G8FP9-YU70oGhMwJ4tik85mWIYZK-mEDvhtVZObRBsOnsJPbEdKhUY1PFeapQdXFtDL05oDWtJX6Ywr9QPeDE0TVBWEmvzzdHJlKkr68y3_kBm_nBKof7a_3IjcQmvDlGt5wBrohpnjUKnwBU-9R-7ESBejUgZLKtfGSZeVN7uXe7a2pxt2xrpLef_U93jG39hBjUTQVPQy5pi0jEw%3D%3D)

But Peter, it’s not all good news...

It’s proven true: **There is nothing more terrifying to a Democrat than a strong, conservative woman.** The Democrats will not take kindly to Elise’s endorsement and national Republicans’ support in my race.

Democrats know the path to a Republican House majority runs through this race in Nevada’s 3rd Congressional District. Nancy Pelosi’s retirement is imminent, Peter - [**but first, we MUST win this race!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f229e01798304939ab40feef121c2ee9&_e=hoQ8SO5Qzz7yLHAQHaxEdNvxqYSfKZWTac57HVLdkfsDWdyIfUR7InHchtEAZR7HOUS-U2jh-_0bXVOitccSuMwLb7-curm5lYFqfnNb23VDFneNXSkdXWnvR750uv-7GrVc4hlhA0i0wJswkjVLv7NAXW82V90IelvvwZZqxQCKLnDgDjh9I4_uNZR1ADOPH9XJI56-Dwr1tId1hcdpa9-6PTPR5Wpn0mrBfS5rsYo3XTywOPaLEup9TsN-qJ-hTziUvrsU9rZPpINoc6gKTvEABxcvfTNo5zhT3E6PmZzT0RobxqEcP59gCvE0SIYCqA8HdQJelCd68Ac7h_uLtJZSjxMYQx1ekHq2JxJsaM7ngVdCn5yjnmYsafzNuC0RNA6C6ugUtRPO422PQiOOO3ECgeLEY1bfTrW3KRc2A9N_6y9fdtQesVCOudl_Xc8wDqkNpGKEVY6Hx7vOUnnBow%3D%3D)

subject: Let’s Make This Official
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN
body:
Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. I am announcing today that I have just come from officially filing my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=71ff406372a24b8e9a4ed79ba7c94f85&_e=_s_87xjLHquObOAXKwNupNysOL7oPct3U6Jrb3k-2zFeVjp4Nvu8y2sQt2UdXfMUd-zHvVWJmxYjby3aawYJ_LNWZIgtPETU0DLtkOKnAqOho45VEhxvwafqQ3oOZCWGAvelFx2inyw2TKSOrqeJ-V8F1JOSVBtLVP_FgHIOEKvFBzTNT65GzfqIiqDe009tMMlOswM8igQhG4eKDuKibTzG7GSJs1mG9Dt0dDaSa29ZK9BfqNWQoAcaD9Z77FDo1E_B548yht4Ai2dV2e-CYLergWYiZWCaSiUDWTNThoC8Kpae4YGhyAV_dIUWiKjlh5Ckyp1ad4VotGlYH2jOPFa7XIweHSOH1O8XAtKM25GzCMMG7o5Sh7NKEAekaMBXch-0ymLAKe5efdfVKmRNlQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

We have been working hard for several months to reach the voters of Texas with my winning message of strong, effective conservative leadership for our state. Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=71ff406372a24b8e9a4ed79ba7c94f85&_e=_s_87xjLHquObOAXKwNupNysOL7oPct3U6Jrb3k-2zFeVjp4Nvu8y2sQt2UdXfMUd-zHvVWJmxYjby3aawYJ_LNWZIgtPETU0DLtkOKnAqOho45VEhxvwafqQ3oOZCWGAvelFx2inyw2TKSOrqeJ-V8F1JOSVBtLVP_FgHIOEKvFBzTNT65GzfqIiqDe009t-nBpivLrceDlp2UIwwS7iBGn4puB6fUGsVeT0YRhluqDpycG9zKsWixbWsfbXoi_zso3wOqrAv0x5tiFa-Mxl9hyhG8lXrG1_cOiECg-ftVKRw32WK5OoXKHPHpbVuIhitV_KWsj9LKbilUlOdCmV-mrzBRlrwFlN1R_WfttWNgOVA4gLWShiT7RRWvfYbNEPJ_1IfYcG9uWEdREYAkUKg%3D%3D)
So, it is time to really shift this campaign into top gear and utilize the time we have to make our case to Texas Republicans that the future of our state - and this great country - are on the line in the next few months.

That is why I hope you will also take action today - join me on the ramparts of freedom - and support my campaign for Governor of Texas!

There are many ways you can do that, Fellow American - you can pray, which costs nothing but time. You can share our campaign content online and speak to friends and family about what is at stake. You can volunteer and make a difference in person.

clean_body: Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. I am announcing today that I have just come from officially filing my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. | Fellow American, We have been working hard for several months to reach the voters of Texas with my winning message of strong, effective conservative leadership for our state. Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. So, it is time to really shift this campaign into top gear and utilize the time we have to make our case to Texas Republicans that the future of our state - and this great country - are on the line in the next few months. That is why I hope you will also take action today - join me on the ramparts of freedom - and support my campaign for Governor of Texas! There are many ways you can do that, Fellow American - you can pray, which costs nothing but time. You can share our campaign content online and speak to friends and family about what is at stake. You can volunteer and make a difference in person. Can I count on your endorsement today? Steadfast and Loyal, Allen B. West Lieutenant Colonel (Ret) | | POL. ADV. Fellow Patriot,

The only thing standing between them and their insane plans for total control is a well-armed populace.

_The Communist Democrats want nothing more than to strip you of your gun rights -- and Republicans are helping them._

**They wanted Kyle Rittenhouse defenseless in the face of the mob, and the want the same for you**.

_I won't let that happen_.

[_**So enter for your chance to win this beautiful AR-15 today, and stick it to the anti-gun leftists in Washington**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=84167d2795&e=af4b86f5c6)

Thank you in advance.

For America,

body:
I just departed for Washington, DC to meet with members of Congress but first, I need your help.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nAXGFEzW8olnT6_fDDMUdO4Xj8mI46Igps0br-s4Zxn2lfOTWyj74qLnWyUsUqb-LRuQVHwICKfhI478DgJ43eeZ823toSBWHzF_LlUl1inCMr3XUcf6rhrKab0JTt4JeYEqIv4sZqrNRrN_lXS07MPf9UnwMCi692uGKhYO6j8xC0vs_RBkGEq9c5NV2GHo&c=ToZma39Wl3vB2xNNIiY6nVT-NwCMnPHDiVd3eLWB8ZVRVmqTpC2SLg==&ch=AGznwTheM4TFjaSuU6pb9XGxPvViDRdN9Y8T-7TQc07YghQLJ5O0jg==)

| Loyal Supporter, My team and I are Wheels Up for Washington, DC. I just departed from Denver International Airport and will arrive in DC in less than 5 hours.
On Wednesday and Thursday, I will be meeting with members of congress, the NRCC, and other Republican leaders in Washington. I will be bringing your issues and the message of America First to leaders on the hill. I will be lobbying them to support our campaign so that we can take back the 7th district and Put America and Colorado First once again.
During these meetings, I want to be able to show them our latest donor update and our fundraising outlook for the rest of the quarter. I also will be showing them a list of our supporters who have made the maximum contribution to our campaign thus far and I want your name to be on that list, my friend!
My team has activated a 5x impact pledge for the next 48 hours only, it is imperative that you donate now before the clock runs out.
I am asking you to answer my call and step up in support of our campaign now! Anyone that contributes today with a maximum donation of $2,900 will receive a limited edition, custom embroidered item from our campaign store, and VIP status at two of our upcoming events in 2022.
---
| | | [Donate Now!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nAXGFEzW8olnT6_fDDMUdO4Xj8mI46Igps0br-s4Zxn2lfOTWyj74qLnWyUsUqb-LRuQVHwICKfhI478DgJ43eeZ823toSBWHzF_LlUl1inCMr3XUcf6rhrKab0JTt4JeYEqIv4sZqrNRrN_lXS07MPf9UnwMCi692uGKhYO6j8xC0vs_RBkGEq9c5NV2GHo&c=ToZma39Wl3vB2xNNIiY6nVT-NwCMnPHDiVd3eLWB8ZVRVmqTpC2SLg==&ch=AGznwTheM4TFjaSuU6pb9XGxPvViDRdN9Y8T-7TQc07YghQLJ5O0jg==)

clean_body: I just departed for Washington, DC to meet with members of Congress but first, I need your help. | | | | | | == | Loyal Supporter, My team and I are Wheels Up for Washington, DC. I just departed from Denver International Airport and will arrive in DC in less than 5 hours. On Wednesday and Thursday, I will be meeting with members of congress, the NRCC, and other Republican leaders in Washington. I will be bringing your issues and the message of America First to leaders on the hill. I will be lobbying them to support our campaign so that we can take back the 7th district and Put America and Colorado First once again. During these meetings, I want to be able to show them our latest donor update and our fundraising outlook for the rest of the quarter. I also will be showing them a list of our supporters who have made the maximum contribution to our campaign thus far and I want your name to be on that list, my friend! My team has activated a 5x impact pledge for the next 48 hours only, it is imperative that you donate now before the clock runs out. I am asking you to answer my call and step up in support of our campaign now! Anyone that contributes today with a maximum donation of $2,900 will receive a limited edition, custom embroidered item from our campaign store, and VIP status at two of our upcoming events in 2022. | | | == | When I touch down at Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport in a few hours I will be checking to see if you answered the call. I hope I can count on you to act now. name: Team WisGOP
subject: Mandela Barnes tried to eliminate cash bail
body:
Did you see this from the Washington Free Beacon?

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barnes_cash_bail_v3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- We wanted to make sure you saw the latest headline from the Washington Free Beacon: [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=vC2f79Vyx36OEaPx15Tw7KWKXKrjkEYKpRKgmHMFOwEMMYgP46YgoSh5-Ez-J7jHXGO2oAKp1fNtu-nsBB6pIabIPDs_3-qDIw1KMEJL61YoJw9A_gKgi5DhdMKVTtwVZ9PAOR8E6bKdwd44cR9_WA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barnes_cash_bail_v3&n=2) In case you missed it, the Washington Free Beacon [**reported**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=vC2f79Vyx36OEaPx15Tw7KWKXKrjkEYKpRKgmHMFOwEMMYgP46YgoSh5-Ez-J7jHXGO2oAKp1fNtu-nsBB6pIabIPDs_3-qDIw1KMEJL61YoJw9A_gKgi5DhdMKVTtwVZ9PAOR8E6bKdwd44cR9_WA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barnes_cash_bail_v3&n=3) that Wisconsin Lieutenant Governor and U.S. Senate candidate Mandela Barnes tried to eliminate cash bail while serving in the Wisconsin state Assembly. This comes as Barnes is already under fire for his “defund the police” ties after he [**called**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=hzZHoe_LqjIxZeEPQX1TwEXls7KNV6pKuhvH-ZLTHbaBXgJRnWX-_PqtN9oQRYCeNm70Gs1rif_WIrCn41e8VZwwGy9jFjm5AtFaOMYWe2A&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barnes_cash_bail_v3&n=4) Socialist Squad member Ilhan Omar “brilliant” and [**celebrated**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=hzZHoe_LqjIxZeEPQX1TwEXls7KNV6pKuhvH-ZLTHbYNSNG7u6vtbFS0Cy5gzUKDrcM-8OFBpJPtrvpqVUWK2fayqzXdAvVfNPuC_llZF5unBh5TNaIRJAth6C1rqjB3&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barnes_cash_bail_v3&n=5) his birthday alongside far-left activists who have compared law enforcement to Nazis and supported rioters. In light of the horrific tragedy in Waukesha, where the alleged attacker was a violent repeat offender released on just $1,000 bail, does Barnes still stand by this dangerous policy proposal that would allow more criminals on the streets and endanger Wisconsin families? Meanwhile, Tony Evers refuses to answer **[questions](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0WEVRdYdDbtID5KveBTfsIkpf4lvJi3i1XFzMFODRp2qr-yjHl0VcY6euBq8iDm4TbRFCtxP9y7bBktKo8gHBCE&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barnes_cash_bail_v3&n=6)** on whether he plans to fire Milwaukee District Attorney John Chisholm. Wisconsin families deserve representatives who will stand up for public safety and tell Wisconsinites where they stand. \- Team WisGOP
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barnes_cash_bail_v3&n=7).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barnes_cash_bail_v3&n=8) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barnes_cash_bail_v3&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barnes_cash_bail_v3&n=10), software for leaders.
clean_body: Did you see this from the Washington Free Beacon? | | | ---|---|--- Friend -- We wanted to make sure you saw the latest headline from the Washington Free Beacon: In case you missed it, the Washington Free Beacon that Wisconsin Lieutenant Governor and U.S. Senate candidate Mandela Barnes tried to eliminate cash bail while serving in the Wisconsin state Assembly. This comes as Barnes is already under fire for his “defund the police” ties after he Socialist Squad member Ilhan Omar “brilliant” and his birthday alongside far-left activists who have compared law enforcement to Nazis and supported rioters. In light of the horrific tragedy in Waukesha, where the alleged attacker was a violent repeat offender released on just $1,000 bail, does Barnes still stand by this dangerous policy proposal that would allow more criminals on the streets and endanger Wisconsin families? Meanwhile, Tony Evers refuses to answer on whether he plans to fire Milwaukee District Attorney John Chisholm. Wisconsin families deserve representatives who will stand up for public safety and tell Wisconsinites where they stand. \- Team WisGOP | Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States

body:
Did you see the headlines this week?
**"Ron Johnson calls for having Republican lawmakers take over federal elections in Wisconsin"**
_— Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_

**"Trump-tied group pushing for voting changes in Wisconsin"**
_— Associated Press_
Ron Johnson and Donald Trump’s closest allies are leading a push for state lawmakers to seize control over federal elections — all predicated on the Big Lie. Johnson has even gone as far as saying Wisconsin Republicans should "unilaterally take control of federal elections," even if it means bypassing Governor Tony Evers' authority.

Republicans don't care if our elections remain free and fair, as long as they win. That’s why they’re actively looking for ways to overturn election results when they lose. This is just the latest in a string of brazen attempts by Republicans to diminish your power as a voter.

Look, the calculated attacks on our democracy won’t end unless we defeat Republicans like Ron Johnson, expand our Democratic Senate majority, and pass federal legislation to restore voting rights and protect our elections.

[**The latest poll shows Sarah Godlewski is the only Democrat winning against Ron Johnson in a head-to-head match-up, but she can't defeat him without the support of this grassroots team. clean_body: Did you see the headlines this week? "Ron Johnson calls for having Republican lawmakers take over federal elections in Wisconsin" — Milwaukee Journal Sentinel "Trump-tied group pushing for voting changes in Wisconsin" — Associated Press Ron Johnson and Donald Trump’s closest allies are leading a push for state lawmakers to seize control over federal elections — all predicated on the Big Lie. Johnson has even gone as far as saying Wisconsin Republicans should "unilaterally take control of federal elections," even if it means bypassing Governor Tony Evers' authority. Republicans don't care if our elections remain free and fair, as long as they win. That’s why they’re actively looking for ways to overturn election results when they lose. This is just the latest in a string of brazen attempts by Republicans to diminish your power as a voter. Look, the calculated attacks on our democracy won’t end unless we defeat Republicans like Ron Johnson, expand our Democratic Senate majority, and pass federal legislation to restore voting rights and protect our elections. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Wisconsin is at the epicenter of the right-wing attacks on our democracy and the right to vote. clean_body: Let’s stop giving out incentives to enter the US illegally! | TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Fellow Patriots, I am reaching out in hopes that you would support my new bill that would prohibit Government payments to illegal immigrants who did not go through the proper channels to enter this country! Taxpayer dollars should be spent on directly improving the daily lives of American citizens, period. | Recently, the Biden Administration and his Democrat allies, proposed giving $450,000 payments to illegal aliens who were apprehended under the Trump Administration. Instead of using the funds to fix real issues in America, the Radical Left wants to give handouts to illegals. This is absurd and shows how out of touch the Democrat party is with the issues in America. We need to elect leaders who connect with the people here and understand how to get results ‐‐ leaders who want to secure the border, rather than encourage illegal entry! As the next US Senator from North Carolina, I will get to work on day one to ensure the Southern Border is secure. I will make sure the Government never gives handouts to illegals. God Bless, Ted Budd - TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Allen West
subject: Let’s Make This Official
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN
body:
Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. I am announcing today that I have just come from officially filing my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=060a5eda539741578002ae515a036007&_e=3iy-esJe_QVSl5g6lfwU2wg8_m7TL80p636BVaWeooFmHVtnq6e5laz6CvftgfkfuwHtD5UdKxbc7S7FVtRRjbDNLb-TVi6-ERT69IH7XHeeidRfVyIrWEsuB6P7dIGu02ftWarBON3kx8F6iWmMG08BE1NRZSG6_7rpBIBEQVVwzszGfKzXXP7fxoeRokHRt6q93ThJONqyMoDZduuKgAmYOghVJGr3X5kHBtRY_Gd2BSNYTr3XAi58e5MaWjXxlZQJJ2CZXI52aeFxSUkvUsDaDvemJMrj9YSpLjUIMuyDI7B5S0MeUkSWue2tcZovADpNtLnhYkH8qNqfRS9-16qq2j3-lytbC3J0g3xZQh_LJRAnJUHPwAj8TRYgtbPEchMy9O1JkxVb2XayGm71Ng%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

We have been working hard for several months to reach the voters of Texas with my winning message of strong, effective conservative leadership for our state. Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=060a5eda539741578002ae515a036007&_e=3iy-esJe_QVSl5g6lfwU2wg8_m7TL80p636BVaWeooFmHVtnq6e5laz6CvftgfkfuwHtD5UdKxbc7S7FVtRRjbDNLb-TVi6-ERT69IH7XHeeidRfVyIrWEsuB6P7dIGu02ftWarBON3kx8F6iWmMG08BE1NRZSG6_7rpBIBEQVVwzszGfKzXXP7fxoeRokHRPypXCmSTjswGBmUPsgQxWzcOEDiW8LQrgYqpgNrFH_g4VEFqtA7y8wSuDRrb5r0DXeOZ0SkXdWxQXuZts0mt8SIFDL9hkw0Ie18rPD06iEK7lgtdRvDtRXkLRMwlGREFY8EB2pZrp4kRj4LWxw1uHNPOVQeHIbuyBHpujTdXBLADlHJb2W5lsPHekwF-TGox87IGYW9jyGZkJqrENPH-Cg%3D%3D)
So, it is time to really shift this campaign into top gear and utilize the time we have to make our case to Texas Republicans that the future of our state - and this great country - are on the line in the next few months.

That is why I hope you will also take action today - join me on the ramparts of freedom - and support my campaign for Governor of Texas!

There are many ways you can do that, Peter - you can pray, which costs nothing but time. You can share our campaign content online and speak to friends and family about what is at stake. You can volunteer and make a difference in person.

[**And, you can make your own endorsement of my campaign - and empower us with the resources we need to build a successful foundation for the tough race ahead with a 2022 Allen West for Governor - with a generous grassroots contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or whatever you can afford right now.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=060a5eda539741578002ae515a036007&_e=3iy-esJe_QVSl5g6lfwU2wg8_m7TL80p636BVaWeooFmHVtnq6e5laz6CvftgfkfuwHtD5UdKxbc7S7FVtRRjbDNLb-TVi6-ERT69IH7XHeeidRfVyIrWEsuB6P7dIGu02ftWarBON3kx8F6iWmMG08BE1NRZSG6_7rpBIBEQVVwzszGfKzXXP7fxoeRokHRLRToewy22qx2YwZ-6wrWy40VtIK6C2rkSAOZ01tAo1rtVJ-3ncNVzsCqgmijGYDvCyebusT06pAlv_EtzkQXb1lsyCf_X7_mj4sNoaAcjujWipQ2jVS2CLHyYqNh6IL2E0zO9a3M-kPXJB9fiPKU7eUa-ATaggP3PrZYBJJZ3vI0m3SyrAPRaBGr75sT9lNyHVAlDpf2RWnpcIvxwAsM3g%3D%3D)

[**Peter, we must turn away from the path of least resistance and complacency at the many challenges threatening our freedom and prosperity. I am prepared to lead us in a new direction, but I must have your support to succeed.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=060a5eda539741578002ae515a036007&_e=3iy-esJe_QVSl5g6lfwU2wg8_m7TL80p636BVaWeooFmHVtnq6e5laz6CvftgfkfuwHtD5UdKxbc7S7FVtRRjbDNLb-TVi6-ERT69IH7XHeeidRfVyIrWEsuB6P7dIGu02ftWarBON3kx8F6iWmMG08BE1NRZSG6_7rpBIBEQVVwzszGfKzXXP7fxoeRokHR6Wg9KrkM1AxWSTw6rNRo0gGEDks0eE4wTJPyGn3tyhOwPsXdkE7Wk8lkH3TOgiVpQBjzWh5rLfBcF2zRYd_S0cxvvvwuiao9bUw07CCSk2NLa_zljiweq7kwML7KxXGv3niH72r6vHShPIpSmUDy8QIftTz-0jRFcGgUfhBJ4HKYXDI1ZkNCtrdXX23IiUx4_YoLjflnz0nvRSmekR6CWw%3D%3D)

Can I count on your endorsement today?

clean_body: Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. I am announcing today that I have just come from officially filing my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. | Peter, We have been working hard for several months to reach the voters of Texas with my winning message of strong, effective conservative leadership for our state. Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. So, it is time to really shift this campaign into top gear and utilize the time we have to make our case to Texas Republicans that the future of our state - and this great country - are on the line in the next few months. That is why I hope you will also take action today - join me on the ramparts of freedom - and support my campaign for Governor of Texas! There are many ways you can do that, Peter - you can pray, which costs nothing but time. You can share our campaign content online and speak to friends and family about what is at stake. You can volunteer and make a difference in person. Can I count on your endorsement today? Steadfast and Loyal, Allen B. West Lieutenant Colonel (Ret) | | POL. ADV. Fellow Conservative - **If you care about election integrity, then DO NOT delete this email.**

In an effort to tee up another failed run for president, former New Jersey **Gov. Chris Christie recently stated that everyone should move on from the 2020 election, criticizing former President Donald Trump and his supporters for focusing on it.**

Elections have consequences. That is why we must have free, fair, and secure elections. **[I have spent most of the last year not only fighting for election integrity in Missouri, but also across the entire nation and I WON'T stop just because Chris Christie says to.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d8b60160d4304c2898172955ff9f1e01&_e=niHJwijEyiNxA4thzpqrmVxiVCqOdLmY1HyXsskmm1p2uTN05K2a2G3qY0FmvhBaHNkReieBwjutis43uI7zk8wvzegnl_MmBQUzHmyvGi5R6voF9ieS0MsryXIx99iaOSM3i6_PHHYOS7idqRgKsZa399jOnAJWyeLuT5YEyrWPpfNqbyNBiVZX2_pxg0tW43rk2ydgswPIx6Lv3WhMl_nkGLV8ZDUeKWLkLS4z6rabIhwkwnKn_TXXwCvzJZYshA_bm-Mj102uV_te0Hu86w-K2XEEhs7Xy1qzweerOlhPfBiYnTmj5M19VYyplsbN_FPWTFPXm8pUoDTLz3BefPNwx8eGXv93UO5f0Bq93iWz8caN-8ob_bJk3rrjHdXvQag7QkfTSB3NoG91nXZMYByLwrSH0VduE9jvsedHH8YS2PYbYr9hgLWZiAxp1Y49-hUz_qTjG04ieiT2FXZZTQ%3D%3D)**

Christie is completely out of touch with voters - _with AMERICANS._ **Without election integrity, history will repeat itself, and we will lose our country as we once knew it.**

I am not afraid to speak out and fight for election integrity - **but by doing so, I am putting a HUGE target on my back.** **[That’s why I need to have your support to continue this fight in the United States Senate. The 2020 election was one of the most unfair, disgraceful events in U.S. history, and **the Democrats are trying to make sure this becomes the new normal on a nationalized scale.** Millions of ballots were mailed to people who never even asked for them. With no voter ID laws in many places and inadequate signature matching and poll monitoring, it was a free-for-all.

In addition to Christie, the media, and the Democrats, several of my Republican colleagues currently in elected office seem to be unaware, or unwilling to admit, that fair elections are the cornerstone to preserving our nation’s exceptional character. Some of them voted to impeach Trump to undo the 2016 election. **Several have caved to the media mob by claiming to be uninterested in any accurate accounting of what happened in 2020**.

**[As we approach the elections of 2022 and 2024, we must elect leaders who support the America First policies that helped our nation thrive across the board.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d8b60160d4304c2898172955ff9f1e01&_e=niHJwijEyiNxA4thzpqrmVxiVCqOdLmY1HyXsskmm1p2uTN05K2a2G3qY0FmvhBaHNkReieBwjutis43uI7zk8wvzegnl_MmBQUzHmyvGi5R6voF9ieS0MsryXIx99iaOSM3i6_PHHYOS7idqRgKsZa399jOnAJWyeLuT5YEyrWPpfNqbyNBiVZX2_pxg0tW43rk2ydgswPIx6Lv3WhMl_nkGLV8ZDUeKWLkLS4z6rabIhwkwnKn_TXXwCvzJZYsaFQAPgLJ-XzGX1U9AeU1l00aY5T2i4D9gZJVporpRhadPSDy7QtkJtcC67E-yZ6GfiLSX7U3XxnSVb_bZ746an89XBt5tsOqR_1uT04Q9s5ayOuYfC7npLwEc_3pCuGsYJcLwcKwDLTP7dSFvSJKJc9otZtpVOz1n-oGOlw-T27uyuK0S7i4TJ_ipKK2PPDAKj50AeFCaYGSPKu6OnSa0w%3D%3D)** Christie didn’t understand what voters cared about in 2016. That is why his campaign failed and any future campaign WILL FAIL.

Similar to President Trump, **I am not afraid to talk about issues that make coastal elites uncomfortable...**

* **We need secure elections.**
* We need secure borders.
* We need pro-worker trade policies.
* **We need leaders who will put the United States FIRST.**

As a candidate for the U.S. Senate, I will always put Missourians and my fellow voters first - and that starts with ensuring their voices are heard at the ballot box. **[I will fight every single day for America First, will you join my team and this fight immediately?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d8b60160d4304c2898172955ff9f1e01&_e=niHJwijEyiNxA4thzpqrmVxiVCqOdLmY1HyXsskmm1p2uTN05K2a2G3qY0FmvhBaHNkReieBwjutis43uI7zk8wvzegnl_MmBQUzHmyvGi5R6voF9ieS0MsryXIx99iaOSM3i6_PHHYOS7idqRgKsZa399jOnAJWyeLuT5YEyrWPpfNqbyNBiVZX2_pxg0tW43rk2ydgswPIx6Lv3WhMl_nkGLV8ZDUeKWLkLS4z6rabIhwkwnKn_TXXwCvzJZYsTXmkVi2AvOQoV94NbSiGwKlTJa5Gw-n90svNc1AdQn5KruE8Fte7FLCkBdfY2rJJ9MgKwSm0D838wTp5epwhkwDtZLD1b65GvGA5W-NgpKD2O1o-TX8TlOuk2LUdF_Qa5bsrug5bkT4aaUlUDV28JJkrRY9lt7-hQJbmv8LSJUT3To8fQj_C4rBZEsV1V5eeNm41NJ2qc15xzjF5_7cRXA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: If the fight in 2020 were fair, Trump would still be the president. DO NOT DELETE if you care about election security | No longer want to receive emails from Billy Long for Senate? You may . Fellow Conservative - If you care about election integrity, then DO NOT delete this email. In an effort to tee up another failed run for president, former New Jersey Gov. Chris Christie recently stated that everyone should move on from the 2020 election, criticizing former President Donald Trump and his supporters for focusing on it. Elections have consequences. That is why we must have free, fair, and secure elections. Christie is completely out of touch with voters - with AMERICANS. Without election integrity, history will repeat itself, and we will lose our country as we once knew it. I am not afraid to speak out and fight for election integrity - but by doing so, I am putting a HUGE target on my back. The 2020 election was one of the most unfair, disgraceful events in U.S. history, and the Democrats are trying to make sure this becomes the new normal on a nationalized scale. Millions of ballots were mailed to people who never even asked for them. With no voter ID laws in many places and inadequate signature matching and poll monitoring, it was a free-for-all. In addition to Christie, the media, and the Democrats, several of my Republican colleagues currently in elected office seem to be unaware, or unwilling to admit, that fair elections are the cornerstone to preserving our nation’s exceptional character. Some of them voted to impeach Trump to undo the 2016 election. Several have caved to the media mob by claiming to be uninterested in any accurate accounting of what happened in 2020. Christie didn’t understand what voters cared about in 2016. That is why his campaign failed and any future campaign WILL FAIL. Similar to President Trump, I am not afraid to talk about issues that make coastal elites uncomfortable... We need secure elections. We need secure borders. We need pro-worker trade policies. We need leaders who will put the United States FIRST. As a candidate for the U.S. Senate, I will always put Missourians and my fellow voters first - and that starts with ensuring their voices are heard at the ballot box. Thank you, Billy Long | | PAID FOR BY BILLY LONG FOR SENATE

name: Paul Gazelka
subject: I back the blue. Do you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Provided by
body:
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=d97a7eb582624e05a02f2f7c4701663e&_e=DZ02ewfMNF_AqODx6LEoD2yNTpfeUFd6UtF7TxsHf4R5LPJw-auYQzZ-dIcNPb8ZWsmBE_rz8E-QYj-LK9VZqQTboukcHPEnoypHT6kj2SFmkMwugHdVHCAUMX3vN1S_B7WE2dA3qXOsKTzXAq8CtY1KBk_cimm6KcIqcfHWKjObRXaQSUXdMlUhXQZb8a59hahTEDy_6eVf3txxvoedzK2HW6B5PoFrK-k81l75r5TcJEKYoyCAVWpf7htFaCBpDr8mNPaHHQzdfaD-QOpQi0gpDR6xalQjP55Xyz_lTqn7zDFDKu_2kz1Js8oo_kdzPFo3dY9QSySwaLTb0RsTBA%3D%3D) My friend, here is a quick update from the road. I have been all over the state hearing from concerned citizens that want to take our state down a better path. Public safety and funding our police are so important to me as a father and a Minnesotan, and I know they are important priorities to you, too.__ [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=d97a7eb582624e05a02f2f7c4701663e&_e=DZ02ewfMNF_AqODx6LEoD2yNTpfeUFd6UtF7TxsHf4R5LPJw-auYQzZ-dIcNPb8ZWsmBE_rz8E-QYj-LK9VZqQTboukcHPEnoypHT6kj2SFmkMwugHdVHCAUMX3vN1S_3HSZuDxtVHsZDncyEJbqFywD-F7m7Z0LZ7bjFH8I1oJluT935OmmQWwCP3VbeEm394LeMKj7Phj2p9MXal7NahsBisus4Cn4isHuQkdZm8Uv2IyTgxrLYR8dZ02HjMaRVdWKngf07ro7owB3rAZdLqIb-ziG4gpGBFuHkFQlO3QEEvEuZ1tEq0qIsH-5APO3cJFXbj-1-WgXFUdSRz3Vzg%3D%3D) The people of Minneapolis just courageously rejected calls to _Defund the Police_ , but we have to do more to stop the anti-cop, pro-criminal posture of too many elected officials and public servants in our state. Our law enforcement know that 2022 is not the time to sit back. The pressure is on. They made it clear that public safety and proper law enforcement funding is important for our community. I am honored to have the endorsement of the National Highway Patrol and to be named Legislator of the Year by the Minnesota Chiefs of Police Association and the Minnesota Peace and Police Officers Association. I was humbled to have the kind words of endorsement from the National Highway Patrol: "Your leadership and understanding of the role law enforcement plays providing security, safety, and service in our respective communities is sorely needed in the governor's office. You have committed to providing law enforcement the resources to recruit the talent, and to provide the tools, and training necessary to make our communities safer for everyone." The Minnesota Chiefs of Police Association released the following statement in support of my legislative efforts: “Senator Gazelka continues to show strong support for the types of measures that will improve public safety,” stated Eric Werner, association president, police chief in Maple Grove, in a news release. “He was willing to listen to our concerns and carry them forward to the Governor and House Majority Leader as the 2021 Legislative Session progressed. We felt Senator Gazelka did more for our Association and the challenges facing police chiefs than any other legislator in 2021.” We cannot get serious about protecting our communities if we do not support law enforcement with our hearts, our prayers, our deeds, and the funding they need to get their dangerous jobs done. If you feel the same, and are with me on this journey, then I ask you to **add your name to my petition to Back the Blue.** [**I am standing with law enforcement!**
**Are YOU with me?**
**[RESPONSE REQUESTED]**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=d97a7eb582624e05a02f2f7c4701663e&_e=DZ02ewfMNF_AqODx6LEoD2yNTpfeUFd6UtF7TxsHf4R5LPJw-auYQzZ-dIcNPb8ZWsmBE_rz8E-QYj-LK9VZqQTboukcHPEnoypHT6kj2SFmkMwugHdVHCAUMX3vN1S_sAA2U2NLT5xSRPpA3tu-do0eEnODfFTgS6y7XculdJwYIDd8g4NqfUNAeuqSiA-Xo2SvQbgHd3e7zB4QAHIA45iIxMOjoqdqVWFqsey2xK6dc9wy6ZyBN-m6lyWj_sEIchf2xNCr7GcF17i7VfMwBJF5NCuHg0__h09bJYbn2HErVHZFp7IfbfCeFVGL6INnf9tKUkxqEjlVh4Vj4I3Zig%3D%3D) Law enforcement can't keep us safe all by themselves. clean_body: My friend, here is a quick update from the road. I have been all over the state hearing from concerned citizens that want to take our state down a better path. Public safety and funding our police are so important to me as a father and a Minnesotan, and I know they are important priorities to you, too. The people of Minneapolis just courageously rejected calls to Defund the Police , but we have to do more to stop the anti-cop, pro-criminal posture of too many elected officials and public servants in our state. Our law enforcement know that 2022 is not the time to sit back. The pressure is on. They made it clear that public safety and proper law enforcement funding is important for our community. I am honored to have the endorsement of the National Highway Patrol and to be named Legislator of the Year by the Minnesota Chiefs of Police Association and the Minnesota Peace and Police Officers Association. I was humbled to have the kind words of endorsement from the National Highway Patrol: "Your leadership and understanding of the role law enforcement plays providing security, safety, and service in our respective communities is sorely needed in the governor's office. You have committed to providing law enforcement the resources to recruit the talent, and to provide the tools, and training necessary to make our communities safer for everyone." The Minnesota Chiefs of Police Association released the following statement in support of my legislative efforts: “Senator Gazelka continues to show strong support for the types of measures that will improve public safety,” stated Eric Werner, association president, police chief in Maple Grove, in a news release. “He was willing to listen to our concerns and carry them forward to the Governor and House Majority Leader as the 2021 Legislative Session progressed. We felt Senator Gazelka did more for our Association and the challenges facing police chiefs than any other legislator in 2021.” We cannot get serious about protecting our communities if we do not support law enforcement with our hearts, our prayers, our deeds, and the funding they need to get their dangerous jobs done. If you feel the same, and are with me on this journey, then I ask you to add your name to my petition to Back the Blue. [I am standing with law enforcement! Are YOU with me? [RESPONSE REQUESTED]]() Law enforcement can't keep us safe all by themselves. They have our backs, and it's time we have theirs. Are you with me? Thank you, Paul Gazelka | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for and Provided by Gazelka for Governor P.O. Box 175 Little Falls, MN 56345

name: Republican Polling
subject: Trust Poll: Republicans or Democrats?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We need your input today, Fellow American! | **_CHUCK SCHUMER, SENATE DEMOCRATS EMBRACING PROGRESSIVE POLICIES AHEAD OF 2022_**
---
Fellow American,

As our top Republican allies fight tooth and nail in the Senate to defend our way of life and change Washington to work FOR THE PEOPLE, the Senate Democrats - led by Chuck Schumer - **are doubling down on their efforts to force the most radical, progressive agenda onto the American people ahead of the 2022 election.**

Fellow American,

**_Great news today!_**

**_All 212 members of the House Republican conference have joined me in standing up against President Biden and his vaccine mandate._** The Congressional Review Act Resolution I introduced will undo this burdensome vax mandate on America’s workers and employers.

**We have the support of the entire Republican conference in the House, the Senate, AND Senator Manchin.**

We are fighting for the people who built the greatest economy in the world, the people who got us through the pandemic because of their hard work every day.

body:
We need your input today, Fellow American! | **_CHUCK SCHUMER, SENATE DEMOCRATS EMBRACING PROGRESSIVE POLICIES AHEAD OF 2022_**

Fellow American,

As our top Republican allies fight tooth and nail in the Senate to defend our way of life and change Washington to work FOR THE PEOPLE, the Senate Democrats - led by Chuck Schumer - **are doubling down on their efforts to force the most radical, progressive agenda onto the American people ahead of the 2022 election.**

clean_body: We need your input today, Fellow American! | CHUCK SCHUMER, SENATE DEMOCRATS EMBRACING PROGRESSIVE POLICIES AHEAD OF 2022 Fellow American, As our top Republican allies fight tooth and nail in the Senate to defend our way of life and change Washington to work FOR THE PEOPLE, the Senate Democrats - led by Chuck Schumer - are doubling down on their efforts to force the most radical, progressive agenda onto the American people ahead of the 2022 election. Since President Trump left office and Republicans lost control of the Senate majority - Chuck Schumer has used his Democratic lap-dogs to abuse power in Washington: record spending bills, record inflation, opening our borders, defunding the police - WHO DO YOU TRUST TO REFORM WASHINGTON? We will take your response and act IMMEDIATELY to continue our efforts of making sure Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority. name: MorganHarper.org
subject: “Swing voters don’t explain why Youngkin Won”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
When it comes to the Virginia gubernatorial race, the emphasis should be on base voters, not swing voters.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211207-441-footer-ak&t=2&akid=441%2E90090%2EX-bM6z)
**We have less than a year until the Ohio general election on November 8, 2022, and we’re just 6 months away from the Democratic primary election on May 3, 2022.**
Now is the time to start making key decisions on which Democratic candidate will be able to fare well in the general election. We’re facing far-right GOP candidates who want to infringe on our voting rights, reproductive rights, **and more**.
**If we play by the same-old rules we will lose Ohio****.**[**Can you make your first donation to our grassroots, bold, passionate campaign today? Your support will go straight to our voter mobilization efforts.**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17051?t=4&akid=441%2E90090%2EX-bM6z)
Take a look at this brand new _Intelligencer_ article:
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17051?t=5&akid=441%2E90090%2EX-bM6z)
Writer Ed Kilgore explains that Glenn Youngkin’s victory in the Virginia gubernatorial race in November hinged on _base voter turnout_ not swing voters!
_“Now comes some more granular data from political scientists Seth Hill and Dan Hopkins via FiveThirtyEight, and it seems to confirm that**poor turnout by Democratic base voters defeated Terry McAuliffe more than ambivalent swing voters... off-presidential-year falloff for Democrats could well persist (unless hard-to-turn-out voters, particularly young people, who lean Democratic, are galvanized by subsequent events.** ”_
---
We need to be running Democratic candidates who can excite young voters, Black voters, and women — folks we need to turn up to the polls in overwhelming numbers. We cannot win running the same corporate Democrats that have lost these voters time and time again. We need someone whose lived experience and strong progressive policies will motivate more voters than ever before. **That’s Morgan Harper. She can bring out the Democratic voters we need to flip this seat blue.**
**_[If you are able, can you make a donation today? Any amount helps give our grassroots campaign the resources we need to start December strong.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17051?t=6&akid=441%2E90090%2EX-bM6z)_ **
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17057?refcode=em20211207-441&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=441%2E90090%2EX-bM6z)**
Thank you for being a part of this team,
Team Morgan Harper
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/17051?t=26&akid=441%2E90090%2EX-bM6z)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211207-441-footer&t=27&refcode2=441_90090_X-bM6z&akid=441%2E90090%2EX-bM6z)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=441%2E90090%2EX-bM6z)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Dr. Oz just stole a scam tactic from Trump’s playbook
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Why are we not surprised by this?
#
Derek,
Dr. Oz may have pockets so deep he can self-fund his campaign’s $1.2 million ad buy... but that isn’t stopping him from trying to scam cash out of Pennsylvanians.
According to the _Pittsburgh City Paper_ , Dr. Oz is asking for donations online with a pre-checked box in the fine print, which can mislead people into giving an automatically recurring donation... _again and again and again_.
This is an online fundraising tactic pioneered by — you guessed it — Donald Trump and the Republican party, who swindled some unsuspecting donors out of thousands of dollars. 🤢
**Let’s be very clear: What Dr. Oz is doing is completely, 100% unethical.** People deserve respect from the candidates running to serve them. That’s why from Day One, we’ve built our incredible grassroots movement by leveling with you about the stakes of this race. No fear-mongering, no "gotcha" fine print... just the truth about why John Fetterman is running for Senate and why supporting our campaign is so damn important.
**[Pennsylvanians deserve so much better than a scam artist like Dr. Oz. If you agree, will you chip in $5 or any amount you can today to help John beat him?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37975?refcode=em20211207-3745&t=1&akid=3745%2E434096%2EHIivYh)** _We’re grateful for your support, and we’ll always put in the honest work to earn it._
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37975?refcode=em20211207-3745&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=3745%2E434096%2EHIivYh)**
Why are we just... not surprised, Derek? After all, Dr. Oz is the celeb doctor known for hawking dangerous diet products and bogus remedies on primetime TV — putting millions of viewers at risk just to make a buck.
And instead of dialing it down when Covid-19 took hold, Oz saw another chance to profit, preaching unproven remedies to the American public in the early days of the pandemic.
So really, Dr. Oz tricking his campaign donors into giving tens, hundreds, or thousands of more dollars than they meant to — even though he’s already self-funding his campaign with his own wealth — is just another scam on a loooong, ugly track record.
Derek, we need your help to fight back against Dr. Oz’ virtually unlimited campaign war chest and make sure he has no chance of becoming Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator. **[So we’re asking — with no weird strings attached — if you’ll pitch in $5 or more now to show that scam tactics can never match up to a real grassroots movement.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37975?refcode=em20211207-3745&t=21&akid=3745%2E434096%2EHIivYh)**
Thank you for your support,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211207-3745-footer&t=22&refcode2=3745_434096_HIivYh&akid=3745%2E434096%2EHIivYh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=3745%2E434096%2EHIivYh)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3745%2E434096%2EHIivYh)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Devin Nunes announced last night he's not going to run against Josh, and instead he's RESIGNING! Yep, he's leaving Congress to become the CEO of Trump's new social media company. Can't make it up. **So, what does this mean for Josh?** First off, it means the floodgates are now back open to other Republicans looking to flip our seat. We've heard a bunch of different names floated and they are all as extreme (or more!) than Nunes. We definitely have a fight ahead no matter what. We also know that GOP Super PACs and dark money groups have a bullseye on our district and are prepared to spend tens of millions of dollars to buy a Congressman who will do their will. Finally, we know that with final redistricting maps right around the corner, we have to prepare _right now_ to introduce Josh to thousands of new voters. name: Patty Murray
subject: Electing Democrats up and down the ballot
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
The Washington State Democratic Party is helping to lead the 2022 fight.
#
Peter,
Democrats are making progress in Washington state, but we can’t take anything for granted.
Republicans are gearing up for an all-out battle for control of Congress, statewide positions, and legislatures. They’re hoping for a big “red wave” in 2022 to sweep the GOP back into power.
We need to help the Washington State Democratic Party stand strong, so they are ready to not only defend our Democratic champions, but elect new Democrats in every race and every place in the state.
**[Will you pitch in $5 or anything you can to support Washington State Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39443843/319894433/-1039794874?refcode=pm_em_211207_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGJlY2Y4OS1jZDU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a3jBomvk84SAz2ZOklgH_atcE6aBm59HYLlNPZ-6nxU=)**
We’ve got several crucial fights right here in Washington state, like reelecting Kim Schrier to Congress, winning our Secretary of State’s race and holding this statewide seat for Democrats, and keeping our Senate seat blue! We need to be ready on day one -- or the GOP will pounce.
Peter, it’s so critical that you invest early in a Democratic future and a bluer Washington state.
**[Join me and support the Washington State Democratic Party with a donation right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39443844/319894434/-1039794874?refcode=pm_em_211207_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGJlY2Y4OS1jZDU3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a3jBomvk84SAz2ZOklgH_atcE6aBm59HYLlNPZ-6nxU=)**

Patty

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom Goes on Book Tour
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Ultimate Lawsuit](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopt3rf-OL1UaNLnlLBtMRz2if1wF0mxwf76D7akEzFB3w&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_7&n=1) Gavin Newsom is off to NYC to promote his new children’s book. This comes after 3 days in Nevada, a week in Cabo, and a mysterious 13-day disappearance. He’s chosen a bad time to go jet-setting. Just as courts have stopped all 3 of Biden’s mandate orders, the Orange County Board of Education, led by Mari Barke, has filed a lawsuit to terminate the State of Emergency. The premise is simple: a Governor doesn’t get to end the emergency at his leisure. He’s required to do so “at the earliest possible date that conditions warrant.” The Court made this clear in my case against Newsom: “ _The Emergency Services Act is not a statute of indefinite duration...The Emergency Services Act obligates the governor to declare the state of emergency terminated as soon as conditions warrant.”_ In _Gallagher and Kiley v. Newsom_ , the Court based its decision on the need for a Governor to respond quickly to emergency conditions. This suggests that if the Governor vacates his office to go on a book tour, it’s no longer legally an emergency. This is the ultimate lawsuit, as ending the emergency terminates all other orders automatically. Granted, the courts have failed us time and again. But with Newsom barely ever in California, they'll have a harder time ignoring what a farce this has become. [Support](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv_IPFMzzv9WmdPghwMBSwX0JHWSzI75LyWvC6h1sivRLtVVWDof7SVZORZZbP1UPz4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_7&n=2) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAxt61medh2Ii90rs7JTGGip0Xwsj8WdWDEVRYkqjHke_w&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_7&n=3) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_dec_7&n=4)California Legislator

name: Tyler Kistner
subject: 9,584 short of a seat in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
It's the future prosperity of our children and future generations of Americans that's at stake in 2022. I lost by less than 10,000 votes. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4be2c44a0e6f408eb012d24106e15f54&_e=3sZEmaFZSg8zQi5RiqHsBR_QjFKoZPBWO0BEjhLulBbgtTf_mtr5673NpFrIrnkkRjg3Z0HrtCzgYAhxUxOhFxovQgAW8PQCVvu0cL85dnM90k9P6ud2-u982akpyBB7xLn_Suvt_YmorogjblcKck7ux9R6EkKYjLPsDJJHiW2ulsRrjNk2rz5xAL37s9-vyz4Vmm-4UHsqEbJ-1Q6PQvNBSTka6OI4ken-ereBNjgpjZ8f8RibthwwTirSY5mdfeXq3ff1U9wvRAw9nzn40uoXJEEDms58d8bO_gwcLJK0katVu3b5FGcPec3j5oUjz7Zhzz9U9S9gMmybXMTVLCFt858CNBoeRuCyav6uDOmNZJ9XGybGiVQzV_a5nZUZ)

---
Fellow American -

When I think back on 2020, I remember how:

Our city burned.

Our families were scared, even in their own homes.

Violent crime surged across our communities. Nowhere was safe.

**_When our cities needed real leadership, no one showed up. Democrats let rioters roam free without threat of reprisal; looters were allowed to pillage without consequence._**

And now in 2021, hard-working Americans and their families are at a crossroads ... again.

Despite the numerous campaigns promises to serve the people's interests and to not raise taxes, Democrats in Congress -**including the one I lost to last year by 9,580 votes in one of the closest races in the nation** - and President Biden only sought to protect their own political interests with increased government spending, and already proposing massive tax increases on the middle class and American families.

The talk of unity and working together is long forgotten. The American people and those of the District deserve better leadership and vision.

name: Charles Booker
subject: Peter, I’m reaching out to see if you can do me an important favor.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, I’m reaching
out to see if you can do me an important favor.

Before you know it, 2021 is going to be over and then it’s going to be a
full sprint to Election Day.

Let me make this clear: I know we are going to win a Kentucky New Deal. We
will bring a wave of new leadership to the U.S. Senate. We will remove
Rand Paul. But before we get to the good part, we need to put in the hard
work to reach out to voters from the hood to the holler and amplify our
campaign's message.

Specifically, we need more people giving monthly recurring donations so
that we have the resources to scale our historic organizing movement in
Kentucky and be ready for every attack the GOP has planned to interfere in
this race.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13821?refcode=em20211207-1307&t=1001&akid=1307%2E346206%2EwGlI2e ]That’s why today I’m asking from the bottom of my heart if you can
start giving $23.70 (our average donation) or even just $5 as a monthly
recurring gift to our campaign.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13821?refcode=em20211207-1307&t=1002&akid=1307%2E346206%2EwGlI2e ]Make a monthly gift →

The Kentuckians I meet on the campaign trail fill me with so much hope for
our Commonwealth’s future. I know we are the ones who will finally end
this chapter of failed leadership under Rand Paul and demand the change
our communities need.

But it’s going to take all of us working together to make this happen.
Recurring donations are especially critical to the success of our
organizing and voter outreach efforts in the months ahead.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13821?refcode=em20211207-1307&t=1022&akid=1307%2E346206%2EwGlI2e ]So whether you can start giving $1, $5, or $23.70 to sustain our
campaign every month — please know how much your help is appreciated. I’ll
remember you,
Peter, as one of our first
monthly supporters for this historic movement.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13821?refcode=em20211207-1307&t=1023&akid=1307%2E346206%2EwGlI2e ]Contribute $23.70

Stay safe,

Charles

PS: If you can’t afford to give monthly, we understand. You can still make
a one-time contribution [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13829?refcode=em20211207-1307&t=1024&akid=1307%2E346206%2EwGlI2e ]at this link if you are able.

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211207-1307-footer&t=1025&refcode2=1307_346206_wGlI2e&akid=1307%2E346206%2EwGlI2e

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1307%2E346206%2EwGlI2e

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Together they owe more than $1.8 trillion.**** Student loan debt is one of the many obstacles that makes it almost impossible to raise a family, own a home, or for many of us in IL-7, even pay our bills. Because of the pandemic, Democrats have succeeded in pausing student loan payments for many Americans, but unless President Biden acts soon, those loan payments will begin again on February 1st. Together, we have the power to call on our elected leaders to protect us. subject: Rampant Radicalism

body:
The radical left is getting further and further away from the normal Americans.
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7117ad70c0f2422ba141fbe673b81b3a&_e=Nryb81FmobWrvwHlaMZB6sRKef5F8dhVzwZrVXVqKCi1W8dlHAOp6HSjsLMoyqRQLZbCT0LcXUXUGGrZe1gdT9MmIq-qEuFBmP5xvM5DmhE7q1foZNplgnrWOjJWYuwqLKAnIcFlX6ZO2kquhipo3BVaRzlF-bRhPLvDqWFjP93cB0OuMBUFJgiPSFzwURLAINvsUxZsoH9Xd6kUKBbzLq_XPWd2OkcOFg8c8nfNrbBU9RynvL5k6pEBJxlhQNtWU3vtMjAKzl2e8szHc_pgsLiREsDAlImLFxaFp62zguUal-4V8yEpl0YSBcmM7zw2B__tGaUq9m9OoMT9G5Q6gd7_IJ1PYsL1gKKIgPHyb8vabh_My-ofYZ6qZHqDAYcWjc5kEDLtw5m2lh-J6c1LN0X4ZLnfshzGDJj6UfW_HqEdtaFhASn_EWy144ywO7btqbnyr74C7w2e3IffgiROmdFUp6QFqHyP7Xqns-TEA74%3D)

| Peter,

_**The radical left is talking about denying healthcare coverage for covid treatment to any and all American's that are unvaccinated.**_

Not only do they want to strip you of your job, dismantle your business, and shut down any conversation about an American choosing not to be vaccinated, **but now they want to strip you of your healthcare?!**

**How is that not tyranny? How is that not a dictatorship?** Giving providers more power to deny coverage is wrong. Denying coverage to those who make a choice you disagree with isn't progressive, it's cruel.

All this shows is that when it comes to healthcare, the radical left wants to force you to have Obamacare, and then be able to take it away the second you're not using it the way they want. **All they really want to do is micromanage your family's health care decisions.**

[** STAND AGAINST THE RADICAL LEFT **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7117ad70c0f2422ba141fbe673b81b3a&_e=Nryb81FmobWrvwHlaMZB6sRKef5F8dhVzwZrVXVqKCi1W8dlHAOp6HSjsLMoyqRQLZbCT0LcXUXUGGrZe1gdT9MmIq-qEuFBmP5xvM5DmhE7q1foZNplgnrWOjJWYuwqLKAnIcFlX6ZO2kquhipo3BVaRzlF-bRhPLvDqWFjP93cB0OuMBUFJgiPSFzwURLAINvsUxZsoH9Xd6kUKBbzLq_XPWd2OkcOFg8c8nfNrbBU9RynvL5k6pEBJxlhQNtWU3vtMjAKzl2e8szHc_pgsCw3G151QTxe_YzNbCKJNK1BJdqpU2ZuKg39qIclqd95tlH2LXcfWM0KBLYhXLX0hnD78CSQXPiou5FJKr_wy1S1Z1-4AGvsMRjYcp-U1TNZGlCoK45ZbjX818cvlO2XubVOm_g9nHgf_IbKr8SjY7QdgZyUrgiSASi1W5O0CN9uYjPVOl0jpABfNw3h-71HOlV9OblLr-S4mTGo4klopTI%3D)
Life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. That is what our nation stands for, and the fact that there are elected officials working to deprive Americans of these principles shows just how radical the left has become.

**We cannot allow this type of governance to be the norm.** [**Please, stand with me so we can stop this radicalism. Pitch in anything, even just $10 to help me win back Congress**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7117ad70c0f2422ba141fbe673b81b3a&_e=Nryb81FmobWrvwHlaMZB6sRKef5F8dhVzwZrVXVqKCi1W8dlHAOp6HSjsLMoyqRQLZbCT0LcXUXUGGrZe1gdT9MmIq-qEuFBmP5xvM5DmhE7q1foZNplgnrWOjJWYuwqLKAnIcFlX6ZO2kquhipo3BVaRzlF-bRhPLvDqWFjP93cB0OuMBUFJgiPSFzwURLAINvsUxZsoH9Xd6kUKBbzLq_XPWd2OkcOFg8c8nfNrbBU9RynvL5k6pEBJxlhQNtWU3vtMjAKzl2e8szHc_pgsPZsa2MpUHyqbV3Q-oHhRvCIt6iwuvhj0m9vR7uW2E4uq_cQNktBPlzpUamYpcmVfd2Dg6jAqTiDzVDF5mvu2axFrRWdMoeWNRqrCmVdHp6nuYpd-J_b5nmFHhxo1zGf5m1cAEOXdbJw-Bbsl0m5aWYCNO6zj753QxSfPYj7ISVTK0A3c96yz9cFLh4T8kfwZuT56Tv0sMahD64dTXe3LBk%3D) and start pushing for policies that help the people, not sentence them to death.

Let's stop the fear mongering and tyrannical policies so we can get back to serving the people.

Thank you,

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7117ad70c0f2422ba141fbe673b81b3a&_e=Nryb81FmobWrvwHlaMZB6sRKef5F8dhVzwZrVXVqKCi1W8dlHAOp6HSjsLMoyqRQLZbCT0LcXUXUGGrZe1gdT9MmIq-qEuFBmP5xvM5DmhE7q1foZNplgnrWOjJWYuwqLKAnIcFlX6ZO2kquhipo3BVaRzlF-bRhPLvDqWFjP93cB0OuMBUFJgiPSFzwURLAINvsUxZsoH9Xd6kUKBbzLq_XPWd2OkcOFg8c8nfNrbBU9RynvL5k6pEBJxlhQNtWU3vtMjAKzl2e8szHc_pgsK8Qwk635kdjTkZk0GfJCDPqpdYtVn3-ldKWLJjPsLvTrzAqEkAYIjSbYTCwCpJRYevtNbyTvV1noeolzxEGg8JnVgD6fDFvV-oOyl_KN-yyMiOKOvm4AkThXAeMhKH1jXVzO9HnOfScRC37-xR5pRJLNe8wLAJN9ALg35vOGW3FzBLILCJCaSdMRlMC_R8tl7Hn7Pgg-41-v5R7vtkh0mw%3D)

Candidate, NY 19th Congressional District

[** STAND AGAINST THE RADICAL LEFT **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7117ad70c0f2422ba141fbe673b81b3a&_e=Nryb81FmobWrvwHlaMZB6sRKef5F8dhVzwZrVXVqKCi1W8dlHAOp6HSjsLMoyqRQLZbCT0LcXUXUGGrZe1gdT9MmIq-qEuFBmP5xvM5DmhE7q1foZNplgnrWOjJWYuwqLKAnIcFlX6ZO2kquhipo3BVaRzlF-bRhPLvDqWFjP93cB0OuMBUFJgiPSFzwURLAINvsUxZsoH9Xd6kUKBbzLq_XPWd2OkcOFg8c8nfNrbBU9RynvL5k6pEBJxlhQNtWU3vtMjAKzl2e8szHc_pgsGDP0rD4gp7G-m2BKbSqKrRC9TqHaDFZWS_EaQ4YiY8XXbkTbh-uktb9ASrIVW3T0Og6hqmBs97GIpOlMcOk5Nr8SHKR530Hd4xVF4IRw_DZ9G9FLJ5vgZ0vsUFusvmyYInoxwFamSOidUGsRuE_K1jsVhSEh34EqY_gtiIeeSgeD06L2c7FrSofjF7f9S1aqdJzI3uI1bfOKPrQKRNzfbM%3D)

Right now, over 45 million people in America collectively owe more than $1.8 trillion in student loan debt. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aKi7nPZoMC1hdvv-aBtd_WQ6FKSfaxIkIrA17ayJt0nD2Wi__h7Af9hcuC_hDK2lVaPUlgROanUtgI4OfOKXQNMBIDK49QZWthQXaZW3OePMOMALNJnUQG0d5CgZEPGoxN6ZFvy88Eivd9gydRTGBRCSRmwxpy6GLD5vj1Fb_TzDe8ekC4l8-Vg1hAalJF4XFtyybODmgojHmxsBg59IMeISKdtmEe5O9e_mkVoEC1x1BIqFCIpqWjzVj8ShM-DYOUqnntYCgzSwKXO-TElA8hVVgXRj3cJ_yJgVpW8NRLt4A/3hn/8MUGke95RqiTJrN_1oM3Cg/h0/To37slfwppkyquyFTDh0YUkysYOL0nfLSmFE_xwrmeU) Peter,
Over the past few weeks, many folks with student loans have received emails just like the one below. I know I have. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/XlxiKm-amnZREMhISCI1HVMUXFcMhArEkqZDxA98R5s_sQbg47PCIpCMpwvYmVShcjQm3nvn1lDBA-tk_jzYMCp-HAutY4gnIqKp3bw6o63W2FM1ZNST5jNR1qWMXZ2yJWw9ZeNBUQSMcZw1gD07_P9F3TlsNWhj_TtFNUjr9fUfC8PIjFPM6uemsXfHmGCvVkJRUXMuXoVWIcjE6VVWYfE4PwtuPoSxzdPaxesYQ0Eq3XbV9kyGcISOLHdGBK9TRPPqRbczJd4hQcWKHf0z2pmTHytpzTA5TKF8C80lLNfOyzvXWnWej978H4V22upHQ5x9lUFP9tWUNPPj9_1k-RgZe91w6VyLWbBx2LwnYwfmbjU9dfvZ8gVySYVFH0H6z21QUPOYbaUWyipZ5g09yT-4YYmuLfjl2U6StOdnZL45CmNeYO7SKRpht_y7WasONIGH2UymwZyyBkbVHD59cMcoyAciijzyeHzRze9g_ykmEeHI17T-Sv0XN2MUR9LRkw5dKm2DMEx03ISc0pvJ4Q/3hn/8MUGke95RqiTJrN_1oM3Cg/h1/W8tZ2pUZOvk_LtJ0gDzrEcNKHdzSDqN6v_0yRC_Sllo) Right now, over 45 million people in America collectively owe more than $1.8 trillion in student loan debt. And despite the ongoing pandemic and the debilitating burden of these loans, **student loan repayments are set to resume in just two months.****__** [**_With one swipe of the pen, President Biden could cancel that debt and free a generation of people from the crushing burden of student loans. Peter, can you add your name to our petition calling on President Biden to end student loan debt immediately?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/XlxiKm-amnZREMhISCI1HVMUXFcMhArEkqZDxA98R5s_sQbg47PCIpCMpwvYmVShcjQm3nvn1lDBA-tk_jzYMCp-HAutY4gnIqKp3bw6o63W2FM1ZNST5jNR1qWMXZ2yJWw9ZeNBUQSMcZw1gD07_P9F3TlsNWhj_TtFNUjr9fUfC8PIjFPM6uemsXfHmGCvVkJRUXMuXoVWIcjE6VVWYfE4PwtuPoSxzdPaxesYQ0Eq3XbV9kyGcISOLHdGBK9TRPPqRbczJd4hQcWKHf0z2qQ2GINxEIPnI4yc2w6Q7g985BEINi7Bt20sdLL_FUIovCv1ryzN34kby2pY2jPjwj6MwC1E6YOb6Zp9tI12DAuTGOIHIXEBqmCKTt6U6KomBdJcgu7q5D1MJnOszMkb3z414Qq2dqWftRQ91xKLVmamKWKZEZWu_nL-2cm5hvD4MjlxId2Rn1EvBi95J5WmaTwFkLwm5UHeWbiVyr3nqlJgYmla-ewJ_IRuL9wD4ltXv4BjbKWoKSn0qUxxa8AfFQ/3hn/8MUGke95RqiTJrN_1oM3Cg/h2/IpFHAE47aupvPL6IzHmNDf6ngC3Pbm0XPuN9-WYMC9E) [Add Your Name »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/XlxiKm-amnZREMhISCI1HVMUXFcMhArEkqZDxA98R5s_sQbg47PCIpCMpwvYmVShcjQm3nvn1lDBA-tk_jzYMCp-HAutY4gnIqKp3bw6o63W2FM1ZNST5jNR1qWMXZ2yJWw9ZeNBUQSMcZw1gD07_P9F3TlsNWhj_TtFNUjr9fUfC8PIjFPM6uemsXfHmGCvVkJRUXMuXoVWIcjE6VVWYfE4PwtuPoSxzdPaxesYQ0Eq3XbV9kyGcISOLHdGBK9TRPPqRbczJd4hQcWKHf0z2qvA2tqOHTNboUxXh8m1K9Hcp3Zu7T4z1j85zYtYit7cQoi2q83W157ABFNtXnVAItLkRMd6alPZETLWftXX0rMbyx63Z-kutjwesQzgrF-17GkGvXwhRW4yoHJgL9Y1Fjuo3P3nrIBNcyAnN_JvlIxNoNK6F_f06oECyTPPHjchtzP6kgCTDhK8hCSbiaP9Zu2bq9VF_RQnTaQjHkab4lwesbS3AWfbpLTv3zacEe5IdcfpepCZqkeLc0nGmY8N_g/3hn/8MUGke95RqiTJrN_1oM3Cg/h3/MccD7aI9K59QEnK-70zcYr-fpobeSMFkNbi1ZhzXf9c) I’m one of 45 million Americans with student loan debt. After I graduated from Tennessee State University, I followed in my father’s footsteps to pursue a career in public service, working for the City of Nashville at Metro Parks and Rec. I loved that job, and I love raising my kids in this community — but when Wall Street crashed the economy, the City cut our budget and forced me to work part time.
It took earning my Masters degree in Public Service at Cumberland University to be able to make a living wage and provide for me and my kids. But in getting the education I needed to make ends meet, I had to take on thousands of dollars of student loans that I’m still repaying today.
**No person should have to go into crushing debt in order to get an education —** and for so many folks, these loans are an enormous burden. 89% of borrowers say they aren't financially secure enough to resume their student loan payments this February. That’s why it’s so important that President Biden take action now.
[**_Peter, if you’re with me, please sign our petition now calling on President Biden to get rid of student loan debt right away._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/XlxiKm-amnZREMhISCI1HVMUXFcMhArEkqZDxA98R5s_sQbg47PCIpCMpwvYmVShcjQm3nvn1lDBA-tk_jzYMCp-HAutY4gnIqKp3bw6o63W2FM1ZNST5jNR1qWMXZ2yJWw9ZeNBUQSMcZw1gD07_P9F3TlsNWhj_TtFNUjr9fUfC8PIjFPM6uemsXfHmGCvVkJRUXMuXoVWIcjE6VVWYfE4PwtuPoSxzdPaxesYQ0Eq3XbV9kyGcISOLHdGBK9TRPPqRbczJd4hQcWKHf0z2uA4bbvvyNG2zVCH_nd9RTzPCB_H1YHMC3v1RtQjGSDFemyrTZutGk53ITRCFl2J9SDlThd08T-RVHdhEeydYEoS7jBWdGOp4NIP0xQ88LIRgAWargQm0lkv7PWtXAIUAJ3i6yEUFUuyV9Y-i7dWfkMv-H7veK9eCnsHTZK7tC5JgNXcxoLFmp8hy3m4DWNQfnci5P7CI0TzCRlL-oTjWtHd_XkjysnKZTT5Jrz5Lq2qZMUm45OVqt4_75x30eG04g/3hn/8MUGke95RqiTJrN_1oM3Cg/h4/uOkcrK1JRotL99jKb9mCVDPs_mVZw51AFD_mewlA6FM) [Add Your Name »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/XlxiKm-amnZREMhISCI1HVMUXFcMhArEkqZDxA98R5s_sQbg47PCIpCMpwvYmVShcjQm3nvn1lDBA-tk_jzYMCp-HAutY4gnIqKp3bw6o63W2FM1ZNST5jNR1qWMXZ2yJWw9ZeNBUQSMcZw1gD07_P9F3TlsNWhj_TtFNUjr9fUfC8PIjFPM6uemsXfHmGCvVkJRUXMuXoVWIcjE6VVWYfE4PwtuPoSxzdPaxesYQ0Eq3XbV9kyGcISOLHdGBK9TRPPqRbczJd4hQcWKHf0z2m-RTXq3zftaU9t4TibWkahlLnjyE879FHXZWJPGN3xXdl8h__m0isGIo6wl7BmA1stUCPDzLZ0mQ_-MtT8uPVCAiatkVucSwttoQpnEd8li1QVFa1tBzf-M-2n0USEl8IKz_ssKK6Uoa49pKC6sT8sg3QQUfRqlm4VjrwAXqVGh4U5DLdE4uibsZfGc06OhQkZCxgQW5WkhtOlvlv7aZg5zX8f4X3jUzyTRlQb5hWZiIL_DCh0-ChhPf3ZTQg_DTA/3hn/8MUGke95RqiTJrN_1oM3Cg/h5/J2fePmvBSlDgOaLS1VFN-I7zJpFOnymUyqiXI7x4Ohs) In solidarity, Odessa Odessa Kelly

clean_body: Right now, over 45 million people in America collectively owe more than $1.8 trillion in student loan debt. | | | Peter, Over the past few weeks, many folks with student loans have received emails just like the one below. I know I have. Right now, over 45 million people in America collectively owe more than $1.8 trillion in student loan debt. And despite the ongoing pandemic and the debilitating burden of these loans, student loan repayments are set to resume in just two months. I’m one of 45 million Americans with student loan debt. After I graduated from Tennessee State University, I followed in my father’s footsteps to pursue a career in public service, working for the City of Nashville at Metro Parks and Rec. I loved that job, and I love raising my kids in this community — but when Wall Street crashed the economy, the City cut our budget and forced me to work part time. It took earning my Masters degree in Public Service at Cumberland University to be able to make a living wage and provide for me and my kids. But in getting the education I needed to make ends meet, I had to take on thousands of dollars of student loans that I’m still repaying today. No person should have to go into crushing debt in order to get an education — and for so many folks, these loans are an enormous burden. 89% of borrowers say they aren't financially secure enough to resume their student loan payments this February. That’s why it’s so important that President Biden take action now. In solidarity, Odessa Odessa Kelly Candidate for Tennessee’s 5th Congressional District | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203
