name: Allen West
subject: Let’s Make This Official
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN
body:
Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. I am announcing today that I have just come from officially filing my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5c402089d6ea466f8acf20c89d2f0123&_e=SMqzjjfY46o8ZWvt4jiKMw8fQUva1TwJqYSZpNDtCMyci3KF3FbpfgDZZeiXmNcVwS9OCAhzZxUzg9hu6Bh8vSYjfIB1ybjJ0CyZu-Nipo2CZt8yrSEvVQwn8asbLRTy_n3miMM4LrVsSR2lB272OpiFNnRw1YMyi02bWQMQaYtpIk953fo6nJbTJ9_3MBE178vnDVimuNT7sCgMiRax3a8wIW_SAuMjHDtww98EPEnkx4TMRGUSZMdTbVtTvx8VFIwkCCrNkUvCqja3ZynnNkyJni_dBTNJYciQgAJbrtMhUbvCl126kjECUkob9Ei-Lrk8MFRWZGyPjfRghzkJvwRK-qVv9ZGinSg0Bxl12N0kM5MoBXeeZlzo3kF1_59h)
---
Fellow American,

We have been working hard for several months to reach the voters of Texas with my winning message of strong, effective conservative leadership for our state. Recently I officially filed my candidacy for Governor with the office of the Secretary of State.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5c402089d6ea466f8acf20c89d2f0123&_e=SMqzjjfY46o8ZWvt4jiKMw8fQUva1TwJqYSZpNDtCMyci3KF3FbpfgDZZeiXmNcVwS9OCAhzZxUzg9hu6Bh8vSYjfIB1ybjJ0CyZu-Nipo2CZt8yrSEvVQwn8asbLRTy_n3miMM4LrVsSR2lB272OpiFNnRw1YMyi02bWQMQaYuzIXCnN3lANxbESm_8EOy-quEDtI19dCRbNq1kT-dN6GGR1HcCxm11KrMT-rr4LqTP4yZalnr6YmeLaU9RGGJjqUxfBujm7CRvdVDOW6eKwnZ7xT-XpMbP-adv_NKWdsjpKih9aMd6Pz1mvaJ4z09jq5RaLy4Zp6fD_tEEpsaJjg__h7jg4ykIRT3e2dEivNoBpudwj09cB1XVYSzxN54R)
So, it is time to really shift this campaign into top gear and utilize the time we have to make our case to Texas Republicans that the future of our state - and this great country - are on the line in the next few months.

That is why I hope you will also take action today - join me on the ramparts of freedom - and support my campaign for Governor of Texas!

There are many ways you can do that, Fellow American - you can pray, which costs nothing but time. You can share our campaign content online and speak to friends and family about what is at stake. You can volunteer and make a difference in person.

[**And, you can make your own endorsement of my campaign - and empower us with the resources we need to build a successful foundation for the tough race ahead with a 2022 Allen West for Governor - with a generous grassroots contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or whatever you can afford right now.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5c402089d6ea466f8acf20c89d2f0123&_e=SMqzjjfY46o8ZWvt4jiKMw8fQUva1TwJqYSZpNDtCMyci3KF3FbpfgDZZeiXmNcVwS9OCAhzZxUzg9hu6Bh8vSYjfIB1ybjJ0CyZu-Nipo2CZt8yrSEvVQwn8asbLRTy_n3miMM4LrVsSR2lB272OpiFNnRw1YMyi02bWQMQaYuDpgKdyIf9g9vXSU5dBKpmpfSo0vmK2t_yWYk1pwdQkT3icQrQ85-c4B1DDQXInaHgEzUQ69aQ-3DUoukzh1XkLs7jGs6BzZbC-xHjZV1ZfOk52s_VtDvmOX-m68fBNOM5Ywd4q9NY9_UHfGtp6Gt3yLrHVLF7SXRyl8siB2a-Z7Y4yfrJ1PRUwEEqdWw_sS6L_rV3Fox3USkbXUUrvJjH)

[**Fellow American, we must turn away from the path of least resistance and complacency at the many challenges threatening our freedom and prosperity. I am prepared to lead us in a new direction, but I must have your support to succeed.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5c402089d6ea466f8acf20c89d2f0123&_e=SMqzjjfY46o8ZWvt4jiKMw8fQUva1TwJqYSZpNDtCMyci3KF3FbpfgDZZeiXmNcVwS9OCAhzZxUzg9hu6Bh8vSYjfIB1ybjJ0CyZu-Nipo2CZt8yrSEvVQwn8asbLRTy_n3miMM4LrVsSR2lB272OpiFNnRw1YMyi02bWQMQaYvMK-ouAr7WLyT0paJVz0249sDhkopkFTtMID5ov6GdmyG9f55fbSgA7r0Q3yBZEn5NzIo0dUm2WsymCl9riost6s7rEjeDD6TMgeDnav1ZWkh4FfNOnkR2fUrkybY7WWa5ByGt1B__92GYsGUqJpQLoYASNxHmDu-1u7ygPYNmniR8KiR5BV8q6OQI51JExoUU9pKX2iPC8ASCIvU5Bglw)

Can I count on your endorsement today?

[**Thank you, Fellow American - I hope to hear from you soon.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5c402089d6ea466f8acf20c89d2f0123&_e=SMqzjjfY46o8ZWvt4jiKMw8fQUva1TwJqYSZpNDtCMyci3KF3FbpfgDZZeiXmNcVwS9OCAhzZxUzg9hu6Bh8vSYjfIB1ybjJ0CyZu-Nipo2CZt8yrSEvVQwn8asbLRTy_n3miMM4LrVsSR2lB272OpiFNnRw1YMyi02bWQMQaYtVJ5t3Gw6OtDw4JMt4VQTFyKiqpdS5Q1vU8dfPVOodQbhqr7B4p3fLI-yIDQQZI7WhWo3rR0m_20epLrDTSn4jBNCofxJksBb7n60HWfBsX-5w8f0rJlGQHeK57dgdL_A4_Y8EpbWP3qi08rrei98b-aiC955HdpP4paPWvzTiK9mNtumcFraZAQA4S49mCPsS1ofoSn7pa_eaQwADhYDe)

clean_body: We’ve taken the lead. | Friend, The latest polling shows that we’ve taken the LEAD with 53% of Wisconsin voters saying they would NOT vote to reelect radical liberal Tony Evers. Now I’m counting on your sustained support to ensure we can keep our foot on the gas to close out 2021 strong. With all the polls shifting in our favor, we can’t give Evers a single opportunity to rebuild momentum. These new polling numbers have even caused the Cook Political Report to shift the state of Wisconsin from lean Democrat to a TOSS-UP. Tony Evers' failed leadership has officially caught up with him, and his reelection campaign is hitting the panic button. name: Tom Winter
subject: Update: President Biden renews call for Build Back Better NOW
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA
body:
This is our tax money, and it’s about time it gets invested in us, not corporations and the rich | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmhRxBYMPFS2lKOyTiY0dsMFjSZsBzSnpE9D9d1xFzo9gIxI33h2-b33kc-yRN4OWamoW7KOgdpEpDxnP9CEgNym5aJYdovLq7HpRKMzdGQlqlCIvX9ihyhvMM8w4j9nU4_hKrI3cahsfinCDN17wQmFNk4g8SkXbKMpn-FEx4TaoN78JeaU3UfymHUOJEO2x8_ZJm4jT5xMypYsX7O827peNH66HZNEyBGhhTSBAIfHqzpBkYovznVS_NxxsxKnzzyfYFUbvzsTroMRMnTEZ42bEYcHM0-ttUta6NAznPGzKyP5KUIkbxOItPd8cudhTaGPapDA_xRol9fFCkP2r4mphQWgltuzcKiKEUKkVjBVLg3ZT5kSh6GnziRIanjyE4P8_o8fcGL3JBtVPp2TaBanolXiYZ6zvOE-e0VNxA-YBJMZwIBmvXdpTp4Uf_iZaQudFI8BVnaIQIcvVh5gq5hXu-Ajy09HhyBjHncbiaWkIo8143aOYtrnrKX4fI4U6LaFeZ957Cg0yNxw_iJ8Gni-WMZ2LafABl3B0GwMf3ot_1D5a6LUZzR2EWzwfMHvsM/3hn/0WPcisRcQ_GLPXnaubM7og/h0/hCE5lXl9yBSuH7vPMuNnGgHc8_M3wzJH3lxwgJbu4_M) Friend,

Yesterday, President Biden spoke out, urging Congress to pass the Build Back Better Act. Congress has to act faster to get this vital bill passed before the holiday for all the people that need the stability this bill will create.

This is our tax money, and it’s about time it starts getting invested in us, not corporations and the rich who shield their wealth from taxation. Build Back Better is not just for the big cities. This package will uniquely benefit rural America, and specifically Montanans. It’s a shot at getting the resources to build back the Montana that was taken from us.

**If you haven’t signed on to my petition to tell Congress to pass BBB yet, will you join us today to make all of our voices louder together?**

[**Sign on today to call on Congress to pass Build Back Better NOW. Show that we are watching and won’t give up.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmhRxBYMPFS2lKOyTiY0dsMFjSZsBzSnpE9D9d1xFzo9gIxI33h2-b33kc-yRN4OWamoW7KOgdpEpDxnP9CEgNym5aJYdovLq7HpRKMzdGQlqlCIvX9ihyhvMM8w4j9nU4_hKrI3cahsfinCDN17wQmFNk4g8SkXbKMpn-FEx4TaoN78JeaU3UfymHUOJEO2x8_ZJm4jT5xMypYsX7O827paYEi8hYB5MUe3Y03YjiiI8Ja-dH5yTjAshKGp7mHAyidTF7iqytfgKd6hrXJ9W33p8GMOlUiXWkbYLU8H5tbsEaSNJ6GZGS-jRfO0MTSc__mytm054yPe01KJHeibHiAZnkPJVfjVru9fyCunOmyvp5gUoXiYFv5qm2-6zaHGatqhC13dF9kYxQR8-UTqcKnk2MhJF7OoTRU3n5D-43WBZbcsDPrXB0eGpCkiNvEHA8kYBWKbUELsAXfH0aXOKDUPRBggquc5fNmujUkLrciXYPhYe_G46suASMxTCAvp6dXWIpY3XC_IwyU7fu8kJiEqXDybir1gQr_2AE4BDeVrsuQ1E_owSQixUTqPn6GB3A/3hn/0WPcisRcQ_GLPXnaubM7og/h1/F1oDdujLpuBkTYet9flqQOJLr4jP-Mh7SFbxJX1xXCI)

We just made historic investments in physical infrastructure. Now it’s time to do the same with the people infrastructure that builds this nation. I think the ultra-rich can pay their fair share and invest in the families that build Montana for once, don’t you?

Thank you for raising your voice,

Tom

body:
One year later: “Desantis woke a sleeping giant when he raided Rebekah Jones’ home last December." | Posted by Rebekah Jone
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.rebekahjonescampaign.com/so/15NsNGVtX/c?w=lwdEL4UjYjYDZQrYWfhd8wSpvCyYfCAdoJupn5YBjEE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmViZWthaGpvbmVzY2FtcGFpZ24uY29tL3NvLzE1TnNOR1Z0WD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjdlN2E4N2UxLTcwNDMtNDE3OS1iODM4LTVjYTg5MjBmYWFkNyJ9)_**

| | |
---
| | New Blog Post
---
|
---
| | One year later: “Desantis woke a sleeping giant when he raided Rebekah Jones’ home last December."
---
| | Posted by Rebekah Jones, 4 min
---
| |
---
| | On December 7, 2020, nearly a dozen men armed with semi-automatic weapons raided my home. They pointed a gun at my head and told me to open the front door. I complied. What else can you do with a gun pointed at your head? They said they had a warrant; but that warrant wouldn’t come until hours later. I asked if I could see the warrant. “It’s on the way,” one officer said on video recorded from inside of my home that morning. I knew at that moment something awful was happening...
---

name: Trump Media & Technology Group
subject: Trump Media & Technology Group Corp. and Digital World Acquisition Corp. Announce $1 Billion “PIPE” Investment in Committed Capital to Fund Business
body:
| |
---
| | **PALM BEACH, FL – December 4, 2021 –** [Trump Media & Technology Group Corp. ](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJxFUcuOnDAQ_Bq4DWJswMyBQzazqz0nipKbZewGWuvXGnvJ5OtjEJtIlmVXV5ery2oY2152txIHUpPrldSM0LZvaMWgUQzqibUTrTtZF01tHsJAQCmsFzGgi5ULc7kMHVxJXytBOtrXIwV2k0KxSY6ilUBFX-phidGvBf1SkJe8tm2roomzdMFX0pkdpS8pGm5AYTIFvYMRqAvS7eDqUpCQwVH1QjS9aC9Wai6M1zg9TpLMV4GzzbRzkuYSQzL-0BQ8glys025-8Dm45Pn-OBdWcYUzRqH55oJWXMj3hCtGdPaTYl2yEviVj6j1jnv0wNF-wBoN2JiPmWoMxggqG_GHXHR8Sll-TCtaWNdPn87G3JNt5hkur999-nF7DcBymVuNKhca9s2Dh_dpOsAFVY7u_ntTy9OvWxkG5bfdyNqx_CnzHtQeYnnmMRTsqSDk6CLkyJz8D-7j7eflT7DPe4l8zXt8ePjHOyWqM31SsPtf5cS5ew)(“TMTG”) and Digital World Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: DWAC), today announced that Digital World Acquisition Corp. (“DWAC”) has entered into subscription agreements for $1 billion in committed capital to be received upon consummation of their business combination (the “PIPE”) from a diverse group of institutional investors. President Donald J. Trump, Chairman of TMTG, stated, “$1 billion sends an important message to Big Tech that censorship and political discrimination must end. America is ready for TRUTH Social, a platform that will not discriminate on the basis of political ideology. As our balance sheet expands, TMTG will be in a stronger position to fight back against the tyranny of Big Tech.” Patrick Orlando, Chairman and CEO of Digital World Acquisition Corp., commented, “Our focus on delivering public shareholder value drives our decision-making and by accepting these commitments for a strategic infusion of growth capital, we believe the combined company can grow on an incredibly strong foundation. The liquidity that will be provided to the combined company balance sheet, in excess of the up to $293 million (less expenses) that DWAC may provide, should fortify the strategic positioning of TMTG. I am confident that TMTG can effectively deploy this capital to accelerate and strengthen the execution of its business, including by continuing to attract top talent, hire top technology providers, and roll out significant advertising and business development campaigns.” Together, the transaction will provide estimated proceeds of approximately $1.25 billion (after deducting estimated deal expenses), assuming full delivery of the amount of cash held in trust by DWAC, to be used to fund operations of the combined entity. The per-share conversion price of the fully committed convertible preferred stock PIPE transaction represents a 20% discount to DWAC’s volume-weighted average closing price (“VWAP”) for the five trading days prior to and including December 1, 2021, subject to downward adjustment. If the VWAP of the combined entity for the 10 trading days after the closing of the business combination (“Closing VWAP”) is at or above $56, no downward adjustment will occur. If the Closing VWAP is below $56, then the conversion price shall be adjusted to the greater of a 40% discount to the Closing VWAP and the floor price of $10.00. clean_body: | | | | PALM BEACH, FL – December 4, 2021 – (“TMTG”) and Digital World Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: DWAC), today announced that Digital World Acquisition Corp. (“DWAC”) has entered into subscription agreements for $1 billion in committed capital to be received upon consummation of their business combination (the “PIPE”) from a diverse group of institutional investors. President Donald J. Trump, Chairman of TMTG, stated, “$1 billion sends an important message to Big Tech that censorship and political discrimination must end. America is ready for TRUTH Social, a platform that will not discriminate on the basis of political ideology. As our balance sheet expands, TMTG will be in a stronger position to fight back against the tyranny of Big Tech.” Patrick Orlando, Chairman and CEO of Digital World Acquisition Corp., commented, “Our focus on delivering public shareholder value drives our decision-making and by accepting these commitments for a strategic infusion of growth capital, we believe the combined company can grow on an incredibly strong foundation. The liquidity that will be provided to the combined company balance sheet, in excess of the up to $293 million (less expenses) that DWAC may provide, should fortify the strategic positioning of TMTG. I am confident that TMTG can effectively deploy this capital to accelerate and strengthen the execution of its business, including by continuing to attract top talent, hire top technology providers, and roll out significant advertising and business development campaigns.” Together, the transaction will provide estimated proceeds of approximately $1.25 billion (after deducting estimated deal expenses), assuming full delivery of the amount of cash held in trust by DWAC, to be used to fund operations of the combined entity. The per-share conversion price of the fully committed convertible preferred stock PIPE transaction represents a 20% discount to DWAC’s volume-weighted average closing price (“VWAP”) for the five trading days prior to and including December 1, 2021, subject to downward adjustment. If the VWAP of the combined entity for the 10 trading days after the closing of the business combination (“Closing VWAP”) is at or above $56, no downward adjustment will occur. If the Closing VWAP is below $56, then the conversion price shall be adjusted to the greater of a 40% discount to the Closing VWAP and the floor price of $10.00. The PIPE financing is subject to customary closing conditions, including stockholder and regulatory approval, and is expected to close upon or shortly after the consummation of the business combination. Exclusive Placement Agent EF Hutton, division of Benchmark Investments, LLC, is serving as exclusive placement agent and capital markets advisor to DWAC. Trump Media & Technology Group Corp.
